Compensation: $250/month during 3-month probation, performance-based raise review after Month 3



About the Role



This is a fast-paced, high-responsibility role for someone who can handle administrative support, financial tracking (not accounting), and project coordination without constant supervision. You will be the operational right hand—keeping projects organized, expenses tracked, and workflows running clean.



This is not a casual VA role. You will be working inside live business systems and must be precise, organized, and responsive.



Tools We Use



HoneyBook

ClickUp

WhatsApp & iPhone for daily communication



Responsibilities



Track expenses, vendor invoices, and contractor payments (no accounting or tax work)

Monitor project budgets and flag missing info or overages

Track supplies, rentals, and purchase needs

Manage schedules, task lists, documents, and follow-ups

Support project timelines, reporting, and coordination

Maintain organized records and internal trackers

Identify inefficiencies and suggest workflow improvements



Ideal Candidate



Strong administrative and organizational experience

Experience with project coordination or operations support

Comfortable working with budgets, invoices, and trackers (not doing accounting)

Tech-savvy and fast at learning systems

Excellent English (written and spoken)

Fully available during 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Los Angeles, CA (PST)



DO NOT APPLY IF



You are looking for a light or casual VA role

You cannot commit to the Los Angeles PST time window

You struggle with multitasking or urgency

You need constant step-by-step supervision

You dislike structured systems and accountability



Payment Terms



Paid based on completed, accurate deliverables, not idle time

First 30 days: One payout after successful completion and review

After 30 days: Bi-weekly payouts

Probation pay: $250/month

Performance bonuses and raises available for high performers within 6 months



How to Apply



 subject line:

Virtual Assistant – [Your Name]



Only candidates who follow instructions and include the required 15 Apply Points will be contacted.

title: Appointment Setter

 & Instagram)

Hands-on experience launching
 & Instagram ads

Looking forward to your application,

ECGA

title: Property Management Support
description:
Job Description - Property Management Support



We are looking for someone to join the Moorview Lets team in the Property Management Support role. This role will work closely with the Property Managers within the business, to deliver 5* service to both tenants and landlords.



PLEASE NOTE WE WILL ONLY CONSIDER APPLICANTS WHO HAVE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT EXPERIENCE, SPECIFICALLY DEALING WITH MAINTENANCE TASKS.



The ideal candidate will be highly organised, detail-orientated, with an excellent
 manner and high standards for their work.

The ideal candidate should be proficient at using IT and be able to use tools like MS Office and the Google suite of products.



Responsibilities

* Work daily through your assigned tasks to move them forward, close them out, or get more information from tenants

* Liaise with tenants, landlords and contractors to efficiently triage/diagnose and resolve maintenance tasks

* Switch easily between planned and reactive maintenance items

* Take ownership for a portfolio of properties

* Keep excellent records on our property management system 'COHO'

* Update core KPIs with commentary 

* Approve invoices for works and send these for payment

* Work closely with other parts of the business (e.g. onboarding, sales and finance)

* Other administrative duties as required by the Property Managers



Requirements

* Property management experience (specifically maintenance management) is essential

* Proficiency in MS Office (MS Excel and MS Powerpoint in particular) and using Google Suite

* Excellent time management skills and ability to prioritise work

* Attention to detail and problem solving skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* Strong organisational skills and ability to multi-task

* Ability to triage and prioritise maintenance tasks

* Flexible with a 'can do' attitude and growth mindset, prepared to take on new challenges.



What we can offer you

As a company we believe in creating a working environment where people feel cared for, safe and have opportunities to develop their skills. We welcome open and honest communication in the business to enable transparent understanding of the working environment. Collaboratively we support each other to improve and in doing so we encourage a strong challenge and support model in day to day tasks and events to accelerate personal development and business growth.

To this end we have an open working style which is friendly and fun but also professional. Alongside our commitment to keep the team healthy and safe, we also believe passionately in providing opportunities within the company for people to develop their skills and knowledge.



Working Pattern: Full time, Mon-Friday, 9am-5pm UK time (with an hour for lunch)



Holidays: 15 days per year + UK Bank Holidays

title: Financial Planning & Analysis with Procurement  experience
description:
We are seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Financial Planning & Analyst professional with procurement experience to support financial planning, budgeting, forecasting, cost optimization, and procurement-related financial operations. The role will work closely with finance, procurement, and business teams to manage budgets, analyze spend patterns, optimize vendor costs, and support strategic financial decision-making.



Key Responsibilities



Financial Planning & Analysis



Prepare annual budgets, financial forecasts, and long-term financial plans

Conduct variance analysis between actuals, budgets, and forecasts

Develop financial models to support business decisions

Monitor profitability, revenue trends, and operational expenses

Prepare monthly MIS reports, dashboards, and financial presentations for leadership

Procurement Financial Management



Partner with procurement teams for vendor budgeting and spend forecasting

Analyze procurement spend and identify cost-saving opportunities

Monitor purchase orders, vendor contracts, and payment schedules

Evaluate procurement costs and support negotiation strategies

Ensure optimal utilization of procurement budgets

Vendor & Contract Analysis



Review vendor agreements from a financial perspective

Track contract renewals, pricing structures, and payment terms

Ensure procurement compliance with internal financial policies

Reporting & Controls



Prepare procurement spend reports for management review

Ensure data accuracy and financial control measures

Support internal/external audits related to procurement spending

Cross-functional Collaboration



Work closely with Finance, Procurement, Operations, and Leadership teams

Support strategic initiatives involving cost planning and procurement decisions

Required Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Commerce, Economics, Supply Chain, or related field

MBA Finance / CA / CMA preferred

Experience



3–8 years of experience in Financial Planning & Analysis, Procurement Finance, Strategic Sourcing, or related roles

Required Skills



Financial planning and forecasting

Procurement budgeting

Spend analysis

Cost optimization

Financial modeling

Advanced Excel

ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite, etc.)

Power BI / Tableau (preferred)

Vendor management understanding

Strong negotiation support skills

Key KPIs



Budget accuracy

Forecast accuracy

Procurement savings achieved

Vendor cost optimization

Reporting accuracy and timeliness



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: Business Development Executive
description:
Company Description

MERRIA Digital is a growing digital marketing and creative agency based in Singapore. We help SMEs improve their online presence through strategic marketing, social media management, and digital campaigns that generate real business growth.



Our focus is to support businesses in industries such as home services, contractors, and SMEs looking to strengthen their digital presence and attract more customers.



We are currently looking for a Business Development Executive to support our sales and lead generation activities.



Role Overview

The Business Development Assistant will support the company's growth by identifying potential clients, conducting outreach, and scheduling meetings with prospective businesses in Singapore.



This role is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive, and interested in sales, marketing, or business development.



The primary goal of this role is to build a consistent pipeline of potential clients and schedule appointments for the Business Development Manager to present the company's services.



This is a full time role (40 hours per week) with flexible working arrangement.



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation

Research and identify potential SME clients across various industries.

Build and maintain a database of qualified leads.



Appointment Setting

Schedule meetings between potential clients and Business Development Manager.

Coordinate availability and manage meeting calendars.



Follow-Ups

Send follow-up messages to prospects.

Maintain communication with interested leads.



CRM & Reporting

Track all leads, outreach activities, and responses in CRM system.

Provide weekly reports.



Sales Support

Assist with business development initiatives and client acquisition support.



Requirements

Strong communication skills

Organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable with online research and outreach

Basic knowledge of digital marketing is a plus

Experience in sales, marketing, or lead generation is an advantage but not required

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively



Why Join MERRIA Digital

Opportunity to work with growing digital marketing agency

Gain experience in business development and digital marketing

Flexible working arrangement

Potential long-term opportunity as the company expands



How to Apply

Interested candidates may send their CV along with short introduction to 
 line: Application - Business Development Assistant

title: Operations Assistant- High End Building Company
description:
Operations Assistant (Virtual) - High-End Residential Building Company

We’re a growing, family-owned residential building company specialising in high-end new builds and renovations. We pride ourselves on delivering a premium client experience, strong communication, and attention to detail across every project.

As we continue to grow, we’re looking for a reliable and proactive Operations Assistant to support our day-to-day operations and help keep the business running smoothly behind the scenes. This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with the business and take ownership over time.

What you’ll help us do:

• Keep communication flowing between clients, trades, and suppliers

• Ensure no enquiry, quote, or follow-up slips through the cracks

• Support the team in delivering a high-quality client experience

• Maintain organisation across projects, files, and systems

• Assist in improving systems and processes as the business grows

What we offer:

• Flexible remote work

• Supportive and respectful team environment

• Paid local holidays + Sydney holidays

• Long-term, stable role with growth opportunities

• Opportunity to grow into a more senior operations role over time

About you:

• Exceptional written and verbal English

• High attention to detail - you take pride in getting things right

• Proactive and able to take initiative (not just wait for instructions)

• Organised, reliable, and able to follow systems and processes

• Comfortable using
, spreadsheets, Google Drive, Dropbox, Canva

• Confident using social media platforms (posting + responding)

• Experience with Buildxact is a bonus (or willingness to learn)

Key responsibilities:

• Managing inboxes and digital calendars

• Responding to clients, contractors, and suppliers

• Scheduling site visits and meetings

• Following up enquiries and quotes

• Assisting with quotes, documents, and admin tasks

• Organising project files and documentation

• Posting project updates on social media

• Monitoring and responding to messages/comments

This role is not for you if:

• You need constant direction to get things done

• You struggle to stay organised or meet deadlines

• You prefer repetitive work without responsibility

To apply:

Send us an
 with the subject line “First Aid” and tell us (in 200 words) why you’d be a great fit for our company. Include one interesting fact about yourself at the end.

We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of the team long-term - not just another job.

title: Electrical Estimator (Residential & Commercial)
description:
Wadi Electric is a growing electrical contracting company serving Maryland, Washington DC, and Northern Virginia. We are looking for an experienced Electrical Estimator to help us price residential and light commercial projects accurately, competitively, and profitably.



Our primary focus is residential electrical work, service upgrades, rewires, additions, remodels, EV chargers, generators, and light commercial projects.



Project sizes typically range from $50, yes000 to $2,000,000.



We are looking for someone highly experienced who can produce detailed, organized, and accurate estimates with minimal supervision while coordinating with our Master Electrician when needed.



Expected production:

20–40 estimates per month.



Primary goal:

Win profitable work while maintaining strong margins.



Responsibilities:



• Review plans, scope documents, and customer requirements

• Perform quantity takeoffs

• Build detailed labor and material estimates

• Price residential and light commercial electrical work

• Analyze project specifications and identify missing scope

• Coordinate with suppliers for material pricing

• Build professional estimate packages and proposals

• Review code requirements and installation requirements

• Identify permit requirements where applicable

• Value engineer projects for profitability

• Suggest alternates and cost-saving options

• Track bid status and revisions

• Review awarded projects for handoff to field team

• Maintain estimating templates and pricing systems

• Coordinate with management and Master Electrician for technical review



Types of work you will estimate:



• Panel upgrades / service upgrades

• Whole-home rewires

• EV charger installations

• Generator systems

• Dedicated circuits

• Lighting packages

• Smart home electrical upgrades

• Kitchen and bath remodels

• Basement finishes

• Additions

• Service work

• Small commercial tenant improvements

• Restaurant electrical work

• Retail electrical work



Requirements:



• Strong electrical estimating experience

• Strong knowledge of residential electrical systems

• Strong understanding of NEC/code compliance

• Ability to read blueprints and plans

• Ability to build labor units accurately

• Strong material knowledge

• Strong communication skills

• High attention to detail

• Ability to work independently

• Ability to meet deadlines



Software experience (strong plus):



• ServiceTitan

• Microsoft Excel

• Bluebeam Revu

• PlanSwift

• STACK Construction Technologies

• Accubid Classic

• McCormick Estimating



Bonus if you have:



• Your own estimating software

• Your own takeoff tools

• Existing supplier relationships

• Home service estimating experience

• Electrical contracting background



Compensation:



$900–$2,500/month depending on:

• experience

• speed

• accuracy

• win rate

• profitability of bids



To apply, send:



• Resume

• Sample estimate(s) you’ve built

• Software you use

• Types of electrical projects you’ve estimated

• Estimated monthly output

• Bid win history

title: Credit Repair Specialist – Long-Term Role with Growth to Team Lead
description:
In-House Credit Repair | US Funding Company | Remote – Philippines



About the Role

We are an established US-based funding company building our in-house credit repair division. We are looking for an experienced Credit Repair Specialist to be one of the first hires on this team. Strong performers will be promoted to lead the credit repair team as we scale.

This is a long-term, full-time position. Not a project. Not a trial. We want someone we can grow with.



What You Will Do



Analyze tri-bureau credit reports and identify disputable items

Draft and manage personalized dispute letters

Call credit bureaus, creditors, and collection agencies directly to file and follow up on disputes

Use Credit Repair Cloud, DisputeFox, or similar software

Maintain accurate records and keep clients updated

Ensure full FCRA, FDCPA, and CROA compliance





Requirements



2+ years hands-on credit repair experience (proof required)

Phone-based dispute experience is required. You must have personally called bureaus and creditors to file disputes. This is not a letter-only role.

Proficient in Credit Repair Cloud, DisputeFox, or equivalent

Strong working knowledge of FCRA, FDCPA, and CROA

Excellent written and spoken US English

Confident, professional phone voice

Stable high-speed internet (25 Mbps minimum) with backup connection or power

Quiet workspace and a working headset

Independent, detail-oriented, coachable





What We Offer



Competitive weekly pay based on experience

Performance bonuses

Paid US holidays

Clear path to team lead for top performers

Direct mentorship from senior leadership

Stable role inside an established US company





How to Apply

To prove you read this post, start your reply with the word "FUNDING". Applications that do not start with this word will be deleted.

Then include:



Your resume

A specific example of a dispute you filed by phone (which bureau or creditor, what happened, what was the outcome)

The credit repair software you have used

Internet speed test screenshot

A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself in English

Your expected weekly rate



We move fast. Strong applicants will hear from us within 5 business days.

title: FACEBOOK - META MEDIA BUYER – MED SPA, LASIK, IVF & PLASTIC SURGERY
description:
META MEDIA BUYER – MED SPA, LASIK, IVF & PLASTIC SURGERY SPECIALIST (FULL TIME)

SALARY: $1,500–2,000 USD/month (based on experience + substantial Performance-based Bonuses)

US (PST or EST) time zone overlap (minimum 4 hours); Time Doctor is Required



ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing AI appointment generation agency serving high-value healthcare and aesthetics clients, including med spas, LASIK clinics, IVF centres, and plastic surgery practices. We generate premium appointments that convert into paying clients, and we’re looking for a Media Buyer who already has proven experience in these industries.



Direct experience running paid campaigns for med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery, a STRONG ADVANTAGE



WHAT YOU’LL MANAGE

•	Large monthly ad budgets across 15+ high-value client accounts in aesthetics and healthcare.

•	B2B campaigns: surgery consultations, IVF bookings, clinic demos.

•	B2C campaigns: med spa treatments, LASIK bookings, IVF discovery calls, plastic surgery consultations.

•	Full campaign lifecycle: strategy, setup, scale, optimisation.

•	Advanced audience segmentation and lookalike modelling.

•	CRM and marketing stack integration: GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Calendly.



CREATIVE RESPONSIBILITIES

•	Develop AI-driven content with heygen, Sora, ElevenLabs, nano banana pro.

•	Design and motion graphics using Canva Pro, Premiere Pro, CapCut.

•	Test creative angles, hooks, and ad formats specifically for med spa, LASIK, IVF, and plastic surgery clients.

•	Analyse creative performance to improve future campaigns.

•	Maintain brand consistency while scaling creative assets.



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS

•	B2C Appointments: $50–150 CPA (varies by service)

•	B2B Appointments: $100–400 CPA (qualified consultations)

•	Minimum 2.5% CTR across campaigns

•	Maintain 60%+ landing page conversion rate

•	70%+ show rate for booked appointments

•	Weekly performance analysis with actionable optimisation insights



EXPERIENCE REQUIREMENTS

•	2+ years
/Meta Ads experience, with direct experience in med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery.

•	Portfolio demonstrating ad spend managed and appointment generation results.

•	Proven ability to scale campaigns 3x+ while maintaining cost targets.

•	Experience running both B2B and B2C appointment campaigns.

•	Multiple industry experience preferred.



WHAT TO PROVE IN YOUR APPLICATION

•	Screenshots of ad account dashboards showing spend and performance.

•	Specific cost per appointment improvements achieved (with numbers).

•	Biggest campaign rescue/turnaround story.

•	Experience managing large monthly ad budgets in healthcare or aesthetics.



TRAINING AND GROWTH PATH

•	First 30 days: Onboarding with our proven appointment generation frameworks.

•	Month 2–3: Full account ownership and performance accountability.

•	Ongoing: Advanced appointment generation strategies, AI creative training, and mentorship.

•	Performance bonuses tied to client retention and appointment quality.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

•	Advanced
 Business Manager and Ads Manager skills

•	Conversion tracking setup and optimisation

•	CRM integration experience (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Calendly)

•	Landing page optimisation knowledge

•	Video editing software familiarity (CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro)



PERSONALITY TRAITS WE’RE SEEKING

•	Obsessed with appointment quality and show rates, not just volume

•	Creative problem solver who thinks beyond templates

•	Takes ownership of results and client success

•	Proactive communication about performance trends

•	Organised, trustworthy, and able to deliver in a timely manner

•	Understands that compensation is based on a 40-hour work week

•	Understands that the use of Time Doctor is a productivity measure, not a matter of trust.



RED FLAGS (DON’T APPLY IF)

•	You are not available for full-time 40-hour work week

•	You cannot provide specific metrics from previous roles

•	You cannot commit to US (PST or EST) time zone overlap



COMPENSATION DETAILS

•	Base: $1,500–2,000/month depending on experience

•	Performance bonuses: $200–500/month for hitting appointment targets

•	Annual raises: 15–25% for top performers

•	Paid vacation and sick leave eligibility after 3 months

•	13th Month Salary eligibility after 3 months

•	Access to premium software, AI tools, live masterminds & paid communities



HOW TO APPLY

•	Start your message with: "Yes, I have read the job ad and I understand it fully"

•	Latest resume/CV with work history up to 2026



SELECTION PROCESS

1.	Application review (2–3 days)

2.	Skills assessment test (appointment generation scenarios)

3.	Video interview with performance deep-dive

4.	1-week paid trial project with real client account/campaign

5.	Final decision and onboarding



Please do not apply if you are not comfortable with Time Doctor as this is a non-negotiable requirement of the role. Thanks and we look forward to hearing from you!

ANALYTICAL REQUIREMENTS:

cost per appointment (qualified calls)

EXPERIENCE REQUIREMENTS (MANDATORY):

 Ads Manager experience

WHAT YOU MUST PROVE IN APPLICATION:

TRAINING AND GROWTH PATH:

TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS:

 Business Manager and Ads Manager proficiency

PERSONALITY TRAITS WE'RE SEEKING:

RED FLAGS (Don't Apply If):

mber



COMPENSATION DETAILS:

/month based on experience

/month based on appointment targets

SELECTION PROCESS:

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

Pay

• $4-5/hour

What we’re looking for

title: Documentary Video Editor — Music & Film YouTube Channel
description:
I'm launching a YouTube channel publishing long-form documentaries on subjects in the music, internet culture and film world — deep dives, video essays, and historical features in the spirit of Volksgeist, Patrick (CC), and Fern.



I write the scripts and record the voiceover. I'm looking for an editor who can take it from there and deliver finished documentaries from rough script + VO to publish-ready cut.



What you'll do

• Cut long-form video essays / documentaries (typically 10–30 min)

• Source archival footage, B-roll, photos, and film clips that fit each script

• Build motion graphics, title cards, lower thirds, and animated visualizations in After Effects

• Pace visuals tightly to the narration — cuts, on-screen text, music hits

• Color and audio polish



You're a fit if you have

• A reel or 2–3 examples of documentary / video-essay editing

• Strong After Effects motion graphics (non-negotiable)

• Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve fluency

• A real eye for typography, pacing, and cinematic feel

• Skill at digging up archival footage and photos

• Familiarity with the reference channels above (or channels in that lane)



Bonus

• Interest in music history, film history, or pop culture

• Sound design / mixing chops

• Long-form YouTube experience (not just commercial or short-form)



This is an ongoing relationship rather than one-off gigs — a regular release cadence with one editor I trust. Open to per-video flat rates or hourly.



When you apply, please send a reel and a quick note on which of the reference channels resonates most with you and why.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Executive Assistant — Good & Tasteful Agency



About Us

Good & Tasteful is a social media marketing and content agency specializing in the restaurant industry. We work with restaurant clients across the Atlanta area to create high-quality video and photo content, run paid ad campaigns, and build their brand presence online. We move fast, we care about quality, and we're growing.



Role Overview

We're looking for a highly organized, proactive Executive Assistant to support our agency owner and help keep our client projects running smoothly every month. This is not a traditional assistant role — you'll be the operational backbone of the agency, making sure nothing falls through the cracks so our owner can stay focused on strategy and growth.



What You'll Do



Project Management

- Manage monthly content projects for each restaurant client from start to finish

- Track deliverables, deadlines, and project status across all active clients

- Organize and maintain our project management system (Notion) so everything is always up to date

- Make sure shoots, edits, and approvals stay on schedule every month



Client Communication

- Send videos and photos to clients for review and approval

- Follow up with clients on feedback and keep approvals moving efficiently

- Handle professional written communication with clients on behalf of the agency



Team Coordination

- Communicate tasks and deadlines to editors and videographers

- Coordinate file handoffs between the video team and editing team via 

- Keep the team informed so everyone knows what's due and when



Administrative Support

- Handle day-to-day administrative tasks to take the load off the agency owner

- Assist with organizing documents, SOPs, reports, and internal files

- Help prepare client-facing materials and monthly deliverable packages

- Support onboarding of new clients by organizing intake information and setting up project folders



What We're Looking For

- Strong organizational skills — you thrive on structure and keeping things in order

- Excellent written communication — you can represent the agency professionally with clients

- Experience with project management tools (Notion, Trello, Asana, or similar)

- Ability to manage multiple clients and deadlines simultaneously without dropping the ball

- Self-starter who doesn't need to be micromanaged

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced creative environment

- Experience in a marketing, media, or creative agency is a plus

- Familiarity with tools like 
, Slack, or Meta Business Suite is a bonus



What to Expect

- Remote position

- You'll be working closely with the agency owner, editors, and videographers

- Fast-paced environment — restaurant clients have monthly content cycles and things move quickly

- Room to grow as the agency scales



If you're someone who loves keeping things organized, communicates clearly, and wants to be a key part of a growing creative agency — we want to hear from you.

?

?

?

?

?

?

title: HVAC Admin & Operations Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a reliable HVAC Operations Coordinator to take ownership of key back-office and coordination tasks that currently sit with busy managers. This role exists to improve the flow of communication between the office and site teams, keep approvals and paperwork moving, and ensure projects stay organized.





Key Responsibilities



Create and manage purchase orders (POs) and maintain procurement tracking.

Coordinate invoice processing and support approvals (including chasing missing information and sign-offs).

Assist with subcontractor administration, including tracking and assessing progress claims and required documentation.

Maintain and distribute updated drawings (version control, drawing registers, ensuring the right people have the latest set).

Coordinate site deliveries and follow up on proof of delivery / delivery dockets; chase site team confirmations and approvals.

Submit required deliverables to clients and keep document packs organised.

Support the Design Manager and Construction Managers with scheduling, follow-ups, and internal coordination.

Act as the “communication bridge” between office, site, and subcontractors to prevent delays and missed approvals.





Skills & Qualifications



With experience in HVAC industry (Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning)

Experience in construction administration / project admin / operations coordination (residential or commercial).

Strong competence with documentation, workflow tracking, and follow-ups (high attention to detail).

Comfortable handling POs, invoices, subcontractor paperwork, and document registers.

Clear written communication and confidence chasing approvals professionally (office + site environments).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage multiple moving tasks without dropping details.

Proficiency with common tools (e.g., Google Workspace/Microsoft Office, spreadsheets,
, and basic project trackers).





Ideal Candidate



Comfortable working with construction teams and can communicate clearly with both office staff and site managers.

Strong follow-through: able to close loops on approvals, dockets, invoices, and paperwork.

Systematic and process-minded (brings structure, improves how info flows, keeps records clean).

Interested in a long-term role where they become a dependable part of client's operations engine.





Work Setup: Remote



Work Schedule: Day Shift (AU)

title: Video Editor for Bodycam Youtube Channel
description:
I am looking for a video editor for a YouTube project!



Reference video: 

I want editing in a similar high-retention bodycam storytelling style.



Project description:

I’m building a YouTube channel focused on real police bodycam footage. I need an editor who can turn raw footage/reuse footage into engaging, fast-paced videos that highlight conflict, escalation, and key 
nts.



Videos will focus on real-life encounters involving entitled individuals, arrests, public i
, and intense interactions.



Project details:



3 videos per week (can increase)



15–25 minute videos



Raw footage provided (you structure the story)



Full edit: pacing, cuts, zooms, subtitles, light sound design



Strong hook in the first 5–10 seconds



Ready-to-upload final delivery



Trello workflow (Guided Given)



Communication via WhatsApp/Email



Budget: $20 per video



Long-term position



Guidelines:



Fast-paced, retention-focused editing



Emphasize conflict and escalation



Clean zooms, cuts, and subtitles for clarity



No slow intros — hook immediately



Maintain viewer engagement throughout



Simple, clean, modern style



24–48h turnaround



Send your MOST RELEVANT work only.



Write “BODYCAM” in your message or you’ll be ignored.



Serious long-term opportunity with consistent work.

title: Resource Specialist (Psychiatric Rehab)  w/ BPO experience

This role is critical in coordinating patient resources, managing administrative workflows, and ensuring seamless communication between patients, healthcare providers, and support services. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, adaptable, and experienced in handling high-volume, process-driven environments.

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Lead Generation Cold Caller



We’re looking for a motivated and consistent Lead Generation Cold Caller to join our team. This role is focused on outbound prospecting, initiating conversations with potential clients, and setting up qualified opportunities for our sales team.



Key Responsibilities:



* Make 20–30 outbound cold calls daily to prospective customers

* Introduce our products/services and clearly communicate value

* Identify decision-makers and qualify potential leads

* Schedule meetings or demos for the sales team

* Maintain accurate call notes and update CRM records

* Handle objections professionally and confidently

* Strong communication skills with a confident, professional phone presence

* Fluent English skills (spoken and written) are required

* Ability to engage prospects and build quick rapport

* Self-motivated with a consistent daily work ethic

* Comfortable handling rejection and staying persistent

* Prior cold calling, sales, or customer service experience is a plus



Success in This Role Looks Like:



* Consistently hitting daily call targets

* Generating qualified leads and booked meetings

* Maintaining a positive, professional attitude on every call

title: Financial Analyst

title: Google & Meta Ads Specialist (Remote) – Bar & Restaurant in Grand Cayman
description:
Company:

Sandbar Daiquiri Bar & Grill – a popular waterfront bar and restaurant in Grand Cayman known for live music, events, flame-kissed Caribbean food, and killer daiquiris.



Job Overview:

We are looking for a skilled and results-driven Paid Ads Specialist who is an expert in Google Ads and Meta Ads 
 + Instagram).

You will be responsible for planning, creating, and optimizing all our paid advertising campaigns to promote our weekly events, drink & food specials, and general bar/restaurant happenings. All campaigns will be geo-targeted specifically to the Cayman Islands (locals, expats, and tourists).

This is a remote position open to talented freelancers or full-time specialists.



Key Responsibilities:



Create and manage high-performing Google Ads (Search, Display, and Performance Max) campaigns

Build and optimize
 & Instagram ad campaigns (lead ads, carousel, video reels, stories, etc.)

Design ad creatives that drive real foot traffic (events, specials, happy hour, etc.) we currently have graphic desingers and reel creators on our team so you would be working with them directly for the scale ratios that you need for effective ads across each platform ie. you do not need to specialize in graphic design but a basic understanding will be preffered.

Target the right Cayman Islands audience (age, interests, location-based)

Monitor performance daily, A/B test creatives, and provide clear weekly reports

Work closely with our marketing team to align ads with our event calendar and promotions



Requirements:



Proven expertise in Google Ads (must have strong campaign management experience)

Strong specialization in
 & Instagram Ads (Meta Ads Manager)

Experience running ads for F&B, bars, restaurants, events, or nightlife is a big plus

Ability to create scroll-stopping ad copy and work with simple video/reel assets

Results-oriented – you must be comfortable being measured by ROI and cost per visit/booking

Excellent English communication

Reliable internet and quiet workspace



If you’re a confident Google + Meta ads expert who loves seeing your campaigns drive actual customers through the door, we want to hear from you!

description:
Location : Remote 



Role Overview



We’re looking for a video editor to join as the first tea
mber in a new and growing media division. You’ll begin by focusing on short-form content for Instagram and
, with the opportunity to expand your role as systems, creative direction, and performance evolve. This is a long-term, remote position with clear potential for growth.

This isn’t a basic editing role—we’re seeking someone who takes ownership of their work, values quality, and is motivated to continuously improve their craft.

What You’ll Do

Edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels and

Create engaging, high-retention content with strong hooks and pacing

Add on-screen text, captions, clean cuts, and simple motion graphics

Follow and contribute to the development of a consistent brand style

What We’re Looking For

Ability to apply feedback effectively and improve with each iteration

Solid editing fundamentals and attention to detail

Who You Are

Ambitious and eager to grow beyond basic freelance work

Take pride in producing high-quality content

Interested in contributing to a long-term vision, not just completing tasks

Motivated by increased responsibility and the opportunity to grow with a team

Role Details

Fully remote, ongoing position

Initial focus on short-form content

Opportunity to expand into long-form editing as the media division grows

title: AI UGC Content Creator (Ecommerce | Full time)
description:
About the role:

You will receive visual scripts and use AI to bring them to life as ad creatives. We provide all the brand assets and a full training course to get you up to speed. Your job is not to simply execute instructions — it is to deeply understand the customer we are selling to, the product, and the message we are trying to communicate, and then translate that into content that actually works.



We are open to hiring someone who is still developing their AI skills. What matters most is that you are 100% committed to specializing, improving our current system, and growing into the best in this space.



Tools

- Google Ultra Plan for Google Flow

- HeyGen

- CapCut

- ChatGPT/Claude

- Elevenlabs

- Google Drive

- 



Responsibilities

- Generate 10+ AI-generated videos daily for eccommerce brands

- Edit and finalize 2–5 short-form videos per day

- Study the brand, the customer, and the messaging behind every piece of content you create

- Stay on top of what is happening in the AI space daily and keep us informed on new tools and trends worth paying attention to

- Proactively suggest improvements to our content system — we want someone who takes ownership, not just follows instructions



Skills

- Knows how to create consistent images/videos from AI models.

- Willing to adapt

- Creative mind: You understand what it takes to make viral content. You understand the viral principles and rules of short-form content.

- Hard Working

- Communicative



What we provide:

- All brand assets needed to create content

- A full training course to educate you on our system and products

- Clear visual scripts for every piece of content

- A team that values your growth and input



Pay

The monthly salary range for this role is 21,000 PHP - 27,000 PHP. Monthly wage may vary depending on skills, experience, and performance. If you perform well, you can get bonuses of up to 10% in that month. If you perform really really well, then I'll give you a higher monthly pay.



We are looking for a full-time AI Content Creator to join our e-commerce team. This is a dedicated full-time AI role — not a side skill, not a pivot project. Your entire focus will be creating high-performing ad content (images and videos) using AI tools.



To apply:

Send a message/apply to this job AND fill out this questionaire -> 



We are not just looking at the output. We want to understand how you think.

title: Inventory Manager - Morning Shift (Philippines Time)
description:
We are currently looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Inventory Manager to join our team. If you have strong analytical skills, experience in inventory control, and a passion for maintaining efficient operations, we encourage you to apply.



Required Qualifications:



The ideal candidate should have at least 1–3 years of experience in inventory management, e-commerce operations, Amazon Seller Central, supply chain coordination, or a related role. The candidate must be highly proficient in Excel or Google Sheets, including pivot tables, XLOOKUP/VLOOKUP, SUMIFS, and data cleanup. Experience with Amazon FBA inventory reports, 3PL stock monitoring, replenishment planning, and sales velocity analysis is strongly preferred.



The candidate must be detail-oriented, analytical, and capable of preparing weekly inventory status reports covering out-of-stock risks, excess inventory, reorder recommendations, inbound shipment status, and slow-moving products. They should be able to calculate days of inventory, months of supply, reorder points, and identify stock risks based on sales trends and supplier lead times.



Experience managing inventory across multiple marketplaces or warehouses is a plus.

title: Genealogist / Heir Researcher
description:
We're a U.S.-based real estate investment company specializing in distressed and probate-related properties. We're looking for a skilled genealogist to help us identify and trace rightful heirs on properties tied up in intestate estates, probate, and unclear ownership chains.

What you'll do



Trace heirs for U.S. real estate (primarily North Carolina and Texas, with occasional research in other states)

Build accurate, verifiable family trees from public records, ancestry databases, vital records, obituaries, and court filings

Review probate dockets, court records, and legal filings to determine succession under intestacy laws

Produce clean, well-organized case summaries that document your sources and reasoning

Cross-check title history and ownership records to confirm the chain of heirship

Work closely with our acquisitions team to prioritize leads and turn research around quickly



What we're looking for



2+ years of hands-on genealogy and heir-tracing experience, ideally tied to estates or real estate

Strong working knowledge of U.S. ancestry records (Ancestry, FamilySearch, 
, county vital records, etc.)

Solid understanding of U.S. intestacy laws and how heirship is determined when there's no will — bonus if you've worked specifically in NC or TX

Comfort reading and interpreting probate filings, deeds, and other court documents

Detail-obsessed — you verify before you report, and you cite your sources

Clear written communication; your case summaries should be easy for a non-genealogist to follow



Nice to have



Experience with title searches and chain-of-title research

Familiarity with property comping or basic real estate valuation

Prior work supporting legal, real estate, or investigative teams



The role

 sequences, send tracking to prospects, reorder Uline packaging when low

Run thank-you package mailings and post-order feedback
s

s clients read

title: Looking for a CRO-Obsessed VA to Own Our Landing Pages
description:
We're a direct response creative agency running paid traffic for 8-figure DTC brands in health, beauty, and supplements. We pour millions into traffic — but traffic is only half the equation. The page is where the money is actually made or lost.

Right now, we're shipping killer ads but our landing page game needs a dedicated operator. That's where you come in.

What we're building



TrendScale handles creative + media buying for some of the fastest-scaling brands in DTC. The next phase is owning the post-click experience — advertorials, VSL pages, quiz funnels, PDPs — and turning conversion rate into a real lever we control. The VA who owns this seat gets to touch every brand on the roster and see exactly what's working at scale.

Why this seat is different



You'll see CRO data across multiple 8-figure brands — most CRO people only ever see one funnel. You'll see 6+

Real bonuses tied to lift. If you take a page from 2.1% to 3.4% CVR, you get paid for it

Direct access to strategists, copywriters, and media buyers — you'll know the angle behind every test

Path to grow into a CRO Lead or Funnel Strategist role as we scale this function

No micromanagement. Hit the bar, ship fast, work from wherever



What you'll own



Building and editing landing pages, advertorials, and VSL pages in Shopify, ClickFunnels, Replo, or whatever the brand runs on

Running A/B tests — headlines, hero sections, CTAs, social proof placement, checkout flow

Pulling weekly CRO reports per brand: CVR, AOV, scroll depth, drop-off points, mobile vs desktop

Setting up tracking properly — pixels, GA4 events, heatmaps (Hotjar/Microsoft Clarity), funnel analytics

Implementing copy and design changes from strategists fast — turnaround in hours, not days

QA on every page: mobile rendering, page speed, broken links, checkout breakage. Nothing ships broken

Coordinating with developers when something needs to go beyond no-code



Who I'm looking for



1+ years actually doing CRO on DTC stores — not just "I've used Shopify"

Fluent in at least 2 of: Shopify, Replo, ClickFunnels, Funnelish, GemPages, Unbounce

You understand DR copy structure — Schwartz awareness levels, problem/agitation/solution, why a hero section converts or doesn't. You don't need to write the copy, but you need to understand what you're implementing

Comfortable with GA4, Hotjar/Clarity, and basic analytics. You can pull a number and know what it means

AI-fluent — you use Claude or ChatGPT daily to move 3x faster on copy iterations, brief writing, and code snippets

Detail freak. A misaligned button or a broken mobile checkout drives you nuts

Fast Slack/email responses. We move quick



Nice-to-haves



Basic HTML/CSS — enough to fix a layout without calling a dev

Klaviyo flows, Gorgias, or post-purchase upsell apps (AfterSell, ReConvert)

Prior agency or supplement/health vertical experience



Don't apply if



You think CRO means "change the button color"

You need a full Figma file to build a page

You ghost on deadlines or take a day to reply

This is your fifth side gig



How to apply

Send me a Loom (under 4 min) covering:



One landing page or funnel you've worked on — walk me through what you tested and the result

How you actually use AI in your workflow (specific tools, specific outputs)

Your rate and weekly capacity



Plus links to 2–3 pages you've built or optimized. No résumé needed.

Strong Looms get a paid test task — building or optimizing a real page on one of our brands.

— Aymen, 
 Media

title: AI Video Editor — E-Commerce Direct Response Ads
description:
TrendScale Media | Remote | 15 concepts/week | Base + winning-ad bonuses



We run paid creative for some of the fastest-scaling 8-figure brands in health, beauty, and supplements. Our ads are the reason these brands profitably spend six figures a day on Meta and TikTok. Creative is the lever that decides whether a brand wins or dies in this space — and we need another editor who actually gets that.



This isn't a "cut to the beat, add a transition" job. The editors who win here understand why a hook works at second 2 vs second 5, why one VO read converts and another flops, and how to keep a 30-second ad from leaking attention at every cut.

What we're building



TrendScale's clients are scaling spend month over month because the creative prints. We're testing 40+ concepts a week across the roster, and the bottleneck right now is volume + quality of edits. The editors who close feedback loops fast and ship winners get more reps, more bonus, and a real shot at growing into a Creative Strategist seat.

Why you'd actually want this gig



You'll be working directly with strategists, media buyers, and a founder who lives and breathes direct response — not someone who just wants it to "look nice"

Real bonuses on winning ads. Not a $50 gift card — meaningful upside when your concept scales

You'll see the spend data on your edits. You'll know exactly what hit, what flopped, and why. Most editors never get this feedback loop

Career path is real. Editors who think like marketers grow into Creative Strategist roles here

No micromanagement. Hit the bar, hit the deadline, work from wherever



What you'll do



Cut 15 ad concepts/week across multiple health & supplement brands

Lead with the hook — your job is to stop the scroll in 1.5 seconds, then keep them watching

Mix UGC, AI b-roll, motion, screen recordings, and stock to build punchy DR ads

When something hits, ship 5 variants of it the same day

Close feedback loops in hours, not days



Who I'm looking for



You've cut DTC ads before — health, supplements, or beauty is a big plus

1,000+ hours doomscrolling TikTok and IG. You spot the format before the trend reports do

Pacing and storytelling > everything. If your reel leads with transitions and effects, this isn't your role

Fluent with AI tools — Runway, Kling, ElevenLabs, Midjourney for hooks, b-roll, fake UGC. "I've used ChatGPT" doesn't count

You can read a script and feel the emphasis, the cuts, the vibe — English nuance matters here

You take blunt feedback well. We move fast and we're direct



Don't apply if



You need someone to hold your hand through every brief

You judge your work by how cool it looks instead of whether it converts

You ghost on deadlines or take a day to reply on Slack

This is your fifth side gig



How to apply

Send me a Loom (under 4 min) covering:



One DTC ad you edited that performed — walk me through your thinking on the hook and first 5 seconds

How you actually use AI in your workflow (specific tools, specific outputs)

Your rate and weekly capacity



Plus your reel/portfolio link. No résumé needed.

Strong Looms get a paid test edit. Crush that and you're in.

— Aymen, 
 Media

title: Product Designer - Toys, Merch & Retail Products
description:
About  the Role



We’re looking for a highly creative Product Designer to develop exciting products for our brands, YouTube creators, and retail stores. This role is all about turning fun ideas into real products customers love. 



You’ll create products for creator brands like Ameerah Navalua, Paul Paghent, Jeddah Navalua, and Baby Ares, as well as retail brands like Slimeatory.



WHAT YOU'LL DESIGN

You’ll work on a wide range of products, including:

• Toy lines (kids toys, DIY kits, novelty items)

• Plushies & talking toys

• Action figures & blind box collectibles

• Keychains & accessories (bracelets, etc.)

• Creator merchandise

• Clothing collections

• Cups, tumblers & bottles

• School supplies (pens, notebooks, backpacks)

• Kids books & coloring books

• Souvenirs for retail stores

• Seasonal & limited-edition drops

• Gift sets

• Packaging & retail display boxes

• Viral trend-based products



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Develop original product ideas from concept to final design

• Sketch, illustrate, and create product concepts

• Design packaging and retail display concepts

• Research trends in toys, fashion, and creator merchandise

• Collaborate with manufacturers to bring products to life

• Create product collections based on seasons, trends, and campaigns

• Align designs with each creator’s personality and brand

• Ensure all products are fun, high-quality, and market-ready

• Design products optimized for both online and in-store sales



REQUIRED SKILLS

• Strong graphic design skills

• Experience in product design

• Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, or similar tools

• Strong creative thinking and idea generation

• Ability to spot trends and viral opportunities

• Understanding of kids products and toy market

• Packaging design experience

• Ability to work fast and produce multiple concepts



BONUS SKILLS 

• Experience designing for influencers or creators

• Toy prototyping experience

• 3D modeling skills

• Apparel design

• Book layout design

• Retail display design

• Strong awareness of social media trends



EXAMPLE PROJECTS

• Baby Ares talking plush that says funny phrases 

• Slimeatory souvenir mystery box 

• Ameerah slime-themed backpack line 

• Paul construction toy set 

• Jeddah lifestyle tumbler collection

• Glow-in-the-dark keychains 

• Surprise blind box mini figures 

• Slime scented pens & pencils 

• Kids storybooks featuring Baby Ares adventures



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

• Creative and highly imaginative

• Deep understanding of internet and pop culture

• Passion for designing products for kids and families

• Able to turn ideas into real, sellable products quickly

• Detail-oriented with a strong sense of branding and aesthetics



IDEAL PERSON

• Someone who understands internet culture, knows what kids and families love, and can turn fun ideas into products people want to buy immediately.

title: Shopify Web Developer & Product Specialist
description:
Job Title: Shopify Webmaster (Developer & Designer) 

HouseSensationsArt is a leading US-based provider of custo
tal fabrication, specializing in personalized art, business signs, and home decor. We are looking for a highly skilled Shopify Developer & SEO Specialist who can handle the full lifecycle of an e-commerce store—from initial design and new builds to backend technical maintenance.



Role Overview

This is a hybrid role requiring a mix of technical development, graphic design, and SEO strategy. You will be responsible for the "look and feel" of the site as well as the "under the hood" performance. You will work remotely with our established Philippines-based design team.



Key Responsibilities

Full Website Builds: Taking a store from concept to launch, including theme selection, customization, and layout architecture.



Design & Banners: Creating and implementing high-converting hero banners, promotional graphics, and UI/UX design elements that match our brand aesthetic.



Shopify Development: Custom Liquid coding, app installations, API integrations, and troubleshooting.



Product Maintenance: Managing a large catalog of custom products, including variations, descriptions, and metadata.



SEO Management: Executing On-page/Off-page SEO, managing Semrush critical updates, and building high-quality backlinks.



Backend & Maintenance: Ensuring site speed optimization, security patches, and regular backups.



Contract Details

Hours: 20 to 30 hours per week (based on workload).

Schedule: 9 PM – 5 AM PHP time Sunday to Thursday PHP days. 

Location: Remote – Philippines-based applicants only.

Payment: Paid via Wise.

Requirements: Must sign an NDA, use Timeproof for tracking, and submit daily timesheets.



How to Apply

Please
 
 with the following:

Link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile (Verified profiles only).

Portfolio: Must show previous Shopify builds and graphic design/banner work.

Resume: Highlighting Shopify and SEO experience.

A Loom video with a brief detail about yourself and what makes you the best fit.

Availability: When can you start?

Acknowledgement: Confirm you have read and agree to the  salary, work hours, NDA, time-tracking, and attendance 

Include the link to the job you are applying for 





For consideration, please follow the full instructions. Applications that do not follow the instructions will not be considered.

title: Scheduler (Remote) | High-Performance Operations Role
description:
Scheduler (Remote) | High-Performance Operations Role



We’re looking for a high-performance Scheduler to take control of the daily operations for Plumbing Bros Corporate (Perth).

This is not a basic admin role. You’ll be responsible for coordinating a high volume of jobs, managing technician schedules, and ensuring smooth, efficient service delivery across the business. If you thrive in fast-paced environments and take pride in running a tight operation, this role is for you.



About the Role



You are the command centre of the business.

Your ability to plan, prioritise, and execute will directly impact job completion, team performance, and customer satisfaction.

You’ll be working closely with our operations team, technicians, and clients to ensure every day runs efficiently and no job slips through the cracks.



Key Responsibilities



* Schedule and dispatch technicians across daily job runs

* Manage job flow to maximise productivity and minimise downtime

* Monitor job progress and adjust schedules in real time

* Communicate clearly with technicians, clients, and the internal team

* Ensure all jobs are accurately updated and completed in the system

* Identify issues or inefficiencies and take ownership to resolve them

* Maintain a high level of organisation, urgency, and follow-through



Working Hours

* Monday to Friday, 8:00 am – 5:00 pm (Perth time)

* 1-hour lunch break

* Optional paid overtime available based on workload



What We’re Looking For



You’ll thrive in this role if you:



* Have proven experience in scheduling or dispatch (essential)

* Can manage a high volume of jobs without losing control or accuracy

* Think ahead and stay 2–3 steps in front

* Perform well under pressure and maintain high standards

* Take full ownership of outcomes, not just tasks

* Communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally

* Are highly organised with strong attention to detail

* Experience Requirements

* Scheduling or dispatch experience is essential

* Experience in a trades or service-based business is highly preferred

* Experience with Ascora is highly advantageous

* Ability to quickly learn and operate systems with accuracy



Why Join Us



* Be part of a growing national brand with strong systems and structure

* Work in a high-performance team environment

* Play a critical role in daily operations and business performance

* Clear expectations, accountability, and ownership in your role



Final Note



This is a high-responsibility role managing real-time operations.

It requires focus, urgency, and strong decision-making under pressure.

If you take pride in running a tight schedule and keeping everything on track, we want to hear from you.

title: Appointment Setter/Business Opportunity Representative
description:
Appointment Setter, Dale Carnegie Australia, with a Path Into Sales



Do you love speaking with people and opening doors for real business conversations? Are you someone who wants to go further than just booking calls?



We are looking for a confident, energetic Appointment Setter who is comfortable making new relationship calls, can build rapport from scratch, and has the ambition to grow into a sales career over time. This is not a script-reading role. We want someone who thinks on their feet, asks smart questions, and genuinely engages with the people they speak with.

You report directly to the Managing Director. Your contribution is seen, your growth is guided, and your potential is taken seriously.



What you will be doing:

- Making outbound new relationship calls to prospective clients, building rapport from the first conversation

- Following up warm leads from workshops, events, and campaigns as you develop

- Booking qualified appointments for our Senior Sales Consultants

- Representing Dale Carnegie with confidence and professionalism on every call

- Keeping our CRM accurate and the pipeline moving



What we are looking for:

- Comfortable making new relationship calls and starting conversations with strangers

- A confident phone manner and the ability to lead a real conversation

- Someone who asks questions, listens, and wants to understand the person on the other end

- Resilience, persistence, and a positive attitude, because not every call goes your way

- Genuine ambition to build a career in sales, not just fill a role

- Openness to coaching, development, and honest feedback



What you will get:

- Generous bonus structure tied to appointments booked

- Direct mentorship from the Managing Director

- Training and development in Dale Carnegie methodology

- A clear pathway into sales for the right person

- A team that invests in people for the long term. We have Virtual Staff who have been with us more than five years.



To apply, send a short video telling us why you want this role, why Dale Carnegie, and why we should invest in you for the long term.



We are not looking for the loudest application. We are looking for the right one.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Location : Remote

Job Summary



We’re looking for a dependable, customer-oriented Customer Service Representative to join our expanding exterior construction team. This remote, long-term role is well-suited for someone who enjoys working with homeowners, managing both inbound and outbound communication, and helping deliver a seamless experience from initial contact through project completion. The ideal candidate is detail-focused, self-motivated, and comfortable following established workflows.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

Professionally handle incoming customer calls and inquiries



Conduct outbound follow-up calls using provided contact lists



Coordinate, schedule, and confirm appointments for inspections and services



Accurately maintain and update customer records in internal systems



Address routine customer concerns and escalate more complex issues as needed



Facilitate clear, consistent communication between customers and internal teams



Document call details, appointments, and service updates thoroughly

 

Qualifications

 

Availability Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST



Strong command of written and spoken English



Previous experience in customer service or call handling



Excellent communication, organizational, and data entry skills



Stable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

 

Compensation



We offer competitive pay based on experience, along with opportunities for long-term growth and advancement.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
I am looking for a full-time Executive Assistant who can work directly alongside me across several companies in wellness, tech, trading, and media. I move fast, and I need someone who can move with me. Someone who is organized, dependable, communicates well, and can help keep all of our systems and conversations flowing.



There is a 90 day training process to verify each person has the credentials, skills that are needed to succeed in this role. once 90 days are up, a raise will be provided given skill is where we need it. Bonuses will also be offered within employment.



Must be strong communicators who write clearly, move fast, stay organized and can manage multiple conversations and tasks at once. They should already know or be ready to learn GHL, SMM, Content creation (capcut), social media messaging, Google Workspace, Skool, ManyChat, and light admin tools so they can confidently support all daily systems, links, DMs, and backend operations.



Send info to

title: Medical VA– Remote (Direct Hire | Physical Therapy Clinic – Personal Injury Cases)
description:

100% Remote

Direct hire with our clinic (no agency involved)



Key Responsibilities

- Verify and cross-check patient information, treatment documentation, and billing data

-Ensure all documentation is complete, accurate, and compliant

-Handle inbound and outbound calls related to billing and patient coordination

-Adapt to changing workflows and clinic protocols

-Assist with administrative tasks as needed

- Review patient charts and identify discrepancies or missing information



What We’re Looking For

-Strong attention to detail with the ability to double-check work

-Adaptable and open to learning new processes

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills

-Ability to work independently and manage tasks efficiently



Requirements

-Own computer/laptop and reliable internet connection

-Background in healthcare (PT/Physiotherapy preferred)

-Familiarity with medical terminology used in clinical settings and SOAP Charts/Notes 

-HIPAA certification is a plus



Additional Plus If

-Graduate of an Allied Health or Medical-related course

-Experience as a Medical Virtual Assistant (VA) in a clinical setting

-Proficiency in Slack, Microsoft Office, Adobe, and Dropbox

-Experience with Jane EMR is a plus

-Has a background with SOAP notes



Work Schedule

-Night shift / graveyard shift

- 38–40 hours per week



Why Join Us?

-Direct hire 

-Fully remote work setup

-Opportunity to grow within a fast-paced healthcare team



How to Apply?



Send your application to 
 with:



Your updated resume

A short introduction about your medical billing experience or any related experience 

(Optional) A short intro video
