title: Architectural Estimator / Takeoff Specialist – Project-Based | PST Hours | $7–$9/hr
description:
Architectural Estimator / Takeoff Specialist – Project-Based | PST Hours | $7–$9/hr

Location: Remote, Philippines-based preferred

Schedule: Project-based to start | Approximately 10 hours/week

Work Hours: Must be available during U.S. Pacific Time (PST) as needed

Compensation: $7 – $9 USD/hour based on experience

Potential: May grow into more hours depending on workload and performance

Type: Project-Based | Long-Term Potential



About the Role



We are looking for an experienced Architectural Estimator / Takeoff Specialist to help review architectural plans, complete quantity takeoffs, and prepare accurate cost estimates for construction projects.



This role is ideal for someone who is highly detail-oriented, experienced in reading construction drawings, and comfortable working with digital takeoff tools such as Bluebeam, PlanSwift, STACK, On-Screen Takeoff, or similar software.



This will start as a project-based role at around 10 hours per week, with the opportunity to grow into more hours as the working relationship develops. The candidate must be available to communicate and collaborate during PST business hours when needed.



What You’ll Do



Drawing Review & Takeoffs

Review architectural plans, specifications, addenda, and bid documents

Perform detailed quantity takeoffs from architectural and construction drawings

Identify missing details, scope gaps, conflicts, and possible RFI items

Organize takeoff files with clear notes, markups, and version control



Estimating & Pricing Support

Prepare labor, material, and equipment cost estimates based on takeoff quantities

Assist in comparing subcontractor and vendor quotes

Apply waste factors, productivity assumptions, and markups as needed

Help maintain unit cost data and historical pricing information



Bid & Proposal Support

Help prepare bid summaries, scope notes, assumptions, qualifications, and exclusions

Support proposal preparation for client review

Assist with post-bid scope review or value engineering when needed



CAD / Design Support – Preferred, Not Required

Create simple CAD drawings, markups, sketches, or redlines when needed

Support basic design coordination or drawing clarification

Assist with simple plan revisions if experienced in AutoCAD, Revit, or similar tools



Required Experience

At least 3 years of construction estimating or takeoff experience

Strong ability to read and interpret:

Architectural drawings

Structural drawings

Specifications

Construction documents

Experience using digital takeoff software such as:

Bluebeam Revu

PlanSwift

STACK

On-Screen Takeoff

Or similar platforms

Strong Excel skills for estimating and quantity tracking

Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

Organized and able to manage multiple deadlines

Clear written communication

Must be available to work or communicate during PST hours as needed



Tools & Software



Experience with any of the following is preferred:



Bluebeam Revu

PlanSwift

STACK

On-Screen Takeoff

Microsoft Excel

AutoCAD

Revit

Procore

Autodesk Construction Cloud



To Apply, Please submit the following:



A viewable link to your updated resume

A short paragraph describing your experience with:

Construction estimating

Quantity takeoffs

Architectural drawings

Takeoff software you have used

Examples of past takeoff or estimating work, if available

Redacted samples are acceptable

Screenshots or sample quantity summaries are acceptable



Subject Line: Architectural Estimator – [Your Full Name]

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
We are seeking a Senior Graphic Designer to join our team. In this role, you will play a crucial role in creating visually appealing and impactful designs across multiple mediums, including digital, video and print. Your creativity and expertise will contribute to enhancing client brand identities, marketing materials, and overall visual communication.



Responsibilities

- Develop and design creative graphics and video content aligned with client objectives and brand guidelines.

- Create visual concepts, graphics, and layouts for digital and print media (including newsletters and UX design).

- Collaborate with clients and internal tea
mbers to understand design requirements and deliver compelling visual solutions.

- Ensure all designs are visually appealing, on-brand, and effectively communicate the intended message.

- Stay up to date with design trends, tools, and best practices to ensure high-quality and innovative output.

- Provide revisions and refinements based on client feedback to achieve desired results.



Requirements

- Proven experience as a Senior Graphic Designer or in a similar role, supported by a strong portfolio of successful design projects.

- Mandatory experience with the following tools is a must: Figma (Website UX Deisgn), Capcut, Adobe Suite platforms (Graphic Design).

- Experience with video editing, motion graphics and illustration is a plus.

- Experience across the full Adobe Suite is required.

- Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, layout, and visual composition.

- Excellent problem-solving skills with strong attention to detail.

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment with minimal supervision.



Location

- Remote position - only candidates based in the Philippines will be considered.



Schedule

- Part-time or Full-time



Benefits

- Competitive compensation based on experience and project scope.

- Opportunity to work with diverse clients and industries.

- Professional growth and development within a creative agency environment.

- Flexible work schedule and fully remote setup.



How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to send a message with their resume and portfolio (mandatory) showcasing relevant and successful design projects. Please highlight your experience with CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite and your overall approach to effective graphic design.



Depending on the interview we may also share a test project which you can submit with your own watermark.



**Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. NO VA to apply (you will be automatically deleted)**

title: UI/UX Designer
description:
UI/UX Designer with Generalist Skills (EST Hours, Ongoing Work)



We're looking for a talented UI/UX Designer who can also wear a generalist hat when needed. Your core strength should be designing clean, user-friendly websites and app interfaces, but you're equally comfortable putting together a polished Canva deck or creating marketing graphics when the project calls for it. If you have experience working on luxury or premium brands, that's a big plus.



What You'll Do

• Design websites, landing pages, and app interfaces in Figma (primary focus)

• Create wireframes, mockups, prototypes, and complete UI systems

• Conduct user research and testing to validate design decisions

• Produce branded documents, presentations, and proposals in Canva

• Create graphics for social media, ads, and marketing materials as needed

• Collaborate closely with developers to ensure designs are implemented correctly

• Maintain visual consistency across all deliverables



What We're Looking For

• 2+ years of dedicated UI/UX design experience (this is the core of the role)

• Strong portfolio showcasing web and app design work

• Proficiency in Figma with strong Auto Layout skills (required)

• Mention your favorite movie or favorite sport or favorite video game when applying (required)

• Solid understanding of user-centered design principles, modern UX patterns, and best practices

• Ability to create wireframes, mockups, interactive prototypes, and scalable UI systems

• Canva skills for docs, decks, and marketing materials

• Strong foundation in layout, typography, color, and visual hierarchy

• Comfortable using AI-powered design tools to work faster and smarter

• Excellent attention to detail and a sharp eye for polish

• Strong English communication skills

• Availability to work during EST business hours (required)

• Self-starter who can work independently and hit deadlines



Nice to Have

• Experience designing for luxury, premium, or high-end brands

• Experience with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)

• Motion design or micro-interaction skills

• Experience designing for SaaS, e-commerce, or agency clients

• Brand identity or logo design experience



This is a long-term freelance role with consistent work for the right candidate.

title: PPC Strategist (Meta & Google) – Luxury Focus
description:
We are seeking a performance-driven PPC Strategist to lead, optimize, and scale paid media campaigns across Meta and Google platforms for a luxury-focused client account. This is a highly strategic, hands-on role with full ownership of campaign performance and growth.



Key Responsibilities:

• Own and execute paid media strategy across Meta 
, Instagram) and Google Ads

• Conduct in-depth keyword research and continuously refine campaign structure for efficiency and scale

• Set up, manage, and QA campaigns, audiences, tracking, and pixel implementation

• Monitor performance daily and implement data-driven optimizations

• Deliver clear, insight-driven weekly and monthly reports with actionable recommendations

• Proactively adjust budgets, targeting, creative, and messaging to maximize performance

• Partner with creative teams to ideate, request, and test new assets

• Stay ahead of platform updates, industry trends, and emerging opportunities



Qualifications:

• Proven track record managing high-budget campaigns across Meta and Google

• Strong expertise in campaign structure, keyword strategy, and optimization

• Deep understanding of audience targeting, attribution models, and conversion tracking

• Advanced analytical and reporting skills (Google Analytics, Looker Studio, or similar)

• Ability to translate performance data into strategic direction

• Detail-oriented with strong QA discipline

• Self-sufficient and reliable in managing deadlines and deliverables

• Strong written and verbal communication skills in English



Nice to Have:

• Experience working with luxury or high-end eCommerce brands

• Familiarity with Shopify ecosystems

• Exposure to additional paid media channels

• Strong interest in or adoption of AI tools for performance marketing



Additional Information:

• Principals only. No agencies or outsourcing firms

• Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

title: Social Media Content + Creative VA
description:
We are a US-based marketing agency that works with luxury brands, and we are looking for a Social Media Content + Creative Virtual Assistant to join our growing team.



This role focuses on creating and managing social media content, including graphics, short-form videos, and AI-assisted creative assets. You will work closely with our marketing team to help maintain and grow our clients’ social media presence through high-quality visual content and consistent engagement.



Responsibilities



Social Media Management:

• Schedule and publish posts across social media platforms (Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.)

• Monitor and respond to comments and direct messages

• Ensure posts follow the content calendar and brand guidelines



Creative Content Production:

• Design and edit graphics for social media posts and paid ads

• Edit short-form videos for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Optimize visuals for different social media platforms



AI-Assisted Content Creation:

• Use AI tools to generate images and short videos

• Edit and refine AI-generated visuals to ensure brand quality

• Write prompts and experiment with AI tools to create creative assets



Image and Video Editing:

• Edit and enhance photos for social media and marketing campaigns

• Produce short promotional clips and looping videos

• Ensure visual consistency across all client accounts



Content Support:

• Assist with preparing content for social media campaigns

• Organize creative assets and maintain content libraries

• Support the marketing team with visual content needs



Tools You Will Use



• Canva

• CapCut

• Adobe Express

• Adobe Photoshop

• Adobe Premiere Rush

• AI image and video generation tools



Requirements



• Experience managing social media accounts for brands or businesses

• Strong graphic design and visual editing skills

• Experience editing short-form social media videos

• Familiarity with AI tools and prompting for content creation

• Proficiency in tools such as Canva, CapCut, Photoshop, Adobe Express, or Premiere Rush

• Strong attention to detail and visual aesthetics

• Ability to manage multiple social media accounts and deadlines

• Good written communication skills



Nice to Have



• Experience working with marketing agencies

• Understanding of luxury brands and premium aesthetics

• Familiarity with social media scheduling tools

• Basic understanding of social media trends and platform algorithms



Work Setup



• Remote position

• Must be available during US working hours

• Work with an international marketing team



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:

• Your portfolio or samples of social media graphics and videos you have created

• Links to social media accounts you have previously managed

• A list of the design or editing tools you are most experienced with (Canva, CapCut, Photoshop, etc.)



To confirm that you have read the full job description, please start your application with the phrase:



Creative VA – Ready to Create



Applications that do not include this phrase may not be reviewed.

Please do not send generic applications. We review every application carefully.

title: Office Admin in Australia
description:

Whats in it for you?

lbourne time.

- Opportunity to lead and advance in the future as our company continues to grow.



Your main responsibilities?

s, and connecting with client and prospects.

- You will be a quick communicator with technology - phone,
, whatsapp online field service management



Requirements:



- EXCELLENT written and spoken English

- Reliable internet, computer with dual screen, headset, quiet workspace

- Able to work consistent blocks in Australian Eastern Time ( 8AM to 6PM - Monday to Friday )

- Strong work ethic and will be ok with remote tracking software installed.



Who You Are:

-You are EXTREMELY organised and detail-oriented.

-You don’t miss
s. Your desk is organised. You believe organisation is a way of life.

title: WEBSITE BUILDER (REMOTE)
description:
We are looking for a skilled Website Builder to join our fully remote team. In this role, you will focus on designing, building, and maintaining responsive websites that deliver a seamless user experience. You’ll collaborate with our team using Trello for task management and Slack for communication.



If you’re passionate about front-end development, UX, and creating high-quality websites, this is the role for you.



Key Responsibilities:

• Design and implement responsive web layouts using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript

• Build websites that are user-friendly, fast, and visually appealing

• Ensure cross-browser compatibility, accessibility, and performance optimization

• Conduct site maintenance, updates, and troubleshooting to minimize downtime

• Collaborate remotely with tea
mbers via Trello and Slack

• Participate in remote meetings to share progress and solve challenges



Required Skills:

• Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and responsive web design principles

• Experience creating websites from scratch or using website builders

• Ability to implement designs while maintaining functionality and UX

• Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently

• 1+ years of web development experience preferred



Preferred Skills:

• Experience with front-end frameworks (React, Vue, Angular)

• Familiarity with SEO best practices and website accessibility standards

• Knowledge of WordPress, Wix, or other website builders

• Experience with Git/version control

• Understanding of UI/UX principles



Work Setup

• Full-Time: 40 hrs/week | Part-Time: 20–30 hrs/week

• Flexible schedule but must be dependable

• Long-term position (not project-based)



How to Apply

Please include in your application:

1. Your web development experience (years and types of projects)

2. Links to websites or web projects you built

3. Your expected hourly rate

4. Full-Time or Part-Time preference

5. Weekly availability



Join us and help create amazing websites that make a real impact—apply now and be part of our remote team!

title: Graphic Designer (Independent Contractor)
description:
Job Summary

The ArchIntel™ Information Technology team is building a creative graphic team to serve the company’s growing digital demand. The Graphic Designer will be responsible for developing creative visual concepts and producing designs by hand or through software. The role requires ensuring that all visual outputs are consistent with the company’s branding guidelines and standards, reinforcing a cohesive look and feel across all platforms.



Responsibilities and Duties



Determine the key message that each design should convey.



Create compelling images and visuals that align with ArchIntel’s brand identity.



Develop graphics for product illustrations, logos, websites, and marketing materials (including
s, campaigns, and presentations).



Ensure all designs maintain consistency with established branding and style guides.



Work with a wide range of media and utilize graphic design software effectively.



Think creatively to develop innovative design concepts, graphics, and layouts.



Qualifications and Skills



Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign), Sketch, and other image-generation tools (experience with automation tools is an advantage).



Proven experience in graphic design, with a strong portfolio demonstrating branding consistency across projects.



Creative, detail-oriented, and able to adapt designs for multiple platforms.



Knowledge of video editing/production and motion graphics (After Effects preferred).



Strong understanding of industry-leading design technologies and software.

At least 2–3 years of relevant work experience (preferably 2–4 years) in Arts/Creative/Graphics Design or equivalent.



Application Process

If you are passionate about creating compelling visuals in a dynamic and fast-paced environment within the GovCon sector, we invite you to apply for our Graphic Designer position. Please submit your resume and three professional references, along with your portfolio showcasing your best work. We are looking to bring new designers on board immediately and will follow up with qualified candidates.

title: FACEBOOK ADS SPECIALIST – BEYOND THE CAMPAIGN SETUP
description:
Most people see a 
 Ads Specialist" as someone who simply pushes buttons and monitors budgets. We are looking for something different. We are looking for a strategic thinker who understands that every dollar spent is an investment, and every data point tells a story.



WHY JOIN US?

Performance-Driven Budget: We do not limit your creativity. Your budget is limited only by your ability to scale and optimize.



Data-Centric Culture: We value hard numbers over "gut feelings." You will have the tools and the freedom to make decisions based on real-time metrics.



The "Test and Learn" Philosophy: We encourage calculated risks. You have the autonomy to experiment with bold targeting strategies and unconventional creatives to find the winning formula.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

Campaign Architecture: Build multi-stage advertising funnels from awareness and consideration to high-intent conversion.



Deep-Dive Optimization: Look beyond CTR. You will analyze CR, ROAS, and LTV to refine and pivot strategies.



Creative Collaboration: Work closely with Content and Design teams to develop "scroll-stopping" ads that resonate with target audiences.



Technical Command: Manage ad accounts, oversee Pixel and API configurations, and proactively navigate
’s algorithmic shifts.



THE IDEAL CANDIDATE

Experience: At least 1-2 years of hands-on experience with
 Ads, preferably managing high-spend accounts.



A/B Testing Mindset: An innate curiosity to constantly ask "Why?" and a dedication to iterative improvement.



Consumer Psychology: A deep understanding of what triggers a user to stop scrolling and take action.



Resilience: The ability to remain calm and strategic when faced with platform volatility or account challenges.



BENEFITS AND COMPENSATION

Income: Competitive base salary plus performance-based bonuses. Your earning potential is directly tied to your results.



Environment: A fast-paced, professional workspace without micro-management.



Growth Path: A clear trajectory from Specialist to Leader or Manager based on tangible performance and leadership qualities.



HOW TO APPLY

If you believe you are the right fit, please do not send a generic template. We want to see the impact you have made in your previous roles.



Send your CV to: 

Subject line: [FB ADS] – FULL NAME – PHONE NUMBER



We are not just looking for the best technician; we are looking for the right partner to break new records with us. Apply today.

title: SEO Content Strategist & Writer (Home Services Only, Remote)
description:
**About Genesis SEO**



We help home services and construction companies win local markets with practical SEO, clean Webflow websites, and content that drives real leads. We only work with home services. No lawyers, no random industries.



### The Role



This is a strategist + senior writer role. You will build a **Keyword Domination Plan** for each client, then execute it through content and on-page SEO. The goal is to help clients start ranking faster for their core services, then expand into supporting topics that build authority.



### What You’ll Do



**1) Strategy (Domination Plans)**



- Do keyword research using **SEMrush, Keyword Planner, and Surfer SEO**

- Build a clear Domination Plan (what pages/topics ship first, second, third)

- Turn it into weekly deliverables and keep it visible in **ClickUp**



**2) Writing (E-E-A-T + conversion-focused)**



- Write/optimize service pages, supporting pages, city pages, landing pages, blogs, and occasional case studies

- Write content that’s accurate, useful, and built to convert real customers

- Structure content to perform in Google and be readable/usable for AI platforms



**3) On-page SEO (practical)**



- Titles, metas, H1/H2 structure, intent match, and conversion updates

- Internal linking plans + help prevent/fix cannibalization

- Communicate basic schema needs to dev (AI generates schema, you just specify what’s needed)



**4) Collaboration + Publishing**



- Coordinate with our Webflow developer (copy aligned to wireframes/UX)

- QA pages before publish (formatting, links, on-page checklist)

- Document work clearly in ClickUp

- Support quarterly/semi-annual reporting inputs tied to what shipped



### Our Tool Stack (fixed)



- **Webflow** (all sites)

- **ClickUp** (only PM tool)

- **SEMrush, Google Keyword Planner, Surfer SEO**

- **ChatGPT** (to speed up work, not replace thinking)



No Screaming Frog, regex/server logs, backlinking, or outreach in this role.



---



### Detail Check (Required)



To be considered, start your application message with:



**“SEO Content Writer 49 from, [Your Name]”**



---



### Must-Haves



- Proven experience building keyword-based content plans and executing them

- Strong SEO writing for service pages + long-form content (clear, helpful, conversion-minded)

- Solid on-page fundamentals (titles, metas, headings, internal links, avoiding cannibalization)

- Comfortable collaborating with a developer in Webflow workflows

- Organized and consistent with documentation in ClickUp

- Professional communication; camera on during 1:1 and team calls



### Nice-to-Haves (Not Required)



- Topical maps / content architecture experience for local service businesses

- Strong brand voice and copywriting range across multiple clients

- Interest in helping build future content automation systems (planned within 6 months)



### Pay, Incentives, and Growth



- **Base pay (Phase 1, first 3 months): $900**

- **Bonuses + incentive program:** tied to client milestones based on quarterly/semi-annual reporting (depends on client plan)

- **Pay scaling:** increases after Phase 1 based on performance

- **Year-end bonuses:** available for top performers

- **Leadership track:** lead roles available within **6–12 months** for strong performers



### Working Hours (Long-Term Only)



- Monday–Friday, **8 hours/day**

- Core availability: **7:00 AM – 3:00 PM (your local time)**

- Respond within **2 hours** during working hours

- Acknowledge task comments the same day

- If you’ll be delayed, proactively explain it

title: Account Coordinator & GHL Automation Specialist
description:
**About Genesis SEO**

We help construction and home services companies win local markets with practical SEO, clean websites, and content that builds real authority. We move fast, keep communication professional, and measure outcomes.



## The Role



You will be the bridge between our technical systems and our clients' success. You will own the client onboarding process after their website is built, ensuring they are fully trained and integrated into our GoHighLevel (GHL) ecosystem. Your goal is to build relationships with clients while designing and maintaining the automation engines that drive their business—from review requests and database reactivation to "voi
 bombs" and unified communication pipelines.



The whole team is expected to work: Working Hours: 4PM PST to 11:30 PM PST. With 30 min of lunch in between and be availle 



## What You’ll Do



### Client Onboarding & Account Management



Lead the Handoff: Take ownership of the client relationship immediately after the website build is complete.



Training & Support: Conduct front-end and back-end training sessions, teaching clients and their teams how to use their new systems (CRM, pipelines, and reporting).



Ongoing Communication: Host weekly or monthly performance meetings to review work completed, discuss metrics, and coordinate next steps.



Team Liaison: Act as the central point of contact, communicating client needs clearly to the rest of our professional team to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.



### GHL Automation & System Architecture



Unified Communications: Set up and maintain a centralized inbox that merges Yelp, website widgets, SMS, and
 into one platform.



Automated Outreach: Build and manage workflows for automated review requests, referral generation, and repeat appointment reminders.



Database Reactivation: Execute "voi
 bombs" and text/email blasts to send targeted mass communications to leads and customer lists.



Phone Systems: Configure VoIP systems for clients, ensuring call tracking, recording, and metrics are functioning correctly.



### Marketing Campaigns & Reporting



Lifecycle Marketing: Create and manage
 campaigns tailored to specific stages of the sales funnel, including seasonal blasts and monthly newsletters.



Chat Widgets: Install and configure website chat widgets for real-time lead capture.



Reporting: Design customized dashboards inside GHL that provide clients with clear visibility into their ROI and KPIs.



Social & Content: Assist with social media planning for repeat content and ensure consistent messaging across all channels.



### What Success Looks Like (Accountability)



Smooth Onboarding: Clients feel confident and supported during the transition from "build" to "live."



System Uptime: Automations trigger correctly, and communication channels (VoIP, Chat, SMS) remain active without error.



Client Retention: Clients see the value of the software through your regular reporting meetings and proactive support.



Documentation: All workflows, client interaction notes, and task statuses are documented clearly in ClickUp.



When you apply, write the title of your job post as “GHL Automation Specialist 49 from” and then add your name to be considered.



Response Time: Client inquiries regarding their accounts or software are addressed promptly and professionally.



### Your Authority



Make decisions on the best automation logic for specific client needs.



Propose new GHL features or workflows that could benefit our client base.



Manage the client meeting schedule and set the agenda for performance reviews.



**Must-Haves (Skills and Tools)**



- **Expert-Level GoHighLevel (GHL):** Deep understanding of snapshots, workflows, pipelines, triggers, and smart lists.

- **VoIP & Telephony Experience:** Ability to set up Twilio/LeadConnector phone numbers, call forwarding, and voi
 drops.

- **Communication Skills:** Excellent verbal and written English; comfortable leading Zoom calls with business owners and training non-technical staff.

- *
 Marketing:** Experience writing and designing newsletters and drip campaigns that convert.

- **Project Management:** Organized in ClickUp or similar PM tools; you document your process and decisions.

- **Professional Presence:** Positive, proactive, and solution-focused; camera on during 1:1 and team calls.



**Nice-to-Haves**



- Experience with N8N or Zapier for integrations outside of GHL.

- Basic understanding of SEO and how it feeds into the CRM pipelines.

- Experience with social media scheduling tools.

- HTML/CSS knowledge for
 template customization.



### Working Hours (Long-Term Only)



- Monday–Friday, **8 hours/day**

- Core availability: **7:00 AM – 3:00 PM (your local time)**

- Respond within **2 hours** during working hours

- Acknowledge task comments the same day

- If you’ll be delayed, proactively explain it

 timeline cover, profile pictures and blog layout)

 Ads Manager) - Intermediate/Advanced

 Marketing - Mailchimp
 campaign - Intermediate

title: Social Media Manager / Executive Assistant
description:
Are you a proactive, creative, and organized professional ready to help scale a fast-growing personal brand?



We are looking for a powerhouse Personal/Brand Assistant to support a high-volume entrepreneur in the Whatnot and reseller space. We aren't just selling products; we are supplying the next generation of resellers. If you know how to turn raw energy into a streamlined digital presence, we want you.



Role Overview

Status: Part-Time (20 hours/week)



Schedule: Monday – Friday, 11 AM – 3 PM EST (Strict)



Focus: Social Media Growth, Brand Organization, and Executive Admin Support



What You’ll Be Doing

The mission is simple: Take the noise and turn it into a brand. You will be the engine behind a presence across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X 
), and
.



Content Management: Post, schedule, and organize content across all platforms.



Brand Voice: Write engaging captions, draft
s, and assist with professional outreach.



Creative Strategy: Brainstorm content ideas that resonate with the reseller community.



Digital Housekeeping: Update websites/profiles and keep projects on track.



Executive Support: Act as a high-level PA—anticipating needs before they arise and working closely with the CEO.



Who You Are

You aren't just a "task-taker"—you are a problem solver.



Socially Savvy: You understand the nuances of different platforms.



Tech Fluent: Proficient in Canva, social scheduling tools, and basic website updates.



Proactive: You don’t wait for a to-do list; you see a gap and fill it.



Reliable: You are comfortable working Eastern Standard Time (EST) to ensure real-time collaboration with leadership.



Requirements

Proven experience in Social Media Management or as a High-Level VA.



Strong English (written and verbal) is non-negotiable.



Ability to work quickly in a fast-paced, "always-on" environment.



Basic understanding of the reseller market or Whatnot ecosystem is a massive plus.





How to Apply

We value attention to detail above all else. Applicants who do not follow these instructions exactly will be automatically disqualified. Please send your application to 
 with the following:



Subject Line: High-Level Virtual Assistant (Personal Brand & Operations) - [Your Name]



Resume & Cover Letter: Combined in one file/message.



Portfolio: Show us your best work (Social media feeds, graphics, or case studies).



Video Introduction: A brief video introducing yourself and your experience.



EST Confirmation: Explicitly confirm you are available to work 11 AM - 3 PM EST.



Note: We are looking for a long-term partner who can bring ideas to the table. If you're ready to help run the show, we want to hear from you!

title: Video Editor for Offroad / Fabrication Shop
description:
What you’ll do

title: Virtual Assistant / Personal & Business / Admin & Design  (US client)
description:
We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented personal and virtual assistant to support both business and personal tasks. The work is varied — one week might include researching travel, the next might be drafting
s or scheduling social media posts. If you enjoy mixing professional and personal support work, this is a great fit.



You'll work independently, on your own schedule, as long as tasks are completed within the deadline. A task list will be posted once or twice per week. You'll have 24 or 48 hours to complete each batch, depending on complexity. No set schedule, no meetings.



Types of tasks:

Online research · Travel planning · Drafting and formatting
s · Posting content to social media platforms · Generating ideas and content using AI tools · Basic design work in Canva · Other general personal and administrative tasks



To apply, you must include all of the following:



Your resume — including the name or type of clients you've supported and the industries you've worked in.



A real troubleshooting story — Tell me about a specific time something went wrong on a task or with a client, and exactly what you did to fix it. Be specific: what broke, what you tried, what happened. Generic and AI-generated answers will not be accepted.



Screenshots of past work — Show us something you actually made or managed: a social media post, a travel itinerary, a formatted document, a Canva graphic, a content calendar — anything where we can see your work.



A design portfolio or Canva samples — Even informal work is fine. If you've made graphics, posts, presentations, or any visual content, include it. A design portfolio is strongly preferred.



One strong reason to hire you — Not a list of skills. One specific, honest reason you're the right fit for this role.



Your availability — usual working days and hours. Please list your available hours in Eastern Daylight Time zone.



What we're looking for:



Prior VA or personal assistant experience is required.

You should be comfortable switching between professional and personal tasks, handling information discreetly, and working without hand-holding.

Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) and social media platforms is a strong plus.

Candidates who provide specific proof of relevant experience with real details and screenshots will be given priority.

Applications without work examples will not be considered.

title: Maintenance and Housekeeping Coordinator VA
description:
Job Title: Maintenance & Housekeeping Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)

Company: Elevated Tahoe Properties

Location: Remote





About Us

Elevated Tahoe Properties manages high-touch short?term rental and property portfolios focused on guest experience, operational excellence, and timely maintenance resolution. We’re hiring a proactive, organized Virtual Assistant to coordinate maintenance and housekeeping operations across our properties.

Our Company Culture:

We are a fun, young company growing quickly

We value open communication and adding in humor whenever possible

Our team is self driven and empowered to handle their own responsibilities without being micromanaged

We inspire each other to become the best version of ourselves we can possibly become. 

We lead by example and use positive reinforcement to inspire others to strive for personal and professional greatness.

Role Summary

You will be the central point of contact for vendors, cleaners, inspectors, and on?site teams, managing task flow, escalations, and service quality using Breezeway (or similar platforms). This role requires excellent communication, strong conflict?resolution skills, and the ability to uphold service timelines while supporting a collaborative team environment.





Key Responsibilities

- Manage Breezeway task creation, assignment, tracking, and completion; ensure timely adherence to required service standards and time?sensitive task windows.

-Monitor daily cleaner performance, triage cleaner issues, and dispatch/coordinate cleaning resolution (TURNO & QUO processes)

-Handle maintenance scheduling, vendor sourcing, selection, approvals, and oversight

-Run early?morning guest support and code?enforcement triage (07:00–09:00) as needed

-Manage overdue tasks, escalate urgent issues, and coordinate Asana or other tool notifications and follow?ups-

-Serve as primary dispatcher for cleaning/maintenance rework and compensation decisions support

-Schedule deep?cleaning, carpet cleaning, and other specialty services

-Maintain comprehensive records of service history, vendor interactions, and inspections

-Support onboarding of new properties into operational systems and workflows

-Foster professional, respectful communication across boots?on?the?ground teams, vendors, management, and fellow VAs



Qualifications

-Proven experience coordinating maintenance and housekeeping for short?term rentals or property portfolios

-Strong hands?on experience with Breezeway (highly preferred) and familiarity with Asana or similar project tools

-Excellent written and verbal communication; comfortable with vendor and guest-facing interactions

-Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to prioritize under time pressure

-Problem-solver with a collaborative, respectful team approach and demonstrated escalation judgement



Non?Negotiable Requirements

-Reliable backup power (UPS or generator) to prevent downtime during outages

-Dual monitors for efficient multitasking

-Backup internet (secondary wired connection or mobile hotspot) with stable speeds

-Quiet, dedicated workspace and dependable computer



Preferred

- Background in vendor relations, scheduling, and service procurement

- Knowledge of property maintenance best practices and quality inspection standards

- Ability to adapt to evolving tech and operational processes



Required Days/Hours

Monday - Friday 7AM to 4PM Pacific Time (1 hour unpaid Lunch Break)



Compensation Target:

$900 per month + monthly KPI bonus / 40 hours per week — salary negotiable based on experience.



What We Offer

- Remote, flexible role supporting a growing property management team

- Opportunity to shape workflows and improve service quality across properties.



How to Apply (only
 applications will be considered)



: 

Subject: The Maintenance & Housekeeping Ops Coordinator Your Team Needs





Include:



- Your resume/CV

- Pre-Screening Form



- Internet speed verification

https://www.speedtest.net/

- DISC Assessment



Note: Please only submit a screenshot of the DISC assessment results graph.

- A 2–3 minute video that includes:

                    - Brief intro and summary of your experience

                    - Why you’re the ideal candidate for this position

                    - Your top 3 skills that make you an excellent coordinator



Thank you and we look forward to working with you!



**IMPORTANT NOTE**:



Only applicants who follow the instructions exactly and demonstrate strong attention to detail will be considered. Those who do not follow the instructions will be ignored.



Thank you and we look forward to working with you!



~ Elevated Tahoe Properties Team

title: Marketing & Website Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)
description:
Job Title: Marketing & Website Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)

Company: Elevated Tahoe Properties

Location: Remote



About Us

Elevated Tahoe Properties manages high-touch short-term rental and property portfolios focused on guest experience, operational excellence, and high-performing marketing that drives direct bookings. We’re hiring a proactive, creative, and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our website, digital marketing, social media, and lead generation efforts.



Our Company Culture:

- We are a fun, young company growing quickly

- We value open communication and adding in humor whenever possible

- Our team is self driven and empowered to handle their own responsibilities without being micromanaged

- We inspire each other to become the best version of ourselves we can possibly become.

- We lead by example and use positive reinforcement to inspire others to strive for personal and professional greatness.

What We Offer

:

title: Full-Time YouTube Editor + Shorts Specialist + Growth Strategist
description:
Please read this job post in its entirety.  Applicants who do not follow instructions will not get a response nor be considered.  

Thank you.  



Additionally this could be a very big opportunity.  We are intending to turn this into a company with built in clients already.  We are a multi billion dollar company with 500+ real estate teams in our ecosystem  



We’re a fast-growing real estate media brand creating YouTube and short-form content focused on helping people make smarter real estate decisions.



We’re looking for a full-time YouTube expert who can:

 • Edit long-form YouTube videos

 • Create high-performing short-form content

 • Support scripting and content ideas

 • Help grow the channel



This is not just an editing job.

We want someone who understands how YouTube works and how to make content perform.



What You’ll Be Doing



YouTube Long-Form Editing

 • Edit 10–20 minute videos with strong pacing and storytelling

 • Add b-roll, graphics, captions, and sound design

 • Improve flow and retention (not just visuals)



Short-Form Content (Custom Content)

 • Edit short videos (usually under 2 minutes) from raw footage

 • Add captions, b-roll, and visual elements

 • Focus on strong hooks and keeping attention

 • Create content for Shorts, Reels, and TikTok



YouTube Growth & Strategy

 • Help come up with video ideas that will perform

 • Assist with titles, hooks, and overall structure

 • Understand retention, CTR, and watch time

 • Bring ideas to improve channel performance



Script & Content Support

 • Help improve scripts, hooks, and video structure

 • Contribute ideas for both long-form and short-form content



Team Support

 • Help edit videos for agents on our team

 • Maintain consistent quality across content

 • Be reliable with communication and deadlines



Who This Is For



You:

 • Have experience editing YouTube videos and short-form content

 • Understand what makes videos perform, not just look good

 • Know how to improve retention, watch time, and engagement

 • Can contribute ideas, not just follow instructions

 • Are reliable, detail-oriented, and consistent



Requirements

 • Strong portfolio (YouTube + Shorts/Reels/TikTok)

 • Experience working with creators, brands, or channels

 • Understanding of YouTube strategy and content structure

 • Full-time availability and reliable internet



How To Apply (REQUIRED)



If you do not follow these steps, your application will not be considered.



1. Portfolio - Don't just drop a link with all your work.  Send me the direct links to the following below.  



Send:

 • 2–3 YouTube videos you edited

 • 3–5 short-form videos you edited

 • Links to channels or brands you’ve worked with

 • Brief explanation of your role



2. Background



Answer these questions:

 • What YouTube channels or creators have you worked with?

 • Have you helped grow a channel?   If yes, how?

 • What do you think makes a video perform well on YouTube?



3. Test Project (Important)



Selected applicants will be given:

 • A 5-minute YouTube clip

 • A short-form raw video (under 2 minutes)



You will edit both.



We will evaluate:

 • Hook and pacing

 • Storytelling and structure

 • Retention editing

 • Use of b-roll and captions

 • Overall editing decisions



This is the most important step.



Compensation

 • Full-time role

 • Pay based on experience

 • Long-term opportunity



Growth Opportunity



This role can grow quickly.



As we expand, you may:

 • Support multiple real estate agents and teams

 • Take on a lead editor role

 • Help manage content across multiple channels

 • Play a bigger role in strategy and growth



Final Note



We are not looking for a basic editor.



We are looking for someone who understands:

 • YouTube

 • Content

 • Attention



If that’s you, apply and show us your work.

title: Remote Outreach Specialist – Set Up Local Business Partnerships (Commission + Base)
description:

 Compensation:

* Organized and able to follow systems



Preferred (not required):

* Experience speaking with U.S.-based customers

title: Administrative Coordinator - Home Care Agency
description:

Caregiver Engagement

- Conduct regular check-ins with caregivers  

- Follow up after new caregivers complete their first shifts  

- Track caregiver availability and interest in additional shifts  

- Send reminders and supportive messages to caregivers  

- Maintain a caregiver engagement log  



HR & Onboarding Support

- Assist with caregiver onboarding  

- Track required documents and certifications  

- Maintain organized caregiver files  

- Send onboarding instructions and reminders  

- Coordinate orientation scheduling  



Scheduling Support

- Maintain caregiver availability tracker  

- Help identify caregivers for open shifts  

- Send shift confirmations and reminders  

- Follow up when caregivers miss shifts or clock-in requirements  



Reporting

*** Required Skills

- Experience as a Virtual Assistant, HR Assistant, or Recruitment Assistant  

- Strong written and verbal English communication  

- Excellent organization and follow-up skills  

- Experience using Google Sheets or Excel  

- Ability to manage multiple caregivers and tasks  



*** Preferred Experience

- Healthcare or home care agency experience  

- HR, recruiting, or staff coordination experience  



*** Availability Requirement

- Must be available during agreed-upon U.S. Eastern Time hours  

- You may have other clients outside of this role, but you cannot work another job during your scheduled shift with us  

- This role requires your full attention during working



*** How to Apply

Please submit the following:



1. Your resume  

2. A 1–2 minute video introduction covering:  

   - Your Virtual Assistant experience  

   - Your HR or recruitment experience

3. A short message including:

“Your Name – Caregiver Support”



Applications without all required items will not be considered.

title: Remote Service Compliance & Quality Coordinator
description:
Remote Service Compliance & Quality Coordinator — Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric (USA)

Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric is a fast growing residential home services company based in Melbourne, Florida. We specialize in HVAC, Plumbing, and Electrical and we are scaling quickly through our Home Depot service provider partnership. We are looking for a detail obsessed, fast moving remote coordinator to ensure every single Home Depot service call is closed out correctly, completely, and on the first try.

If you are the type of person who notices a missing signature, catches a mismatched part number, and is not afraid to hold a field technician accountable to a standard while they are still on site — this role was built for you.

This is not an after the fact auditing role. You will be actively communicating with our HVAC technicians, plumbers, electricians, and sales reps during live Home Depot calls — stepping in at the critical close out stage to make sure payment is collected correctly, all signatures are obtained, required forms are submitted in the portal, and every job meets Home Depot partner standards before the tech leaves the property.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES

Real Time Call Compliance and Field Communication (40%)



Monitor 2 to 3 active Home Depot service calls at a time cycling through each at key close out checkpoints

Contact technicians, plumbers, electricians, and sales reps via Slack or phone while they are still on site to ensure all steps are completed correctly before they leave

Verify payment is collected through the correct channel and calculated accurately

Confirm all required customer signatures are obtained before job close out

Communicate clearly and assertively with field staff to resolve missing steps or errors in real time

Escalate to management when a field employee is not following the required process



Portal Submission and Documentation (35%)



Submit required forms, heat load calculations, permits, and documentation into the Home Depot portal on behalf of the field team where required

Verify all job details including model numbers, serial numbers, and job descriptions are accurate and meet Home Depot and Climate Experts standards

Perform final review of completed job files before they are closed out and moved to billing

Ensure 100% compliance on every Home Depot job file before close out

Work inside ServiceTitan and the Home Depot portal daily to track and manage job status



Compliance Tracking and Reporting (15%)



Maintain detailed logs of recurring errors and missed steps by technician or job type

Identify patterns and flag training opportunities for management

Use the existing company checklist to verify every required step is completed on every call

Report compliance metrics and issues to management regularly



Admin Support (10%)



Assist with general administrative tasks as needed

Maintain organized records and files in Google Drive

Communicate daily with the operations team via Slack and





REQUIREMENTS



Extremely detail oriented — you catch the small things that create big problems later

Confident and assertive communicator — you are comfortable contacting a field technician mid job and telling them they missed a required step

Able to manage 2 to 3 active jobs simultaneously and know when to check in on each one

Strong English communication skills — written and verbal

Comfortable working in ServiceTitan, the Home Depot service provider portal, Slack, and

Experience with CRM systems or home services platforms is strongly preferred

Prior experience in HVAC, plumbing, or home services administration is a strong plus

Fast moving and able to make quick accurate decisions under time pressure

Reliable internet connection and a quiet professional work environment

Available to work Monday through Friday during US Eastern Time business hours



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)



Experience working with US based home service companies

Familiarity with Home Depot service provider requirements and portals

Experience with billing, payment processing, or permit submission workflows





WORK DETAILS

Company: Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric

Location: Remote — Philippines preferred

Schedule: Monday through Friday

Hours: 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time with a 1 hour unpaid lunch break — 7 paid hours per day, 35 hours per week

Pay: $5.71 USD per hour — $800 USD per month

Long term opportunity with room to grow as we expand our operations team



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered please include:



The word AUDIT in your subject line

A short introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

Confirmation that you are available Monday through Friday 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time

Any experience you have with CRM platforms, home services administration, compliance, documentation, or portal based submissions



This is a long term role for the right person. Climate Experts Air, Plumbing & Electric values accuracy, speed, and people who take pride in doing things the right way every single time. If you are detail obsessed, assertive, and excited about helping a fast growing US company maintain the highest standards on every job — we would love to hear from you.

title: E-Commerce Operations Assistant
description:
**Location:** Remote

**Hours:** 10–20 hrs/week to start

**Industry:** Premium Footwear (DTC + Amazon)



---



## ???? About the Role: 



We run a fast-growing e-commerce brand selling premium footwear through Amazon (FBA/MCF/AWD) and Shopify.



All fulfillment and inventory are handled through Amazon.



We are looking for a highly organized Operations Assistant to help monitor inventory, protect profitability, and keep operations running smoothly.



This is NOT a basic VA role. You will help manage real business decisions using structured systems.



---



## ???? Responsibilities



### 1. Inventory & Forecasting (Amazon-Centric)



* Track inventory directly inside Amazon (FBA + AWD) — “Never let Amazon go out of stock — Shopify depends on it.”

* Forecast stock levels (30 / 60 / 90 days)

* Monitor sell-through rates and stockout risks

* Track inbound shipments and receiving delays

* Ensure inventory levels support BOTH Amazon and Shopify (via MCF)



---



### 2. Customer Support (Profit-Focused)



* Handle customer
s (Shopify + general inbox)

* Follow structured refund / store credit policies

* Identify abuse, repeat refund patterns, and suspicious claims

* Balance customer experience with protecting company margins



---



### 3. Inbox & Executive Support



* Organize and clean high-volume inbox daily

* Identify important
s (financial, legal, urgent)

* Flag key items and add tasks/reminders to calendar

* Provide a short daily summary of priorities



---



### 4. Amazon Operations Monitoring



* Monitor listings for issues (suppressed, errors, etc.)

* Flag negative reviews immediately

* Track return/refund trends

* Alert on unusual performance changes



---



## ? Requirements



* Experience with Amazon Seller Central (FBA required)

* Familiarity with Shopify (basic level is fine)

* Strong written English communication

* High attention to detail

* Organized, proactive, and reliable

* Able to follow systems AND make judgment calls



---



## ???? What We’re Looking For



* Someone who understands Amazon is the control center

* Someone who thinks in systems, not just tasks

* Someone who protects the business, not just completes work



---



## ???? Trial Process (Paid)



We start with a 3–7 day paid trial to evaluate:



* Speed

* Accuracy

* Decision-making

* Communication



---



## ???? Compensation



* Part-time to start

* Opportunity to grow into a long-term role

* Performance-based increases



---



## ???? How to Apply



To be considered, include:



1. A short Loom video (2–3 min) introducing yourself

2. How you would handle this situation:



   > A customer says their item was delivered but they never received it and demands a refund

3. Briefly explain how you would track inventory using Amazon as the main system



Start your application with the word **“Stealth”** so we know you read this.



Applications without these will not be reviewed.



**Compensation:**

$5–$7 USD/hour to start, depending on experience.



This role begins part-time at approximately 10–20 hours per week. We will begin with a paid trial period to evaluate accuracy, communication, reliability, and decision-making.



Strong performance can lead to increased hours, higher pay, and a long-term role with more responsibility.

title: EXPERIENCED VIDEO EDITOR (FAST-GROWING ECOMMERCE BRAND))
description:
Role:

The Performance Ads Video Editor is the tactical engine behind our brand Enjuvie’s paid media performance. This role sits at the intersection of creative sourcing, rapid execution, and sales psychology. You turn raw UGC, AI assets, and found footage into high-converting video ads at scale.



You combine technical editing mastery with a deep understanding of direct response marketing. You understand pacing, pattern interrupts, and why an ad converts. You are not just an editor; you are a "hunter" who knows how to scour the internet for the perfect clip and use AI to create just about any Broll needed. Your job is to translate our marketing angles into world-class video ads that generate measurable revenue and allow Enjuvie to dominate the beauty feed.



Responsibilities:

- Direct Response Strategy & Execution

- Deliver 5 completely new ad concepts per week, with 3 hook variations for each concept (Total ~15 deliverables/week).

- Transform raw footage into high-performing video ads for Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and YouTube In-Stream.

- Engineer "scroll-stopping" hooks and visual pattern interrupts to maximize viewer retention in the first 3 seconds, blending sourced clips with brand content.

- Collaborate with the media buying and creative teams to analyze ad performance data and iterate immediately on what is working.

- Creative Sourcing & Post-Production

- Actively source third-party clips from TikTok/YouTube/Instagram to find specific reactions, Brolls, or satisfying visual 
nts as needed.

- Handle end-to-end post-production: assembly, pacing, sound design, color correction, and motion graphics.

- Adapt editing style, structure, and pacing to platform-specific formats, audiences, and performance goals

Systems, AI, & Workflow

- Maintain an impeccable file organization system within Google Drive and 
. You ensure every asset is tracked, named correctly, and accessible to the team.

- Leverage AI tools daily to speed up production. Must be proficient with tools like Nano Banana Pro, ElevenLabs (voiceovers), and Veo3 (or similar).

- Utilize AI avatars & Broll to test new creative angles and scripts without needing new physical UGC.

- Proactively identify bottlenecks in your editing workflow and build systems to solve them.



Requirements:

English Proficiency (Written & Verbal): You must be fluent in English. You need to be able to catch subtle grammar mistakes in captions, understand the nuance of English voiceovers, and communicate complex creative ideas clearly with the team.

Proven experience specifically as a Direct Response Video Ads Editor for e-commerce, info-products, or performance marketing agencies. (Cinematic narrative experience is great, but ads experience is non-negotiable).

Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, hooks, and modern content platform dynamics. You know how to structure an ad to retain attention.

Expert understanding of YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, and platform best practices.

Clear, fast communication skills and the ability to implement feedback efficiently in a high-performance environment. You don't take feedback personally; you take it as data to improve the next edit.

Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects (or DaVinci Resolve). CapCut mastery is a bonus for rapid trending content.



Results:

A consistent flow of high-converting video assets that directly contribute to ROAS (Return on Ad Spend).

Predictable output of 5 new concepts +10 variations weekly without sacrificing quality.

Seamless file management where no asset is ever lost and revisions are executed rapidly.

A high percentage of creatives that hit KPI targets and trigger performance bonuses.

A library of "winning creatives" that can be iterated upon for months.

Ongoing collaboration with the Creative Director and founder to support business objectives.



Schedule:

Monday - Friday, with the flexibility to work additional hours or weekends during high-traffic events (Black Friday, product launches, etc.) or if the situation warrants it.



Location:

- Remote



Compensation:

- Base Salary: $2,000 – $3,000 USD / Month

- The salary range may be inclusive of several levels that would be applicable to the position. Final salary will be based on a number of factors including, level, relevant prior experience, skills, and expertise.

- Performance Bonuses: $250-$500 bonus per "Winning Ad."

- This role is designed for high performers. If you produce ads that scale, your compensation increases significantly.



Haus of Brands Core Values:



- Relentless Drive

Be the person who runs toward the fire. The enjoyment of a hard challenge and the sheer grit to do "whatever it takes. Whether that means working late, missing sleep, or learning a new skill overnight. A refusal to let "lack of knowledge" be an excuse, bridging every gap through aggressive effort and self-directed evolution.



- Intellectual Honesty

The ability to separate your ego from the data. View harsh feedback not as an attack, but as objective truth required for improvement. A refusal to defend mediocrity or hide behind "good enough." If the work is flawed, we admit it immediately, fix it instantly, and never make the same error twice.



- Uncompromising Integrity

True character is revealed in the dark. Be the person who acts with absolute honesty when unobserved. The courage to speak the truth even when it is expensive or uncomfortable, and the refusal to hide failures or fudge numbers. A commitment to an ethical standard that requires zero policing.



ALL INTERESTED APPLICANTS PLEASE APPLY USING THE LINK BELOW:

title: Credit Repair Specialist (Long-Term, Growth Path to Team Lead)
description:
About Us

We are an established US-based funding company that helps business owners and entrepreneurs access capital through strategic business credit and 0% APR funding solutions. We are now building our in-house credit repair division to serve our client base directly, and we are looking for a sharp, experienced Credit Repair Specialist to be one of the first hires on this new team.

This is a long-term role with a clear growth path. The right person will help us build the SOPs, set the standard for quality, and eventually lead the credit repair team as we scale.



What You Will Do



Pull and analyze tri-bureau credit reports (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion) to identify inaccurate, incomplete, or unverifiable items

Draft and manage dispute letters tailored to each client's situation

Call credit bureaus, creditors, collection agencies, and data furnishers directly to file disputes and follow up on responses

Handle suppressions and security freezes with ARS, CREDCO, LexisNexis, SageStream, and Innovis when needed

File disputes through FTC, CFPB, BBB, and state AG channels when appropriate

Use Credit Repair Cloud, DisputeFox, or similar software to track every dispute and its outcome

Maintain accurate, audit-ready records of every call, letter, and bureau response

Keep clients updated on progress and explain credit concepts in plain language

Ensure full compliance with FCRA, FDCPA, CROA, and FACTA on every file

Help build and refine our internal SOPs as we grow





Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Minimum 2 years of hands-on credit repair experience in the US credit system (proof required)

Phone-based dispute experience is required. You must have personally called the three credit bureaus, creditors, and collection agencies to file and follow up on disputes. This is not a letter-only role.

Proficiency with Credit Repair Cloud, DisputeFox, or equivalent dispute software

Experience analyzing credit reports from all three bureaus and identifying disputable items

Strong working knowledge of FCRA, FDCPA, CROA, and FACTA

Experience drafting personalized dispute letters (not generic templates)

Excellent written and spoken US English with a clear, confident, professional phone voice





Strong Preference



Experience with GoHighLevel CRM

Familiarity with E-OSCAR, Metro2 reporting format, or AUDs

Experience with Letterstream, Postalocity, or Experian Upload

Pay-for-delete negotiation experience

Background in business credit or business funding (big plus given our company focus)

Experience removing collections, charge-offs, late payments, inquiries, bankruptcies, ChexSystems, and evictions





Technical Requirements



Stable, high-speed internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps, with backup connection strongly preferred)

Backup power source for outages (UPS, power station, or equivalent)

Own computer with at least 8GB RAM and updated OS

Working noise-cancelling headset for client and bureau calls

Quiet, dedicated home workspace with no background noise

VPN capability

Smartphone for two-factor authentication





Soft Skills We Need



High attention to detail when handling sensitive client information

Independent worker who can follow SOPs without hand-holding

Strong organizational and time-management skills

Ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

Honest, dependable, and ethics-first mindset

Coachable, with a hunger to grow into a leadership role





What We Offer



Long-term, full-time position with weekly pay

Competitive salary based on experience

Performance bonuses tied to dispute results and client satisfaction

Paid US holidays

Clear growth path: strong performers will be promoted to lead the credit repair team as we expand

Direct mentorship from senior leadership

Stable role inside an established US funding company (not a startup gamble)

Opportunity to help build a department from the ground up and own the SOPs





Working Hours

Full-time, US business hours (specific time zone to be confirmed in interview). Monday to Friday.



How to Apply

To make sure you actually read this post, start your reply with the word "DISPUTE" as the first word of your message. Applications that do not start with this word will be deleted without review.

Then include the following:



Your updated resume

A short paragraph (5 sentences max) describing your most challenging credit repair case and how you resolved it

A specific example of a dispute you filed by phone — which bureau or creditor you called, what you said, and what the outcome was

The credit repair software you have used and how long you used each one

Your internet speed test result (screenshot from speedtest.net or 
)

A short voice recording (1 minute max) introducing yourself in English so we can hear your phone voice

Your expected weekly rate



We are reviewing applications on a rolling basis and moving fast. If you are the right fit, you will hear from us within 5 business days.

We are excited to meet someone who is ready to build something meaningful with us, deliver real results for our clients, and grow into a leader on our team.

Apply today.

title: AI Video Editor for DTC Wellness Brand (Meta Ads) — Performance Bonus
description:
Hi! We're Healthy Metal — a UK-based wellness brand selling a magnesium glycinate evening drink (an alcohol alternative for better sleep). We're scaling our Meta ads aggressively and need a second AI video editor to join our creative team.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

You'll be producing AI-generated video ads for our Meta campaigns — a mix of AI animations, AI short-form videos, and creative concepts that don't require live creators. We'll provide you with reference examples from our Google Drive so you'll know exactly the style and quality we're after before you start.



THE TRIAL (HOW WE START)

We're trialling 2-3 editors at the same time and picking the best one as our long-term partner.



Trial scope:

- 3 AI videos based on our brief

- Reference examples and creative direction provided upfront

- Clear hooks, scripts, and visual direction given

- Quick turnaround so we can review and decide



WHAT HAPPENS NEXT (IF YOU'RE THE ONE WE PICK)

Once you're our editor, you'll get a steady volume of work:

- 5 ad sets × 3 videos per batch (15 videos as your first proper project)

- If those perform well on Meta, we scale you up to 10+ ad sets per batch

- Consistent ongoing work, week after week

- First pick on new concepts and angles



PERFORMANCE BONUS ????

On top of your base rate, we pay a £100 bonus for every ad you produce that hits £1,000 in spend on our Meta account. Our top ads regularly hit £10k-£50k+ in spend, so a single winning ad could mean £100-£500+ in bonuses on top of your editing fee. The better your ads perform, the more you earn.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Strong portfolio of AI-generated video work (animation, AI avatars, AI short-form)

- Experience with tools like Veo, Runway, Pika, Kling, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, CapCut, Premiere

- Fast turnaround (we move quickly — Mon launch, Wed review, Fri scale/kill)

- Understanding of short-form ad pacing (hook in first 2 seconds, retention curves)

- Comfortable with bold text overlays, ASMR-style audio, silent-friendly editing

- English-speaking, responsive on Slack/email

- Self-starter who can take a reference example and run with it

- Bonus: experience editing for DTC brands or Meta ads specifically



WHAT WE PROVIDE

- Reference videos and examples in our Google Drive showing the style we want

- Brand guidelines, colours, and assets

- Light direction on hooks/angles — we'll give you the concept, you bring it to life

- Direct feedback loop with our Growth Manager



HOW TO APPLY

Send us:

1. Your portfolio link (specifically AI video work)

2. 2-3 examples of AI ads you've made that you're most proud of

3. Your rate per video / per hour

4. Your typical turnaround time for 3 videos

5. The AI tools you use most



Looking forward to seeing your work!

title: Senior Accounting Manager (CPA)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a US-based accounting and consulting firm helping startups and established businesses. Our clients rely on us for accurate, timely financial records so they can focus on their operations. We have grown through consistent quality and responsive service.



We’re hiring a full-time Senior Accounting Manager to own the month-end close for a portfolio of US clients and be their senior point of contact. The work is US GAAP (accrual accounting, monthly close, audit readiness) in close partnership with US-based clients and firm leadership.



You’ll mentor junior staff and keep close processes consistent across engagements. Philippine statutory reporting is a plus, but the work is US GAAP. Clear path to Head of Accounting/Controller as we grow. This is a long-term career role, not a side gig.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

•Own the full close cycle (month-end, quarter-end, year-end) on a US 5–7 day timeline with journal entries, reconciliations, and reporting

•Serve as the senior accounting voice for your clients: anticipate needs, address technical questions, and turn the numbers into business insight

•Prepare and review financial statements and management reports for US leadership

•Support US GAAP reporting involving revenue recognition, accruals, consolidations, and intercompany eliminations

•Partner with clients on budgets, forecasts, cash flow, and variance analysis

•Maintain audit-ready documentation for US external auditors

•Review peers’ work to uphold accuracy and consistency before deliverables reach clients

•Communicate proactively with US-based clients and stakeholders over
, Teams, and Zoom; handle sensitive financial data with discretion

•Quickly adapt to client workflows and suggest improvements



TYPICAL WORKLOAD

•Manage 5–8 clients depending on complexity

•Supported by junior staff where applicable

•Work within a structured close process (typically 5–7 business days)



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We are looking for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and confident working with US clients.

Required:

•Licensed CPA (Philippines or equivalent)

•Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, or relevant field

•7+ years of full-cycle accounting experience

•Strong experience supporting US-based clients

•5+ years with QuickBooks Online/Desktop

•Experience reviewing others’ work (not just doing tasks)

•Strong Excel skills (pivot tables, XLOOKUP, large datasets)

•Excellent English communication (written and verbal)

•Comfortable working US business hours long-term



Nice to have:

•QuickBooks ProAdvisor certification

•Experience mentoring or leading junior staff

•Familiarity with tools like 



WHY JOIN US

•Long-term, stable role with a growing US firm

•Respectful and organized team

•Clear processes and systems in place

•Opportunity to grow into leadership

•We value quality work and reward top performers



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

•Salary: $2,300 – $2,500 USD/month

•Wellness & Retirement Stipend: $450/year (after 6 months)

•PTO & Sick Leave: Starts after 6 months

•US Federal Holidays: Paid



WORK SETUP

•Schedule: Monday–Friday, 7:00 am - 4:00 pm Pacific Time (approx. 10 PM – 7 AM Philippines)

•Hours: 40 hours/week (full-time only)

•Environment: Remote, Microsoft Teams daily communication

•Requirement: Stable internet (20+ Mbps), dedicated workspace



HOW TO APPLY

We only review candidates who follow instructions.

•Submit your updated resume

•Include a short cover letter explaining your US accounting experience

•End your application with a sentence that includes the word “Spring”



PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF:

•You cannot work Pacific Time hours consistently

•You are a freelancer, agency, or managing multiple jobs

•You do not have CPA credentials or US accounting experience



* A background check will be required before an offer is made.
