title: Operations Assistant
description:
Operations Assistant (High-Performance Role – Remote, Philippines)

- Reports to Founder/CEO



Read This First

This is not a typical assistant role.

We are looking for someone who can start as an Operations Assistant and grow into a General Manager / Operations Lead as the company scales. If you are looking for a task-based, repetitive role — this is not the right fit. If you are ambitious, organized, and want to take ownership of real business operations — keep reading.



About StudioVivian

StudioVivian is a Toronto-based company providing in-home music lessons for children across multiple provinces in Canada, with plans to expand further. We work with hundreds of music instructors and are building more than a lesson service — our mission is to help the next generation develop confidence through music and one-on-one mentorship. We are a fast-growing company focused on building strong systems, high-performing teams, and exceptional client experiences.



The Role

You will work directly with the Founder to support, manage, and eventually oversee the company’s operations.

This role will evolve quickly based on your performance and capabilities.



First 3 Months:

Learn all aspects of the business

Support day-to-day operations closely with the Founder



After 3 Months:

Take ownership of core operations

Begin managing systems, processes, and team coordination independently



Core Responsibilities:

• Operations & Administration

• Manage and coordinate daily operations across the business

• Handle incoming communications and direct accordingly

• Coordinate music lesson scheduling between teachers and students

• Maintain and update records, databases, and internal systems

• Manage calendars, meetings, and administrative workflows

• Plan meetings, track action items, and ensure follow-through



Accounts & Financial Administration

• Manage accounts receivable (invoicing, deposits, collections, follow-ups)

• Monitor and resolve delayed or missed payments

• Manage accounts payable (vendor invoices, teacher payments, timesheets)

• Maintain accurate client and vendor records

• Assist with month-end reporting and financial tracking

• Identify and resolve discrepancies



Operations Management & Growth

• Support execution of operational processes across HR, Marketing, Sales, and Accounting

• Track and ensure team KPIs are met

• Support revenue targets and business growth initiatives

• Identify inefficiencies and implement process improvements

• Build and refine systems (especially spreadsheets and reporting tools)



Team & Client Experience

• Ensure high levels of client satisfaction and retention

• Support onboarding and coordination of teachers

• Help improve both student and instructor experience

• Build strong relationships with clients, team members, and partners



Who You Are (A-Player Profile)

• 2+ years experience as an Executive Assistant, Operations Assistant, or similar role

• Extremely organized with strong planning and execution skills

• Highly tech-savvy (Google Workspace, CRMs, QuickBooks, spreadsheets, automation tools)

• Strong with numbers and comfortable handling financial/admin tasks

• Able to build and improve systems (not just follow them)

• Proactive, detail-oriented, and solution-focused

• Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

• High emotional intelligence and professionalism

• Able to prioritize, take initiative, and operate with urgency

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment



Who This Is NOT For

• You need constant direction or supervision

• You struggle with deadlines, organization, or follow-through

• You prefer repetitive, low-responsibility tasks

• You are not comfortable handling multiple areas of a business



What Success Looks Like

• Operations run smoothly and efficiently

• Systems are clear, organized, and scalable

• Clients and teachers are satisfied and retained

• The Founder is able to step back from day-to-day tasks

• The business continues to grow in a structured way



Growth Opportunity

This role is designed to grow into a General Manager / Operations Lead position for the right candidate.



Specifications & Tools

• Proficient in Microsoft Office / Google Workspace

• Experience with QuickBooks (or similar accounting tools)

• Comfortable using project management tools and communication platforms

• Strong spreadsheet skills required



How to Apply

• To be considered, please include:

• A short introduction (no templates)

• A 2–3 minute Loom video explaining:

• Why you’re a strong fit

• A system or process you improved in a previous role

• Your resume

• A cover letter

• Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Account Coordinator & GHL Automation Specialist
description:
**About Genesis SEO**

We help construction and home services companies win local markets with practical SEO, clean websites, and content that builds real authority. We move fast, keep communication professional, and measure outcomes.



## The Role



You will be the bridge between our technical systems and our clients' success. You will own the client onboarding process after their website is built, ensuring they are fully trained and integrated into our GoHighLevel (GHL) ecosystem. Your goal is to build relationships with clients while designing and maintaining the automation engines that drive their business—from review requests and database reactivation to "voi
 bombs" and unified communication pipelines.



The whole team is expected to work: Working Hours: 4PM PST to 11:30 PM PST. With 30 min of lunch in between and be availle 



## What You’ll Do



### Client Onboarding & Account Management



Lead the Handoff: Take ownership of the client relationship immediately after the website build is complete.



Training & Support: Conduct front-end and back-end training sessions, teaching clients and their teams how to use their new systems (CRM, pipelines, and reporting).



Ongoing Communication: Host weekly or monthly performance meetings to review work completed, discuss metrics, and coordinate next steps.



Team Liaison: Act as the central point of contact, communicating client needs clearly to the rest of our professional team to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.



### GHL Automation & System Architecture



Unified Communications: Set up and maintain a centralized inbox that merges Yelp, website widgets, SMS, and
 into one platform.



Automated Outreach: Build and manage workflows for automated review requests, referral generation, and repeat appointment reminders.



Database Reactivation: Execute "voi
 bombs" and text/email blasts to send targeted mass communications to leads and customer lists.



Phone Systems: Configure VoIP systems for clients, ensuring call tracking, recording, and metrics are functioning correctly.



### Marketing Campaigns & Reporting



Lifecycle Marketing: Create and manage
 campaigns tailored to specific stages of the sales funnel, including seasonal blasts and monthly newsletters.



Chat Widgets: Install and configure website chat widgets for real-time lead capture.



Reporting: Design customized dashboards inside GHL that provide clients with clear visibility into their ROI and KPIs.



Social & Content: Assist with social media planning for repeat content and ensure consistent messaging across all channels.



### What Success Looks Like (Accountability)



Smooth Onboarding: Clients feel confident and supported during the transition from "build" to "live."



System Uptime: Automations trigger correctly, and communication channels (VoIP, Chat, SMS) remain active without error.



Client Retention: Clients see the value of the software through your regular reporting meetings and proactive support.



Documentation: All workflows, client interaction notes, and task statuses are documented clearly in ClickUp.



When you apply, write the title of your job post as “GHL Automation Specialist 49 from” and then add your name to be considered.



Response Time: Client inquiries regarding their accounts or software are addressed promptly and professionally.



### Your Authority



Make decisions on the best automation logic for specific client needs.



Propose new GHL features or workflows that could benefit our client base.



Manage the client meeting schedule and set the agenda for performance reviews.



**Must-Haves (Skills and Tools)**



- **Expert-Level GoHighLevel (GHL):** Deep understanding of snapshots, workflows, pipelines, triggers, and smart lists.

- **VoIP & Telephony Experience:** Ability to set up Twilio/LeadConnector phone numbers, call forwarding, and voi
 drops.

- **Communication Skills:** Excellent verbal and written English; comfortable leading Zoom calls with business owners and training non-technical staff.

- *
 Marketing:** Experience writing and designing newsletters and drip campaigns that convert.

- **Project Management:** Organized in ClickUp or similar PM tools; you document your process and decisions.

- **Professional Presence:** Positive, proactive, and solution-focused; camera on during 1:1 and team calls.



**Nice-to-Haves**



- Experience with N8N or Zapier for integrations outside of GHL.

- Basic understanding of SEO and how it feeds into the CRM pipelines.

- Experience with social media scheduling tools.

- HTML/CSS knowledge for
 template customization.



### Working Hours (Long-Term Only)



- Monday–Friday, **8 hours/day**

- Core availability: **7:00 AM – 3:00 PM (your local time)**

- Respond within **2 hours** during working hours

- Acknowledge task comments the same day

- If you’ll be delayed, proactively explain it

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: Media Buyer (Meta Ads Expert)
description:
We are a U.S.-based digital marketing agency scaling rapidly, and we’re hiring an experienced Media Buyer with a proven track record of managing high-budget Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns that deliver real ROI.



Responsibilities



Plan, launch, and optimize Meta Ads campaigns for multiple clients (mostly service-based: landscapers, pool builders, contractors, etc.).

Analyze performance data and continuously improve CTR, CPL, CPA, and ROAS.

Write and test ad copy variations, visuals, and offers with our creative team.

Build reporting dashboards and provide performance summaries to management.

Scale successful campaigns and manage ad budgets exceeding $2k/month per client.

Collaborate closely with copywriters, video editors, and account managers for campaign success.



Requirements



Minimum 3 years of experience in Meta Ads buying and optimization.

Proven results with screenshots or case studies (before/after metrics, ad spend, cost per lead, etc.).

Deep understanding of Meta Ads Manager, pixel setup, tracking, retargeting, and A/B testing.

Experience running ads for service-based or local businesses (home improvement, construction, landscaping, etc.) is a big plus.

Must understand creative strategy (ad angles, hooks, storytelling, audience psychology).

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) is preferred.

Good English and communication skills.



To Apply



Start your message with:“I read the sentence and I have managed profitable ads.”

Include your Loom video link (with all required steps). Applications without this line will be ignored.



1.Campaign Setup Example



Create and walk through 1 campaign you would set up for a landscaping company (based in San Jose, CA, in business over 10 years, focusing on landscaping, concrete, and pools, with an in-house design team).

Explain:

Target audience, Ad copy and creative ideas, optimization plan



2.Funnel & Creative Analysis



Open our Google Drive folder ( 
 ) and analyze the example funnel of a client who sells online courses.

Their funnel is:

Opt-in page ? VSL page (book appointment) ? Thank You page

After opt-in, users get a webinar link, and the sales team calls to book appointments and sell the course.



In your Loom video, show: what you would improve



Working Hours



This is a full-time role with required availability Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM PST.

You must be fully available during these hours for campaign management, communication, and team collaboration.



Please note: all steps must be completed in your Loom video.

If something is unclear, message us your questions before recording.



Thank You.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Named one of Oregon’s 100 Best Companies to Work For, Threo is a rapidly growing company that helps executives thrive by unpacking their purpose through helping them find top executive positions, start a business, or buy a business or franchise.

Our mission is to help 1,000 families deliver their love letter to the world by providing the structure to support their purpose so that eternal profits are multiplied.

We are looking for an amazing Appointment Setter who can help us connect with and screen qualified executive candidates into our programs.

You do not need prior knowledge of franchise sales, recruiting, or executive coaching to apply. 

________________________________________

Most of your role will involve calling executives who are actively in career transition and currently searching for a new executive role. These are professionals who have submitted resumes, are actively looking for opportunities, and often need help getting clarity on their next step.

Your job is to connect with these executives, understand where they are in their career journey, and determine whether they may be a fit for executive opportunities, business ownership, franchise ownership, or one of our educational webinars that helps them level up their executive career search.

Cold calling is hard—but these conversations are easier because these are resumes of executives who need help and are actively looking for their next move.

Your role is to qualify opportunities, book appointments, and schedule only the right candidates onto the calendar of our opportunity specialist or sales team.

You may also assist with follow-up after presentations, closing call support, and maintaining strong relationships with prospects throughout the process.

This is a flexible part-time role where you can help design your ideal schedule, as long as you can consistently cover time during U.S. business hours and respond quickly to opportunities.

________________________________________

What You’ll Do Daily

• Call on executive resumes

• Connect with executives who are actively searching for leadership roles

• Qualify candidates to determine if they are a fit for executive opportunities, franchise ownership, or business ownership

• Invite qualified prospects to appointments, consultations, or educational webinars

• Initiate and manage conversations via phone,
, DM, and Zoom

• Follow up persistently but professionally with leads who have not yet booked

• Join closing calls and assist with follow-up for candidates

• Track all activity, follow-ups, and pipeline inside our CRM daily

• Hit minimum qualified appointment booking goals each month



It is preferred, but not required, to have experience setting appointments for high-ticket offers or working with executives in career transition.

title: Senior Fractional Financial Advisor / CPA — Family Office
description:
Senior CPA Advisor — Family Office  (Long-Term, Fractional, Remote)



We are a U.S.-based family office looking for a senior Philippine CPA to serve as fractional financial advisor — not a bookkeeper. We already have a senior bookkeeper. 



This role is the layer above: oversight, advisory, and CEO-level financial counsel. About 10–20 hours per month, long-term partnership, $22–30 USD/hour based on credentials and experience.





About the Family Office --------



The CEO leads (1) Performance Excellence Partners, a multimillion-dollar U.S. federal government contracting company (woman-owned), (2) a portfolio of residential rental properties held in multiple LLCs, (3) a coaching and leadership practice, and (4) ongoing nonprofit work. 



The books are clean. The bookkeeper is capable. We need a senior advisor who looks at the whole picture and helps the CEO make better decisions across all of it.





What You'll Actually Do --------



- Monthly oversight (the recurring rhythm):

- Review the bookkeeper's monthly close package; call out anything that's off

- Verify multi-entity reporting and intercompany transactions are clean

- 1–2 hour monthly advisory call with the CEO — financial review, insights, and recommendations in plain language

- Strategic advisory (where you add the most value):

- Annual budget development across the parent company and affiliated entities

- Tax strategy across the federal contracting business, real estate LLCs, and personal — coordinating with the CEO's U.S. tax accountant

- Multi-entity structuring advice (when to spin up a new LLC, when to consolidate)

- Scenario modeling for major decisions (new contracts, headcount, property acquisitions, financing)

- Personal financial statements for loan and certification packages

- Real estate financial advisory

- Government contracting financial work (specialty area):

- Proposal budget support on federal RFPs

- Indirect rate structure (fringe / overhead / G&A), provisional billing rates, forward pricing

- DCAA audit readiness and incurred cost submissions

- FAR Part 31 cost principle compliance



A note on the GovCon piece: this is the rarest specialty in the PH CPA market. If you have it, you're a top-tier candidate. If you don't but you can learn it quickly, apply anyway and tell us how you'd ramp — we'll support you with a U.S. GovCon CPA you can collaborate with.



Required --------



- Philippine CPA license (current, in good standing)

- 7+ years of accounting / advisory experience

- Substantial U.S. client experience (U.S. GAAP fluency, QuickBooks proficiency)

- Multi-entity / LLC accounting experience

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Available for a recurring monthly call in U.S. Pacific business hours

- Advisory mindset — confident, direct, proactive

- Strongly Preferred (any one moves you up the stack)

- U.S. CPA, CMA, or equivalent additional credential

- U.S. federal government contracting experience (FAR, DCAA, indirect rates)

- Real estate accounting experience

- Fractional CFO or family office advisor experience

- Big 4 or top mid-tier audit / advisory background



What you don't need: to also be the bookkeeper. We have someone for that.





Engagement Terms
–20 hours per month, settling toward 8–12 once systems are dialed in

- Long-term — we're hiring a partner, not a project resource

- $22–30 USD/hour based on credentials and U.S. specialty depth

- Paid monthly via Wise or direct bank transfer

- Optional small monthly retainer for guaranteed availability during proposal/audit windows



To Apply -------->. Just click apply. In your application message, please include:



- 2–3 sentences on the U.S. clients you've served and what you did for them

- Two areas of this role where you'd be strongest, and one where you'd want support

- Your expected hourly rate

title: (Estimator & Marketing Specialist
description:
OE Landscape – Estimator and Marketing Specialist Job Description



Position: Virtual Assistant (Estimator & Marketing Specialist)



Reports to: Owner – Os Ruiz



Employment Type: Full-Time (Remote)



Industry: Landscape Design-Build & Installation



Location: Remote (PST availability)



About OE Landscape



OE Landscape is a licensed, bonded, and insured Southern California landscape design-build company specializing in outdoor construction, hardscapes, drought-tolerant landscaping, irrigation/drainage, outdoor kitchens, lighting, and full-scale installation projects. We use modern tools, automation, and AI to streamline operations and deliver a high-end customer experience from first contact to project completion.



We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Estimator & Marketing Specialist to support both estimating and digital marketing, as well as general business operations. We are a growing company and are looking for a dedicated individual to grow with us over the next decade.



Key Responsibilities



The primary duties are divided into five key areas:



1. Quote Preparation Support

Organize transcript notes into structured job estimates.

Create material/plant lists and dimension breakdowns.

Maintain a comprehensive pricing worksheet.

Create client profile and estimates within the estimating software (Jobber).

Quickly generate an estimate once a site visit has been completed.

Send approved estimates to clients.

2. Marketing & Social Media Management

Schedule daily content across major platforms:
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

Repurpose video content for optimal use across multiple platforms.

Write engaging captions, keyword-rich descriptions, and relevant hashtags.

Upload portfolio images to GMB (Google My Business) with SEO-optimized descriptions.

Provide comprehensive monthly performance summaries.

3. Ads Support

Assist in building and monitoring all lead funnels, including but not limited to
/Instagram ads, Google Ads, and other channels.

Set up lead forms and sync new leads to the appropriate CRM (Jobber or GoHighLevel).

Upload video creatives and integrate clear Call-to-Action (CTA) buttons.

Assist in creating and managing advertising campaigns.

Monitor campaign performance and execute optimization strategies.

4. Lead Management & CRM (Jobber + GoHighLevel/Quo)

Monitor and track incoming leads from all sources, including Meta Ads, Google, and website forms.

Enter and maintain accurate customer records in all CRMs, including GoHighLevel.

Set up quotes, scheduled follow-ups, internal tasks, and client reminders.

Assist in processing estimated transcripts from site visits using specialized pendant/AI tools.

Organize and archive client photos, videos, and transcripts.

5. Administrative Tasks

Maintain Excel sheets and generate necessary reports.

Prepare and format professional documents in Word.

Organize marketing and digital files.

Provide coverage for additional office staff during scheduled time-off.

Required Skills & Experience

Strong Computer Proficiency: Mastery of Google Workspace (e.g., Docs, Sheets) is essential, along with experience in MS Office.

Self-Motivation: Must be a self-starter and possess strong problem-solving skills.

Bachelor's Degree Completed.

Strong written and verbal communication skills in both English and Spanish.

Experience with CRMs such as Jobber, GoHighLevel, or similar platforms.

Proven Meta Ads experience, including lead forms, campaigns, and creative uploads.

Experience with social media scheduling tools like Metricool or Meta Business Suite.

Foundational knowledge of SEO and Google Ads.

Proficiency in Excel and Word.

Highly organized and detail-oriented.

Ability to consistently overlap with the Pacific Standard Time (PST) schedule.

Preferred (But Not Required) Skills & Qualifications

Master’s degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, Architecture, Landscape Architecture, Construction Management, or a related field.

Basic photo/video editing skills using tools like Canva or CapCut.

Familiarity with generative AI tools like ChatGPT or AI note-taking applications.

Prior experience supporting contractors in fields such as landscaping, construction, HVAC, or roofing.

Understanding of construction materials and common plant types.

Strong analytical skills, especially for organizing complex transcripts and material lists.

Experience with advanced digital marketing or CRM automation.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Performance will be evaluated based on efficiency, accuracy, and impact across key operational areas:

Estimate Turnaround Time: Minimizing the time between site visit completion and estimate delivery.

Marketing Task Completion Rate: Daily efficiency in completing scheduled marketing and content tasks.

SEO/GMB Improvements: Measurable daily or weekly improvements in search engine optimization and Google My Business ranking/quality.

Tools You Will Use

Whatsapp

Roboform

Jobber

GoHighLevel (GHL)

Meta Business Suite

Metricool

Google Suite

ChatGPT

Internal AI workflows

Compensation & Benefits

Competitive salary commensurate with experience.

Opportunity for long-term growth and professional development within a growing company.

Fully remote position.

Details regarding specific compensation and benefits will be discussed during the interview process.

How to Apply



Interested candidates should submit the following documents/information:

A short introduction video (1–2 minutes)

Examples of previous relevant work

Confirmation of availability and ability to meet PST schedule overlap requirements

title: UI/UX Designer
description:
GiveSendGo is the #1 free Christian crowdfunding platform, serving hundreds of thousands of campaigns and processing millions in donations worldwide. We are seeking a talented UI/UX Designer to serve two departments — Web Development and Marketing — bringing design excellence across every visual touchpoint of the GiveSendGo brand.



This is a design-first role. Your primary job is to create beautiful, intuitive visual experiences — from product screens and user flows to marketing campaigns and brand assets. Front-end development experience (Vue/Nuxt, HTML/CSS) is a plus but not required.



## Responsibilities



- Product Design (Web Development):

- Design wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups for new features and improvements across the GiveSendGo platform.

- Own and evolve the product design system — components, typography, color, spacing, and interaction patterns.

- Design responsive layouts that work beautifully across desktop, tablet, and mobile.

- Conduct UX reviews of existing flows (campaign creation, donation checkout, admin dashboards) and propose improvements backed by usability principles.

- Collaborate with engineers and product leadership to translate business requirements into intuitive user experiences.

- Create UI assets, icons, and visual elements as needed for product development.

- Marketing Design:

- Design landing pages for marketing campaigns, product launches, and promotional initiatives.

- Create social media ad graphics and assets across platforms 
, Instagram, X, YouTube, etc.).

- Design
 marketing and newsletters with compelling layouts that drive engagement.

- Produce visual assets for blog posts, announcements, and other content marketing.

- Ensure brand consistency across all marketing materials and channels.

- Adapt designs for various formats and dimensions as needed by the marketing team.



## Qualifications



- 3+ years of professional UI/UX design experience with a strong portfolio demonstrating both product/application design and marketing/brand design.

- Proficiency in Figma (our primary design tool).

- Strong graphic design skills — layout, typography, color theory, and visual hierarchy.

- Experience designing responsive web interfaces.

- Experience creating marketing assets (social media graphics,
 templates, landing pages).

- Understanding of design systems and component-based design.

- Ability to work independently across Philippine business hours with overlap into US Eastern time for team collaboration.

- Strong written English communication skills.



## Optional Skills & Experience



- Front-end development skills (Vue.js, HTML/CSS, Tailwind).

- Experience with Nuxt.js (SSR/SSG) or Laravel-based environments.

- Experience with
 design tools (Mailchimp, SendGrid, etc.).

- Motion design / micro-interaction skills (CSS animations, Lottie, After Effects).

- Experience with crowdfunding, fintech, or donation platforms.

- Video thumbnail and banner design experience.

- Experience working with AI-assisted design tools.



## Personal & Character Attributes



- Creative and resourceful designer with a passion for purpose-driven work.

- Detail-oriented and organized, able to manage multiple projects and deadlines across two departments.

- Humble collaborator with strong communication skills.

- Adaptable and eager to learn new tools and trends.

- The UI/UX Designer is expected to consistently demonstrate GiveSendGo's Core Values through both work and character:

- Selfless – Acts with a servant-hearted approach to support team effectiveness, platform integrity, and the mission.

- Honest – Demonstrates unwavering commitment to truth, transparency, and ethical communication.

- Innovative – Contributes to improving design tools, systems, and processes in support of sustainable growth.

- Nimble – Adapts to shifting platform needs, marketing priorities, and operational realities with sound judgment.

- Excellent – Delivers high-quality work, takes ownership of outcomes, and pursues ongoing improvement.



## Perks of Working With Us



- Direct impact on brand growth, platform adoption, and public visibility.

- Opportunity to shape the visual identity of a platform operating in over 80 countries.

- Close collaboration with product, marketing, and senior leadership on high-impact initiatives.

- Supportive, small-team environment that values innovation and initiative.

- Room to grow as the design function expands.



## Salary & Benefits



- TBD

- Fully remote, full-time position

- Paid time off and holiday pay

- Professional development support

- Health care stipend

title: Property Operations Lead - Remote
description:
Location: Remote 

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00am–6:00pm Eastern Time (USA) 

Compensation: $6/hour + monthly performance bonus 



SteelSafe Self Storage runs remote, online-first storage: rent online, get instant access, move in today. That only works when units are clean, functional, and ready to rent fast. When turns stall, inventory dies. 



We’re hiring a Property Manager with one scoreboard: more rent-ready units, faster turns. 



What you get: 

A clear scoreboard and a role that matters. 

High trust and real autonomy. 

Direct access to leadership and fast decisions. 

A system-driven operation (we run on Asana). 

Performance bonus opportunity tied to ops execution. 



What you’ll do: 

Run fast turns: Unit move?outs to Ready?to?Rent (R2R). 

Manage boots on the ground(BOTG) contractors and vendors. 

Create and drive work orders to completion with proof (photos/video). 

Own site readiness: gates, locks, cameras, lighting, cleanliness, curb appeal. 

Handle property projects end?to?end (example: order a sign, coordinate install, confirm with proof).  



What you own (outcomes): 

Median Time?to?Rent?Ready (TTRR) after move?out is ? 4 days. 

Rent?Ready Unit % stays high and trending up. 

Work orders dispatch quickly and close with proof. 

BOTG tasks close on time with proof; reconciliation stays current. 



Weekly scorecard is posted and drives action. 

The authority and tools you’ll have: 

You can fix what’s broken: turn workflow, proof standards, vendor SLAs, BOTG execution, inspection cadence, and enforce it. 

You can approve vendor spend up to $50 per job. Above that requires approval before work begins. 

Asana as the operating system (tasks, checklists, proof). 



This role is a fit if you: 

Own outcomes and like a clear scoreboard. 

Move fast, follow through, and don’t close tasks without proof. 

You can manage vendors and contractors firmly and professionally. 

Think in checklists, photos, and deadlines. 

Care about security, cleanliness, and a great customer experience.

title: Career Coach
description:
Named one of Oregon’s 100 Best Companies to Work For, Threo is a rapidly growing company that helps executives thrive by unpacking their purpose through helping them find top executive positions, start a business, or buy a business or franchise.

Our mission is to help 1,000 families deliver their love letter to the world by providing the structure to support their purpose so that eternal profits are multiplied.

We are looking for an Executive Career Coach / Career Advisor who is passionate about helping people find clarity, confidence, and direction in their next career move.

This is not just a coaching role—it is a business-building role. You will help executives find the right path while also building your own book of business through strategic outreach, relationship building, and consistent follow-up.

________________________________________

Role Description

As an Executive Career Coach, you will guide high-achieving professionals through career transitions, helping them secure top executive roles, improve their personal brand, and explore additional opportunities such as business ownership, franchise ownership, and executive coaching programs.

Our ideal candidate possesses a passion for impacting lives. Your main responsibilities will be establishing and managing client relationships, leading candidate sourcing efforts, and helping executives gain clarity on whether their next best step is a new executive role, career coaching, franchise ownership, or business ownership.

Key Responsibilities

Strategic Career Planning

• Guide clients in aligning their purpose with high-compensation executive roles

• Develop personalized career roadmaps and action plans

• Create customized strategies with clear milestones aligned to client goals

• Coach clients on interviewing, compensation negotiation, and executive positioning

• Conduct virtual coaching sessions, workshops, and live webinars

________________________________________

Personal Branding & Documentation

• Create ATS-optimized resumes and cover letters

• Build high-converting LinkedIn profiles

• Help clients craft compelling personal branding materials

• Position executives for stronger visibility and better opportunities in the job market

________________________________________

Sales and Business Development

• Build your book of business by calling resumes of executives in career transition

• Prospect executives actively searching for leadership opportunities

• Invite qualified candidates to live webinars and coaching consultations

• Follow up and close opportunities for career coaching programs, franchise opportunities, and business ownership programs

• Negotiate and close coaching agreements and client service agreements

• Track all follow-up and activity inside CRM systems daily

This is where long-term income is built.

Cold calling is hard—but these are executives actively searching for jobs and often need help getting clarity on what comes next.

________________________________________

Client Success & Team Leadership

• Maintain and grow strong client relationships

• Create raving fans through excellent service and delivery

• Lead and develop the outreach team to improve sourcing quality and consistency

• Hire, train, coach, and mentor appointment setters and sourcing specialists

• Help develop future Career Coaches and Junior Consultants inside the organization

title: Bookkeeper
description:
About Us

The Weekend Project is a UK-based company that sells event tickets and merchandise through Shopify. We've been growing rapidly — from around £12k in sales in H2 2024 to over £90k in 2025 — and we need a skilled bookkeeper to make sure our financials are clean, accurate, and fully reconciled before we close out the year.



What You'll Be Doing

This is a focused clean-up project covering our full 2025 accounts and 2026 YTD, with the goal of producing a reconciled balance sheet and P&L we can rely on. Specifically:



Reconcile the full balance sheet as at 31 December 2025 and 31 March 2026

Ensure all Shopify Payments clearing accounts are fully reconciled to zero (or with documented timing differences only)

Post any missing journal entries for Shopify sales, processor fees, discounts, refunds, and shipping income

Cross-check processor fees against official Shopify Payments monthly invoices

Reconcile the Revolut bank account to the QuickBooks general ledger

Review and clean up any mispostings or duplicate entries

Produce a clean P&L for the full year 2025 and YTD 2026 split by product category (tickets vs. merchandise)

Document your work with a reconciliation workpaper for each account





Systems We Use



QuickBooks Online (UK)

Shopify / Shopify Payments

Revolut (main business bank account)

Stripe (payment processor — same as Shopify Payments)





Our Chart of Accounts Structure (you'll need to understand this)

We use a clearing account approach for Shopify income:



Shopify Clearing ? Shopify Payments Clearing (sub-account)

Monthly Sales JEs post gross sales by category (40001 Shopify Ticket Sales, 40002 Shopify Merch Sales), with separate lines for discounts (41001/41002), refunds (42001/42002), shipping income, processor fees, and the net clearing debit

Processor fees come from official Shopify Payments invoices issued the 5th of the following month





Who We're Looking For



Proven experience with QuickBooks Online — you must be comfortable posting and editing journal entries, running reports, and reconciling accounts

Experience with Shopify, Stripe, or e-commerce bookkeeping — this is important; the settlement/payout timing nuances matter

Strong attention to detail — we've already identified specific discrepancies (fee methodology differences, missing JEs) and need someone who can work through these systematically

Able to work independently with minimal hand-holding — we'll give you access and clear documentation of what's been done so far, but we need someone who can take it from there

Clear written English — you'll be providing reconciliation workpapers and brief written summaries of your findings

Experience with UK-based companies is a plus (though not essential)





What We'll Provide



Read/write access to QuickBooks Online

Shopify Payments payout exports and official monthly invoices

Revolut bank statements

A detailed reconciliation workpaper already prepared covering the Shopify Payments Clearing account, so you know exactly where we stand and what's outstanding

Clear documentation of our JE structure with examples





Deliverables



Fully reconciled balance sheet as at 31 Dec 2025 and 31 Mar 2026

Clean P&L for 2025 (Jan–Dec) and 2026 YTD (Jan–Mar) by category

All missing journal entries posted and documented

Reconciliation workpaper for each balance sheet account

A short summary of any issues found and how they were resolved

title: Amazon Private Label Product Researcher
description:

Job Description:

We are a growing Amazon FBA private label business focused on launching practical, well-differentiated consumer products across multiple categories. Our approach emphasizes steady expansion through thoughtful product selection, strong supplier relationships, and continuous iteration on existing listings.

We are looking to hire a Product Researcher to identify new product opportunities that meet clear demand, have manageable competition, and align with our brand standards. This role also involves working directly with suppliers to source and help design products.

title: PHONE EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT (Sales Focused) [REMOTE]
description:
YOU (THE CANDIDATE):

You are the kind of woman who treats your work like it's your business. You thrive in a role where communication, intelligence, and quick thinking matter every single day. You excel at verbal communication in English, think quickly under pressure (including in an interview), and you have a natural sales mentality — you feel confident encouraging tenants to sign or renew a lease without needing scripts or hand-holding, even if you are new to property management. You are thrilled by the idea of a lifetime job opportunity instead of applying for 100 new jobs every 6 months. 



Read these carefully - if this sounds like you, you’re who we want:



• You love speaking with people - idea of encouraging tenants to renew their lease or confidently talking with new applicants about why they should choose our homes actually energizes you.

• You know how to build rapport with inbound callers

• You’re calm, patient, and solution-focused under pressure - when you receive calls about issues, your natural instinct is to resolve, not get flustered.

• You speak exceptional English with a clear voice and minimal accent - the kind that U.S.-based callers can easily understand on the phone.

• You are resourceful and skilled at problem solving, able to think on your feet, and naturally good at handling unexpected or challenging situations.

• You consider yourself highly intelligent - the type of person others rely on when something tricky needs solving.

• You have prior work-from-home experience and know how to manage yourself independently.

• You have a proven history of staying with past employers (ideally 2 years or more).

• You want stable, long-term, full-time employment and value security over chasing short-term high pay that disappears.

If this is you authentically - not aspirationally - we want to meet you (even if you haven’t worked in Property Management before).

_____________________________



US (THE COMPANY):

• We are a U.S. based long-term rental property company - not Airbnb, not short-term rentals.

• We currently manage 100+ houses and are growing quickly.

• We expect to reach another 100–200 homes in the next two years.

• We value ladies who want long-term stability with us - 10 years, not 10 months.

_____________________________



COMMITMENT FROM YOU:

 • Full-time (40 hours/week)

 • Availability for calls: Monday–Friday, 7 AM–7 PM Pacific Time | Active working hours for tasks occur within that window

 • Availability time-sensitive customer inquiries: Weekends

 • This is a long-term, secure role for someone who wants to grow with us at $500-$800 Monthly (Based on Experience) + Bonuses

_____________________________

OLJ Applications or OLJ Messages will not be reviewed.

title: SEO & AI Search Manager (SEO / AEO / AIO / GEO / LLMO)
description:
ABOUT SEQUENCE COMMERCE



We are a Canadian DTC growth agency specializing in Amazon, Walmart, Consulting, Shopify, SEO and website services for ecommerce brands. We help our clients win across all four search disciplines: traditional SEO (Google), AEO (AI Overviews and answer engines), GEO (generative engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity), and LLMO (large language model citation share).



We are growing and need a specialist who can execute audits, deploy schema, write pillar content, and run AI citation tracking across our client roster.





THE ROLE

You will work directly with the founder and execute the technical and content work that powers our retainer engagements. This is a hands-on management role meant to help our company build out the service from scratch. You will be doing the actual SEO work, not delegating it.



What you will do week to week:



- Run Ahrefs data pulls (we have an MCP integration that makes this fast)

- Build keyword opportunity lists and competitor benchmarks

- Deploy schema markup on Shopify and Magento sites (Product, Review, 

  AggregateRating, FAQPage, HowTo, BreadcrumbList)

- Audit and fix technical SEO issues (redirects, crawl errors, Core Web 

  Vitals, hreflang)

- Write pillar content and buyer guides (1,500-3,000 words, optimized 

  for both Google and AI citations)

- Test priority queries across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google 

  AI Overviews to track citation share

- Conduct editorial seeding outreach to land clients in "best of" lists

- Run link reclamation outreach to recover lost backlinks

- Build monthly client reports with before/after data

- Use our internal Claude-based audit toolkit to generate client 

  deliverables (we will train you on this)





REQUIREMENTS (must have)



- 2+ years of hands-on SEO experience (technical SEO, on-page, content)

- 1+ years of hands-on AEO / AIO / GEO / LLMO experience

- Proficient with Ahrefs, Google Search Console, Google Analytics 4

- Comfortable deploying schema markup via JSON-LD on Shopify or Magento

- Strong written English (your pillar content will go directly to client 

  sites; please share writing samples)

title: SDR Manager (High-Velocity Sales Team)
description:
We are seeking a high-accountability SDR Manager to transform our outbound sales development operations. In this role, you will own the daily rhythm of a 12-person team—monitoring hour-by-hour activity, optimizing speed-to-lead, and ensuring consistent pipeline quality. Your success is measured by one thing: hitting booking targets. If you have a proven track record of managing Philippines-based sales teams and have the backbone to enforce strict performance standards, you will thrive in this high-reward environment.



What You’re Walking Into:



 - 12 SDRs (currently underperforming vs potential)

 - Loose structure and inconsistent discipline

 - High volume inbound + outbound opportunities

 - Clear need for stronger leadership and accountability



What You’ll Own:



 - Monitor SDR activity hour-by-hour (calls, texts, follow-ups)

 - Enforce daily KPIs and performance standards

 - Drive booked calls, show rates, and pipeline quality

 - Recruit, train, and upgrade SDR talent

 - Install structure, workflows, and CRM discipline

 - Coach reps daily through call reviews and feedback



Daily Responsibilities:



 - Run daily standups and end-of-day accountability reviews

 - Track performance metrics in real-time

 - Ensure speed-to-lead and follow-up consistency

 - Identify and fix underperformance immediately

 - Maintain strict CRM hygiene and reporting accuracy



What Success Looks Like (First 60–90 Days):



 - SDR team consistently hitting booking targets

 - Improved show rates and lead quality

 - Faster response times and tighter follow-up

 - Higher-performing team with clear accountability

 - Upgraded talent and removal of low performers



Non-Negotiables:



 - Experience managing SDR or call center teams (10+ reps)

 - Comfortable in high-pressure, high-output environments

 - Strong understanding of sales, not just activity tracking

 - Willingness to enforce standards and replace underperformers

 - Highly organized with strong attention to metrics



What Separates Top Candidates:



 - Experience managing Philippines-based SDR teams

 - Proven ability to increase bookings and show rates

 - Strong coaching and call review systems

 - High energy, urgency, and accountability mindset

 - Track record of building high-performing teams



How We Evaluate:



 - Daily management approach and cadence

 - Handling underperforming reps

 - Improving show rates and conversion

 - Metrics tracked and why

Compensation:

title: Operations & Marketing Assistant
description:
The Big Picture: Eagle EYE Management is building a first-of-its-kind business ecosystem in Eastern North Carolina. We provide a physical workspace (The Hub) and a 20-week intensive training program (LaunchNashvilleNC) for local small business owners. We are looking for a sharp, organized, and creative "Right Hand" to manage our digital systems and social media while the CEO leads on the ground.



Samples of What You’ll Be Doing:

1. Managing the "Digital Office"



Community Support: You’ll be the point of contact for our business owners. You’ll manage our online community platform (Skool), welcome new members, and make sure they have their digital workbooks and schedules.



Organization: You’ll keep our files, calendars, and student records organized in Google Workspace. You’re the person who makes sure the right
 goes out to the right person at the right time.



2. Being our "Digital Voice"



Social Media: The CEO will send you raw photos and videos from our events and training center. You will edit these into professional Reels, posts, and stories for Instagram and
.



Newsletters: You’ll help draft a weekly
 update to keep our community inspired and informed about what’s happening at the Hub.



3. Program Support



LaunchNashvilleNC: You’ll help track the progress of our 7 founding entrepreneurs, ensuring their training recordings are uploaded and their mentor meetings are scheduled.



This Job is For You If:

You’re a "Details" Person: You notice the small things (like a typo or a broken link) before anyone else does.



You’re Creative: You know how to use Canva and social media tools to make things look beautiful and professional.



You’re Tech-Savvy: You’re comfortable learning new platforms (we use Skool, Meta Business Suite, and Google Drive).



You’re a Self-Starter: Since this is a remote role, you are great at managing your own time and "owning" your tasks without being reminded.



How to Apply:

You must send us your resume, your
 address and a short video telling us:



1. One system you use to stay organized in your own life.



2. Why you love the idea of helping small business owners grow.



3. Your favorite "vibe" music (we love soulful, high-energy artists like Jill Scott!).



4. A voice sample of what skills you have to do the job



5. Your hourly rate

title: Web Designer & Developer (Elementor) – Design and Build High-Quality Pages
description:
About MSE Environmental



MSE Environmental is a national environmental testing and consulting company specializing in mold testing, asbestos inspections, lead testing, water analysis, and environmental compliance services.



Our team works with property owners, contractors, facility managers, and insurance professionals to identify environmental hazards and provide accurate testing and reporting.



We provide services such as mold inspections, indoor air quality testing, asbestos and lead testing, Legionella water testing, and Phase I Environmental Site Assessments.



As we continue expanding our digital presence across the United States, our website plays an important role in helping clients quickly find environmental testing services and request inspections through well-designed, mobile-friendly, and easy-to-use pages.



Role Overview



We are looking for a Web Designer and Developer who can both design and build high-quality pages using Elementor.



This role is not just about placing elements on a page. You must be able to create clean, well-structured, and visually appealing designs, while also building them efficiently.



We are looking for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and able to consistently complete tasks without constant supervision.



Your Responsibilities



Design and build pages using WordPress and Elementor

Create location-based service pages using templates while improving layout, structure, and visual presentation

Format pages with proper SEO structure (H1, H2, internal links, alt text)

Ensure pages are fully mobile responsive and optimized for all screen sizes

Maintain consistent formatting, spacing, and design across many pages

Apply strong design principles including layout, typography, and visual hierarchy

Optimize pages for both desktop and mobile user experience

Follow templates and internal SOPs

Communicate with the team using Slack and Asana



Tools We Use



WordPress

Elementor

Rank Math SEO

Google Search Console

Slack

Asana

Canva or Figma

SiteGround Hosting



Requirements

Strong experience as a Web Designer and Developer using Elementor

Ability to both design and build pages, not just follow templates

Strong eye for layout, spacing, typography, and visual hierarchy

Strong understanding of mobile-first and responsive design

Ability to ensure pages look clean and function properly on mobile, tablet, and desktop

Ability to consistently complete assigned pages without dropping tasks midway

High level of attention to detail and consistency across pages

Ability to work efficiently while maintaining quality

Reliable internet connection

Good English communication

Nice to Have

Experience with Rank Math

Experience building location pages

Basic understanding of SEO

Experience with Canva, Figma, or UI/UX tools

Salary



$800 to $900 USD per month

Approximately 44,000 to 50,000 PHP



Paid bi-monthly.



How To Apply



Please send the following to 

:



Your resume

Portfolio

Links to 3 websites you designed and built with Elementor

A short Loom video (1 minute) introducing yourself and explaining your Elementor experience, design approach, and how you handle mobile responsiveness



Subject line:

Elementor Website Builder Application

title: photographer and graphic designer
description:
We’re looking to hire a highly skilled Photoshop, packaging design, and product photography specialist to support our growing Amazon private-label business.

Our company develops and sells a range of physical consumer products, with a strong focus on premium positioning and high-converting listings. Visual presentation is critical to our success, and we are looking for someone who can execute at a high level across both packaging design and product imagery.

Your responsibilities will include designing product packaging (boxes, labels, inserts) with a clean, modern, high-end aesthetic, as well as editing and enhancing product photos for Amazon listings. This includes creating infographics, lifestyle images, and ensuring all visuals are optimized for conversion. You may also help guide shot lists and collaborate with photographers to ensure the right assets are captured.

You should be highly proficient in Photoshop and have strong experience with packaging design for physical products. A sharp eye for detail, strong layout and branding instincts, and the ability to produce polished, professional visuals are essential. Experience with Amazon listing images and an understanding of what drives clicks and conversions is a major advantage.

Clear and professional English communication is required, as you’ll be working closely with our team on revisions and creative direction.

Please respond with:

A brief summary of your experience

Examples of packaging design work and product photo editing (Amazon or e-commerce preferred)

The tools and workflow you use for packaging design and image editing

[About Us]

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: Executive / Administrative Virtual Assistant
description:
Role Overview

Ask Elly is seeking a highly skilled and proactive Executive / Administrative Virtual Assistant to provide comprehensive support to a busy professional. This is a full-time, long-term role suited for a self-starter who thrives in fast-paced environments with fluctuating workloads. The ideal candidate is tech-savvy, assertive, solutions-oriented, and committed to building a lasting working relationship.

Key Responsibilities

Serve as a trusted partner in day-to-day administrative operations, including drafting
s and communications for review and approval.

Set up and manage classes, courses, and events on Squarespace and Zoom.

Process meeting transcripts using AI tools (Claude) to extract action items, tasks, and responsibilities, and organize follow-ups accordingly.

Manage calendars, scheduling, and coordination through Calendly and Google Workspace.

Communicate effectively and responsively via Slack and
.

Anticipate needs, take initiative, and problem-solve independently when appropriate.

Maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information with discretion.

Create and maintain documentation and playbooks to support continuity.

Adapt to shifting priorities and varying workloads with professionalism and flexibility.



Required Tools & Platforms

Candidates must have hands-on experience with the following tools:

Squarespace

Zoom

Slack

Google Workspace

Calendly

Claude (AI)





Qualifications & Attributes

Minimum 3–5 years of experience in an executive assistant, administrative assistant, or equivalent role.

Strong command of English — both written and verbal communication.

Highly tech-savvy with the ability to quickly learn and adapt to new digital tools.

Assertive, confident communicator who can push back respectfully and advocate for clarity.

Demonstrated ability to manage competing priorities and fluctuating workloads without losing momentum.

Detail-oriented with excellent organizational skills.

Proactive problem-solver who takes ownership of tasks from start to finish.

Professional, discreet, and trustworthy — able to handle confidential information with care.

Experience working with AI-powered productivity tools is a strong advantage.

Comfortable with direct communication styles and fast-paced, dynamic work environments.

Genuinely interested in building a long-term working relationship and growing in the role.



Why Work with Ask Elly?

Prepaid monthly hours with unused time rolling over — no wasted effort.

Flexible scheduling with no long-term contracts.

Competitive compensation with performance bonuses paid directly by clients.

Signed NDA for all engagements — your work and the client's information stay protected.

Backup assistant coverage and a built-in playbook system to ensure continuity.

A collaborative, supportive team environment that values your growth.



How to Apply

Interested candidates will go through Ask Elly's thorough vetting process, which evaluates aptitude, attitude, personality, work ethic, relevant experience, and English communication skills. Background checks are required.

To be considered for this role, please submit your application through 
 look forward to meeting you!

You'll be a key contributor in keeping teams aligned, processes streamlined, and tasks executed with precision.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

s, and daily correspondence

• Proactive, resourceful, and dependable

• Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines

• Positive attitude and team-oriented mindset

PREFERRED (NICE TO HAVE)



• Experience in remote work environments

• Familiarity with project management tools

• Experience supporting executives or small teams

WHY JOIN ELLY?

• Flexible scheduling

• Long-term, stable opportunity

• Supportive and collaborative team

• Structured systems and playbooks

• Work with modern tools and AI-powered workflows

HOW TO APPLY



If you are a dedicated professional with a strong administrative background, please submit your resume and a brief introduction highlighting your relevant experience to:

title: Ecommerce Video Editor (Facebook Ads) – AI + UGC Style Videos – Project Based (Potential Long-Term)
description:
-About Us-

We are an eCommerce brand selling sock shoes for toddlers in the U.S. market.

Our brand focuses on creating high-converting
 video ads that help parents discover comfortable, safe, and easy-to-wear shoes for their children.

Website:



We are looking for a skilled Video Editor specialized in eCommerce advertising to help create high-converting video ads.

This is currently a project-based role, but if the collaboration goes well, it can expand into a long-term position with ongoing work.



-Project Scope-

We need 9
 ad videos created for this project.

For each video:

• Script will be provided

• Competitor reference videos will be provided

• Some B-roll footage will be provided

• Additional B-roll content will need to be created using AI tools

Each video is allocated 6 hours of work.

Project Total:

9 videos × 6 hours = 54 hours total

Hourly rate: $4 per hour

Total project value: $216



-Responsibilities-

Your role will include:

• Editing short-form
 ad videos for 

• Following provided scripts and ad structure

• Using competitor ads as references for pacing, hooks and storytelling

• Creating AI generated B-roll footage

• Integrating voiceover narration

• Adding background sound or music

• Creating high-engagement subtitles

• Building the final ad video ready to run on
 ads



-B-Roll Creation-

Some B-roll will be provided.

Additional B-roll must be created using AI tools.

Examples:

• Changing faces of people in the footage

• Changing clothing

• Changing environments / surroundings

• Generating B-roll between scenes

• Matching a start image and end image to create AI motion footage



These B-rolls will be used to support the story of the ad and keep viewers engaged.

-Subtitles & Engagement Editing-

Subtitles are mandatory in every video.

Requirements:

• Subtitles must look similar to CapCut default subtitle style

• Subtitles must appear frequently throughout the video

• Subtitles should help emphasize important parts of the script



Subtitles should be placed between B-roll transitions.

The goal is to:

• Keep viewers engaged

• Prevent drop-off

• Increase watch time

• Improve conversion rate



-Video Structure-



Each video should include everything required for a high converting eCommerce ad:

• Strong hook in the first 3 seconds

• B-roll transitions throughout the video

• Voiceover narration

• Subtitles

• Background sound or music

• Clear pacing that keeps viewers watching

• Final call-to-action

The final result should feel like a professional
 ad creative designed to convert.



-Required Skills-

We are specifically looking for editors with eCommerce advertising experience.

You should have experience with:

• Editing
 / TikTok ads

• Creating UGC style product videos

• Understanding direct response marketing

• Creating high engagement hooks



Technical skills required:

• CapCut / Premiere Pro / After Effects or similar

• Experience with AI video tools

• AI B-roll creation

• Face swap tools

• Motion text and subtitles



-Trial Task (Important)-

Reference video:



Trial task instructions:

Create the first 25 seconds of the video based on the reference.

Requirements:

• Follow the structure and pacing of the reference video

• Create B-roll segments that include the toddler sock shoes



For each B-roll scene:

• Use AI tools to replace the face

• Use AI tools to change clothing

• Keep the persona similar to the one in the reference video (same type of parent / toddler situation)



Environment requirements:

• The surroundings should stay very similar to the reference video

• However, the environment must be visibly different so it does not look like the original source



Goal:

The final result should look very similar in concept and storytelling, but not identical to the reference video.



The goal of the video is to create a high-engagement eCommerce ad that keeps viewers watching and increases the chance they will purchase the product.

This short trial helps us evaluate:

Bonus:

title: Senior Content & AEO Manager
description:
WHO WE ARE

Forterra Pest Control is a family-owned pest control company based in Dallas, Texas, USA. We are small but growing (40% Y/Y) with a strong reputation - over 2,000 Google reviews with an overall 5.0-star average.



We are looking to bring core marketing skills in house and want to find a senior expert who can lead our effort to become serious about content creation (across video and written media) and generating organic lead flow. We're targeting 50% year over year organic lead growth and are excited to bring on someone who can drive our company forward to achieve that. 



This person will own our Organic Growth strategy. 



We want to build a long-term relationship with the right person. We will invest in your skills, pay you well, and treat you like a real partner. In return, we are looking for someone who can own this channel end-to-end and operate solo until the whole process is dialed in. At that point we can scale the team after it's proven out. This person would be expected to move into that senior manager role as the team grows. 



COMPENSATION: We are willing to pay well for the right person. The ultimate compensation will reflect our view of that person's skill level and fit with this role. We are looking for a more senior role who can lead and guide, but isn't afraid to DO at the beginning to get things started. 



What you'll be expected to do:

- Identify gaps in our content library that align with customers' most important questions --> written and video content

- Produce the content that will drive traffic in the new AEO / GEO world

- Create plans for YouTube content, lead the editing (outsourced or insourced depending on your skill set)

- Build lead attribution infrastructure (integration between website, GoHighLevel, and any other tools needed)

- Own GBPs across 3 locations: posts, photos, and any other optimizations necessary

- Document SOPs as we scale

- Monitor key KPIs and be able to interpret them to make strategic adjustments

- Work alone and get things off the ground so we can start building a content machine team



Must-have skills:

- 3+ years in content marketing, SEO, or digital marketing with US-based local services businesses

- Knowledge and expertise in AEO and how LLMs find businesses

- AI fluency - knows how to maximize output and loves learning new tools (e.g., Claude/GPT, ElevenLabs, Midjourney, Runway, etc.)

- GoHighLevel experience

- Impeccable written English

- Social Media - familiar enough to be able to cross-post content across key channels: IG,
, Yelp

- Can interact with multiple stakeholders across the organization

- Hungry to learn 

- Not afraid to jump in and execute

- Strong, reliable internet and home work set-up

- Works the night shift so it fully aligns with US work hours



Nice-to-haves:

- Familiarity with Marcus Sheridan's books / frameworks: "Endless Customers" and "They Ask You Answer"

- YouTube channel growth

- Video editing skills - or can manage a 3rd party editor



This role is NOT a good fit for:

- Generalist VAs

- Pure writers who want briefs handed to them

- SEO technicians who don't want to create content

- Anyone uncomfortable with being a team of 1 for a period of time

- Anyone who isn't sure about coming into a new role and create something

- Anyone who needs to be told what to do



In order to apply, send the following:

Subject line should read "PEST - Senior Content & AEO - [your full name]"

If your subject line doesn't say this, I will ignore your application.



In the body of your
, I want you to include:

1. Three links to content you've personally produced for a US local services business (article, video, landing page, etc.). For each one, tell me in 2-3 sentences; a) what the goal of the content was, b) what you specifically did vs others, c) what the impact of the content was, and d) what you would do differently if you could



2. Answer this question in 150 words or less: "What's the difference between content that ranks in Google and content that gets cited by LLMs?"



3. Address the following: We are currently generating ~75 leads / month from organic channels (Website, GBPs, Yelp, current customer base). We are looking for at least 50% year over year growth. In 200 words, tell me: what would you prioritize in your first 4 months, and what would you NOT do?  Be opinionated. 'It depends' answers will be rejected. 



4. Your DISC profile



5. Confirmation that you will work the night shift



6. Your salary expectations in USD / month



Thank you

David
