title: Long-term Motion Graphics Designer for Australian Home Services Group (Ongoing Work)
description:
About Us:

We're an Australian home services group running multiple brands across HVAC, electrical, plumbing, and tech services. We have a stable, growing business with a small offshore team already based in the Philippines (digital marketing and operations). We're looking to add a motion graphics designer as a long-term member of our team, not a one-off freelancer.

This is a real ongoing role with steady work, not a single project. The right person will be working with us for years.



What You'll Be Doing:



Creating recruitment ads for each of our trade brands (HVAC, electrical, plumbing) across multiple Australian cities

Customer-facing ads for each brand

Editing real footage we capture: technicians on the job, customer interviews, founder-to-camera content

Social media cuts (TikTok, Instagram Reels,
)

Landing page videos

Internal training graphics and explainer videos

Brand video content as we launch new businesses



We have an active pipeline of work. Once you're onboarded and proving yourself, you will not run out of projects.



The First Project (How We'll Test Fit):

Your first task is a 32-second vertical recruitment ad for QuickAir, our HVAC brand, targeting qualified technicians in Perth.

Style: Voiceover-led motion graphics, no actors speaking to camera. Mix of authentic Australian B-roll, animated phone UI mockups, kinetic typography, clean graphics.

Reference: Watch the Lorca AI ad on YouTube (search "Lorca one place for all your AIs"). Also study Notion, Ramp, and Linear ads. That's the quality and style we're aiming for.

We will provide:



The voiceover script (locked, do not change)

The voiceover audio file (Australian male, generated)

Brand colour and logo

Detailed scene-by-scene direction (12 scenes mapped to the script)



You will deliver:



32-second 9:16 vertical MP4 with captions burned in

1:1 square version for
 feed

Editable project file (After Effects or Premiere)



If we're happy with this first ad, we move you onto a monthly retainer and you become our go-to designer.



Who We're Looking For:



2+ years of motion graphics experience (After Effects or Premiere)

Strong portfolio of kinetic typography or SaaS-style ads (Notion/Ramp/Linear style)

Ability to design clean phone UI mockups with realistic, legible text

Good English communication (written, comfortable on Slack)

Reliable internet and ability to work Australian-friendly hours for some overlap (Melbourne timezone)

Wants stable long-term work, not project-hopping





Why You Should Apply:



Stable Australian business with real revenue and growth

Long-term role, not gig work

Clear briefs, fair pay, paid on time, every time

We treat our team like partners, not vendors

Work with founder directly (no middleman)

Grow with the business as we expand to new brands and cities





To Apply, Please Send:



Your portfolio (link to showreel or 2-3 best examples of motion graphics ads)

Tell me about your experience with kinetic typography and UI mockup work

Your monthly rate expectation for ongoing retainer work

Why you want a long-term role over freelance project work

Confirm you can do a paid test project (the QuickAir ad described above) within 5-7 days

title: Remote Chart-Watching VA — Patience and Discipline Required
description:
We're hiring virtual assistants for a chart-watching role. Your job is simple to describe and harder to do well:

  watch a chart for 4 hours, click a button when a pattern appears, hold the position until the pattern reverses,

  then click again to close. That's it. No calls, no selling, no spreadsheets.



  The work rewards two qualities most jobs don't ask for: patience and discipline. The chart shows you the 
nts

  to act — but most of the shift is sitting and not clicking. The watchers who score well are the ones who can

  resist the temptation to act when nothing's happening, then act decisively when the pattern is clear.



  WHAT YOU'LL DO

  - 4-hour shifts at a fixed time slot (8am-12pm Chicago Time = 9pm-1am Manila Time)

  - Watch a chart with two colored lines and candlesticks

  - Click UP, DOWN, REVERSE, or EXIT buttons when the chart signals

  - Hold through small wiggles; only exit on real reversals



  WHAT WE PROVIDE

  - Full onboarding (~30 min walkthrough; the rest comes from doing)

  - A login to our system: username, password, hostname

  - A Team Lead available during your shift for any question

  - Hourly pay via PayPal/Wise/GCash; this is a performance-based role — consistent net-positive shifts are how the

   system evaluates whether you're a fit, and a steady pattern of green days is what keeps you on the team



  WHO THRIVES

  - People who can sit calmly at a screen for 4 hours without checking their phone every 5 minutes

  - People who don't get bored watching the same chart all day

  - People who've worked stable, repetitive jobs and enjoyed them — customer service tickets, chat support,

  transcription, long-form admin work

  - People who can resist the urge to "do something" when nothing's happening



  WHO DOESN'T THRIVE

  - People who need constant variety

  - People who get anxious when a position runs against them temporarily

  - People coming from stocks/crypto, IT-support, or developer backgrounds — surprisingly, those mindsets don't

  reward this work (the reflex to "fix what looks wrong" is the opposite of what the role needs)



  SKILLS REQUIRED: not many. Read English, click a button, stay at the screen. Reliability, patience, and

  discipline matter more than any technical skill. Background in customer service, chat support, transcription, or

  long-form admin work is a strong fit.



  HOW TO APPLY

  In your application message, please answer these three questions:

  1. A time you waited patiently for something — a long shift handling tickets, a multi-year client relationship,

  hours of careful paperwork, a slow holiday — and how you stayed calm

  2. Your typical 4-hour availability window in your timezone (we work 9pm-1am Manila Time)

  3. Anything else you want us to know



  We'll respond within 48 hours. Good fits get a login and a brief onboarding call with their Team Lead.

title: senior accountant
description:
**Senior Accountant – We’re Looking for Someone Who Knows Their Stuff**



We’re on the lookout for a solid **Senior Accountant** who can hit the ground running and take ownership of their work. If you’re someone who enjoys getting things done properly, on time, and without cutting corners, you’ll fit right in.



You’ll be trusted to manage your own jobs from start to finish — keeping things on budget, making sure everything reconciles, and delivering clean, accurate results every time.

* Salary based on your experience

* Holiday pay

* Performance bonuses

* A straightforward, supportive work environment where people just get on with it



If you’re a capable accountant who likes doing things properly and wants a role where you’re trusted to deliver, we’d like to hear from you.

mber based in the Philippines to help us generate new business opportunities.

are strong at research and finding hard-to-reach decision-makers

want a long-term role with growth potential

title: Cold Calling Sales Representative | DISRUPTORS MEDIA LLC
description:
About Disruptors Media



We are an AI-first marketing agency based in Utah, serving contractors, trades, medical, legal, and professional service businesses doing $300K or more in annual revenue. We operate as the fractional CMO and Chief AI Officer for our clients, combining strategy, content, and AI systems that produce measurable outcomes.



Our content engine drives inbound. Our cold calling engine drives outbound. Both feed the same pipeline, and we are scaling the outbound side fast. That is where you come in.



The Role



As our Cold Calling Sales Rep, you are the tip of the spear. You will dial service business owners across the US every single day, open conversations from a cold start, and book qualified discovery calls for our founders and client success managers.



This is a phone-first role. If the idea of 80 to 120 dials a day excites you instead of drains you, keep reading. We will give you the lists, the scripts, the AI research tools, and the call coaching. You bring the voice, the resilience, and the closing instinct on the meeting ask.



What You Will Own



Hitting the phones daily with a target of 80 to 120 outbound dials, focused on service business owners in our target verticals. Working pre-built call lists out of Apollo, Clay, and our internal data systems, while flagging which segments convert and which do not. Booking qualified discovery calls onto founder and CSM calendars, with a weekly meeting quota you will own. Following up on no-answers, voi
s, and soft maybes with a multi-touch cadence across phone, SMS, and
. Maintaining a clean CRM in GoHighLevel with accurate call dispositions, notes, and next actions on every record. Running A/B tests on openers, objection responses, and meeting asks, then sharing what works with the team. Reporting weekly on dials, connect rate, conversation rate, booked meeting rate, and show rate. Feeding intelligence back to marketing: what objections come up most, which industries are hot, what messaging is landing.



What You Bring



Required

One or more years in a cold calling, outbound SDR, or telesales role with documented dial volume and booked meeting numbers. A track record of hitting or beating outbound meeting quotas in a high-activity environment. Thick skin. You understand that 90 percent of cold calls do not convert, and you do not let the 90 percent affect how you sound on call 91. A confident, conversational phone voice that does not sound scripted, robotic, or apologetic. Quick thinking on objections. You can handle “not interested,” “send me an
,” and “we already have someone” without losing 
ntum. Strong organizational skills and comfort living inside a CRM and a dialer. Reliable internet, a quiet workspace, a quality headset, and availability during US business hours (Mountain Time overlap preferred).



Nice to Have

Experience with GoHighLevel, Apollo, Clay, or power dialers like Orum, PhoneBurner, or Aircall. Familiarity selling to service business owners (contractors, trades, medical, legal). Experience selling marketing, agency, or AI services. Fluency with AI tools for pre-call research and message drafting (Claude, ChatGPT, Clay enrichment, etc.). A natural curiosity about the businesses you are calling, not just the script.



Compensation and Perks

Competitive base salary with per-meeting commission on every qualified booked call, plus uncapped bonus on closed revenue fro
etings you set. Clear promotion path into Account Executive or Client Success Manager for strong performers. Remote-first role with flexible structure inside a US Mountain Time working window. Paid access to dialer, CRM, list-building tools, and the AI software we use internally. Direct mentorship from the founders. You will be in the room when strategy is built, not after.



How to Apply



Send the following to our hiring inbox:



Your resume or LinkedIn profile. A brief note on your best cold calling month ever: how many dials, how many meetings booked, and what you were selling. Your expected base salary and per-meeting commission structure.



We move quickly on hires. Top candidates will hear back within a week. If you love the phone and want to build a career inside a fast-moving AI-first agency, apply today.

title: Senior WordPress Developer – Remote
description:
Senior WordPress Developer – Remote



We're a digital agency handling a range of client projects — from custom-built WordPress themes to complex plugin work and WooCommerce stores. We're looking for a senior developer who genuinely understands WordPress at a deep level, not just someone who assembles pages with a builder and calls it development.



If you can architect a theme from scratch, write a plugin without leaning on tutorials, and still know your way around Elementor when a client needs it — this role was written for you.



What you'll be working on:



    Building custom WordPress themes from scratch (no starter-theme dependency required, but sensible use of one is fine)

    Developing and customizing plugins — hooks, filters, REST API, CPTs, meta boxes, the works

    WooCommerce customization — custom checkout flows, payment gateway integration, order management tweaks, custom product types

    Page builder work with Elementor when projects call for it (custom widgets, dynamic data, theme builder)

    Making architecture decisions independently and flagging tradeoffs to the team

    Code reviews, performance audits, and keeping things maintainable long-term



What we're looking for:



    4+ years of hands-on WordPress development — not just usage

    Strong PHP fundamentals; WordPress is the context, not the crutch

    Proven experience with custom theme development (we'll ask to see real work)

    Solid WooCommerce knowledge beyond the basics

    Comfortable with the full stack: HTML/CSS, JavaScript (vanilla or jQuery), Git

    Familiarity with ACF, REST API, and multisite setups is a plus

    Self-directed — you don't need someone to break down every task for you



Do NOT apply through OnlineJobs.ph.



Send your application directly to:  



Your application should include:



    Your resume (PDF preferred)

    A Loom video — walk us through a WordPress project you're proud of. Show the site, the code, or both. Talk through the decisions you made — theme structure, plugin approach, WooCommerce setup, whatever's relevant. Under 5 minutes is plenty.

    Any personality or skills assessment results you have (DISC, 16Personalities, Enneagram, or similar)



Before you hit send — please read this:



Write your application the way you'd talk to a colleague. No AI-generated cover letters, no corporate-sounding introductions, no buzzword soup. I'm not grading your English — I'm trying to get a sense of who you actually are and how you think. A real, honest
 from a real developer will always stand out more than a perfectly formatted one that says nothing.

description:

We are looking for a proactive and motivated Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our growing real estate team. The SDR will play a key role in generating new business opportunities by engaging potential clients, nurturing leads, and setting qualified appointments for our agent team. title: Full Stack Developer – Senior – React / .NET / Azure

 Core and Azure services.

s, etc)

title: Customer Service Representative — Women's Fashion E-Commerce Store (Full-Time)
description:
I'm building a fast-growing women's fashion brand and I need a reliable, friendly, and detail-oriented customer service representative to be the voice of our brand. This is a ground-floor opportunity — we're still early, so
 volume is low right now, which means you'll have plenty of time to learn the products, the brand, and our systems before things get busy.

If you prove yourself, there's a real path to becoming a Customer Service Manager as we scale and bring on more reps.



About Us:

We run a Shopify-based women's fashion store selling dresses, shoes, and accessories to US customers. We're growing fast through Google Ads and social media. Right now customer inquiries are light, but as we scale ad spend and product catalog, volume will pick up quickly — that's why we're hiring now, so you're trained and ready when it does.

What You'll Be Doing:



Respond to customer
s professionally and promptly (target: within 24 hours)

Handle order inquiries — shipping status, tracking updates, delivery timelines

Process return and refund requests following our policies

Resolve complaints with patience, empathy, and a solution-first mindset

Communicate with suppliers when needed for order issues (wrong item, damaged, delays)

Update and maintain customer records

Flag recurring issues or product problems to management

Help improve our FAQ and response templates based on common questions

Provide a customer experience that makes people want to buy from us again



What We're Looking For:

Must Have:

Previous customer service experience in e-commerce (fashion industry experience is strongly preferred)

Excellent written English — you'll be communicating with American customers, so your responses need to feel natural and professional

Friendly, patient, and solution-oriented personality

Experience with Shopify (viewing orders, checking tracking, processing returns)

Comfortable using
, Google Sheets, and basic helpdesk tools

Reliable, organized, and able to work independently without constant supervision



Nice to Have:



Experience handling chargebacks or payment disputes

Experience working with US-based customers specifically

Basic knowledge of women's fashion (sizing, fabrics, styling)



What We're NOT Looking For:



Copy-paste responses that sound robotic

Someone who disappears without communication

Someone who argues with customers instead of solving problems

Someone who needs to be reminded to check
s



Growth Opportunity:

This is not just a job — it's a career opportunity. We're scaling fast and will need multiple customer service reps in the coming months. The first hire will have the opportunity to become the Customer Service Manager, training and overseeing new reps as the team grows. If you're someone who wants to grow with a brand, not just fill a seat, this is for you.

Working Conditions:



Remote position

Training and SOPs provided

Ongoing, long-term position for the right candidate

title: Land Pricing Specialist — Google Sheets / Real Estate Data
description:
We are hiring a detail-oriented virtual assistant for a U.S.-based land investing company.



Your job will be simple but important: price vacant land markets accurately inside Google Sheets.



This role requires focus, accuracy, and the ability to follow instructions exactly.



Do not apply if you rush, guess, ignore details, or need constant reminders.



What You Will Do:

- Work in Google Sheets

- Price vacant land records

- Follow our SOPs exactly

- Check your own work before submitting

- Catch mistakes in data and pricing

- Ask clear questions when something does not make sense

- Complete assigned work on time



This role is a fit for you if you are:

- Careful

- Analytical

- Reliable

- Good with spreadsheets

- Good with numbers

- Honest about mistakes

- Able to work independently

- Comfortable doing repetitive work

- Willing to be trained



Pay

Base compensation is $600/month when the assigned production and quality goal is met. There will also be a $50 commission for every deal that the company sells.

- This is not hourly pay. This is results-based pay.

- If you complete 100% of the assigned goal at the required quality standard, you receive 100% of the monthly pay.

- If you complete less than the assigned goal, pay is reduced proportionally.

- Poor-quality work does not count. Rework does not count as extra work.

- Sloppy or inconsistent work will result in the role ending quickly. Clear quality standards will be provided in writing, so expectations are explicit.



Application Deadline:

Applications must be submitted no later than Saturday, May 2nd, at 6:00 PM MST.

Late submissions will not be reviewed.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Applications that do not follow instructions exactly will not be reviewed.



Step 1: Complete the application task

Note:

The application task includes a short Loom video with step-by-step instructions. Some steps may require careful review, judgment, and copying work exactly as demonstrated. This is intentional and reflects the level of attention to detail required for this role. This task rewards careful observation more than speed.



Download the sample CSV file here or make a copy:


/spreadsheets/d/1BuohMF-Bi1LjQH5ABj7nBvOJQG5hm3_i8cFP9USBUig/edit?usp=sharing



Using Excel or Google Sheets, watch the Loom and complete the following steps exactly:


/share/2b7ebadca00b
fd970cdbf



Pricing Input for This Test:

Use a PPA of $5,000 for all Column L.



Cash Offer will be 50% of Market Value (Column M)



Duplicates Formula is the following:

=IF(COUNTIF($F:$F,F2)>1,"Duplicate","")



Export the final file as a CSV.



Step 2: Submit your submission on OnlineJobsPH



Subject line (must match exactly):

STILLPOINT – Pricing Specialist Application



Your submission must include all of the following:

1. The completed CSV file

2. File name format:

Stillpoint_ListCleaningTest.csv

3. Your resume



Important Notes

- Do not guess or go beyond the instructions

- Do not change column order or column names

- Do not submit screenshots or links — CSV file only

- Missing attachments, incorrect file names, or incorrect subject lines will result in rejection



Applicants who pass this step will be considered for the role.

title: Static Ad Designer - DTC / E-Commerce (Remote, Freelance)
description:
Creative studio producing performance ads for DTC brands on Meta is looking for someone who can build scroll-stopping static ads in Canva — fast. This isn't traditional graphic design. The ads we make are intentionally raw, native, and ugly. Notes app screenshots, fake text conversations, tweet-style posts, Reddit formats, before/afters, text-on-blank callouts. If it looks like something a real person posted instead of something a brand designed, that's what we're going for.



You'll be working from copy and format direction provided by our creative team. Your job is to take that direction and build the static quickly and accurately, matching the native format so closely that viewers don't realize it's an ad until they've already read it. Speed matters more than perfection. We'd rather you produce 15 solid statics in a week than 5 perfect ones.





What you'll be doing



- Building 15-20+ static ad creatives per week in Canva across multiple DTC client accounts

- Recreating native social formats — Notes app, iMessage, tweets, Reddit posts, review screenshots, 
s, comparison charts

- Working from creative briefs with headline copy, format direction, and visual references

- Turning around revisions within 24 hours

- Maintaining organized files with consistent naming conventions





What you need



- Strong proficiency in Canva — this is your primary tool

- An eye for what looks native on Instagram and
 feeds versus what looks designed

- Speed — you should be able to build a clean static in 10-15 minutes from a brief

- Familiarity with DTC or e-commerce brands and how they advertise on social media

- Reliable with deadlines and communicative when things come up





What you don't need



- Adobe Illustrator or Photoshop expertise — we work in Canva

- A portfolio full of polished brand design — that's the opposite of what we do

- Motion graphics or animation skills





Details



- Remote, freelance

- Monthly retainer

- Consistent weekly work with room to grow as the studio scales





To apply



D
 with 3-5 examples of social media graphics or static ads you've created. Tell me which ugly static ad format stops YOUR scroll when you're browsing Instagram.



Skills: Canva, Social Media Advertising, E-Commerce

description:
Growing e-commerce creative studio is looking for a graphic designer to create social media ad creatives for multiple brands. You'll be designing static image ads that run as paid media on
 and Instagram. The style is clean, simple, and scroll-stopping — not complex or heavily branded. Think bold headlines, clear visuals, and minimal clutter.



You'll be working from briefs provided by our creative team with copy, layout direction, and references. Your job is to bring those briefs to life quickly and accurately, producing ad creatives that grab attention and drive clicks.





What you'll be doing

- Creating a variety of ad formats — headline-driven, comparison, testimonial, product feature, offer-based, and lifestyle

- Working from creative briefs with copy and visual direction provided

- Producing 10-20+ creatives per week across multiple accounts

- Turning around revisions quickly and maintaining organized file delivery





What you need



- Proficiency in Canva and/or Figma for fast ad production

- Experience creating social media ads or branded content for e-commerce or DTC companies

- Understanding of what performs on
 and Instagram — you know what stops someone mid-scroll

- Clean, simple design instincts — you can communicate a message visually without overcomplicating it

- Reliable, communicative, and comfortable working independently from briefs





What you don't need



- A degree in graphic design

- Advanced Photoshop or Illustrator skills

- Experience with print, packaging, or brand identity design





Details



- Remote, freelance

- Monthly retainer

- Steady weekly workload with growth potential





To apply



D
 with 3-5 examples of social media ads or graphics you've designed for e-commerce or DTC brands. Short and sweet — just show the work.

title: Operations Specialist - Real Estate
description:
Operations Specialist – Real Estate (Remote, Agent-Facing)

Bramlett Partners | Remote (Philippines) | Full-time Contractor 

Salary: $2,000 – $2,500 USD/month + performance bonuses 

Schedule: Austin, TX business hours overlap required (6+ hours/day, CST) 

Start Date: ASAP — target May 2026



About Bramlett Partners



Bramlett Partners is the fastest-growing independent residential real estate brokerage in Austin, Texas. We support approximately 148 agents who close 1,300+ transactions and over $775 million in volume annually. Our operating philosophy is simple: amazing client service drives 5-star reviews and referrals, and technology and systems are how we scale that standard without adding complexity.



We are a technology-forward brokerage. Every team member is expected to use AI daily to work faster, smarter, and more independently.



The Role



You will be the operational backbone behind agent onboarding, customer support, and our leads program oversight. You report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with our documentation specialist and the agent success team. Your job is execution: making sure nothing falls through the cracks, agents get onboarded smoothly, support tickets get resolved quickly, and our leads program participants are held accountable to standards.



This is an agent-facing role. You will interact directly with US-based real estate agents through
, our internal community platform, and video calls. You are the first impression for new agents joining the brokerage and an ongoing point of contact for support. Professionalism, warmth, and clear communication are not optional.



This is not a passive role. You will be expected to identify problems before they escalate, suggest process improvements, and use AI tools to multiply your output. If you need to be told what to do every day, this is not the right fit.



What You Will Own



-Agent Onboarding — Run the onboarding checklist for every new agent, send weekly status updates, provision system access, and ensure nothing is dropped. Success metric: zero onboarding tasks dropped, agent satisfaction 4.5/5 or higher.

-Customer Support (Tier 1) — Resolve front-line tickets alongside our documentation lead. Target first response under 4 business hours. Escalate complex issues with full context.

-CDA Processing — Verify and file Commission Disbursement Authorizations. 100% processed within 24 hours. Flag exceptions to your manager.

-Leads Program Oversight — Audit agent activity in our CRM, listen to lead calls for quality, prepare weekly accountability reports based on data, not opinions.

-Documentation QA — Help keep our internal knowledge base accurate, current, and useful.



Onboarding (First 90 Days)



-Days 1–30: Learn our systems and the Bramlett operating playbook. Own onboarding checklist execution. Handle Tier 1 support alongside our documentation lead. Daily video check-ins with your manager.

-Days 31–60: Add CDA processing. Begin drafting agent communications and templates using Claude. Identify recurring support patterns.

-Days 61–90: Add leads accountability monitoring. Produce weekly reports. Daily check-ins transition to weekly 1:1s as you demonstrate independence.



AI Proficiency – Hard Requirement



This is not a nice-to-have. Every member of our operations team uses AI daily, and you will be evaluated on your ability to use AI tools to work faster and produce higher-quality output.



Minimum expectations:



-Proficient with Claude or ChatGPT for drafting communications, summarizing information, and problem-solving

-Able to write effective prompts that produce usable first drafts

-Comfortable using AI to research unfamiliar topics and synthesize findings

-Willing to experiment with new AI tools without hand-holding

-You will be tested on this in the interview. If you have never used AI tools in a work context, please do not apply.



Must Have



-Excellent written and spoken English. You will communicate with US-based real estate agents on camera and via
.

-Professional on-camera presence and a clean, professional home office setup

-Demonstrated experience using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent) in a real work context

-Experience with CRM systems, ticketing platforms, or operations tools

-Strong attention to detail — this role is compliance-adjacent and errors have real consequences

-Initiative — you identify what needs to happen and do it before being asked

-Reliable, fast internet

-Ability to overlap with Austin, TX business hours (CST) for at least 6 hours daily



Nice to Have



-Experience working for a real estate brokerage, property management firm, or related business

-Familiarity with Follow Up Boss, CallRail, HelpScout, or similar platforms

-Project management or process documentation experience

-Comfort with spreadsheets, basic data analysis, and dashboards

-Experience with no-code/low-code tools (Replit, Lovable, etc.)



We Will Not Move Forward With Candidates Who



-Cannot present professionally on camera with clear, understandable English

-Have no demonstrated experience using AI tools in a work context

-Require constant direction

-Cannot commit to consistent Austin business hours overlap



Tools You Will Use



-MGMT Portal (proprietary tool for agent onboarding, production tracking, product management, internal dashboard)

-FollowUpBoss

-SuperPortal (proprietary transaction management tool)

-Claude + Claude Projects

-Google Workspace

-Slack 



How to Apply



To be considered, please upload your resume and complete all the assessments at: 



Please include:



-Your resume

-A 2-minute video (or Loom or unlisted YouTube link) introducing yourself — camera on, no slides. We need to see and hear you.

-A short written answer to this question: Describe a time you used AI to solve a work problem. What tool did you use, what was the problem, and what was the result?



Applications missing the video, the AI example, or the keyword will not be reviewed.



We respond to every qualified application within 5 business days.

title: Content Strategist & Manager
description:
We are looking for a Senior Content Strategist and Social Media Manager who brings deep, earned expertise to this role. Someone who already knows how social media works at a strategic level — the psychology behind why content stops the scroll, the difference between awareness content and conversion content, why what works on one platform fails on another, and how to build a content strategy that actually grows an account and drives sales.



This is a collaborative role. You will work directly with Keenya. She shares what is happening in the business — the offers, the webinars, the content drops, the priorities — and you build the strategy on top of that. You bring the thinking. You bring the plan. You do not wait to be told what to post.



What We Learned From Our Last Hire

We have been through this search recently and we know what we are looking for. The person we want understands the psychology of content at a deep level. They know the difference between content that builds awareness with cold audiences and content that converts warm audiences into buyers. They can look at a business and immediately understand how to translate what is happening in that business into a content strategy that grows and sells. If that description fits you, keep reading.



What You Will Do

Content Strategy

Receive a weekly briefing from Keenya and build a full multi-platform content strategy around it — without being told what to post, how many times to post, or what angle to take



Come to every week with a proactive plan that accounts for growth content, authority content, and conversion content across every platform



Understand the audience at each stage of the funnel — cold audiences who have never heard of Keenya, warm audiences who follow but have not bought, and existing buyers who need to ascend — and write content that speaks correctly to each stage



Think about content the way a marketer does — every post has a purpose, a target, and a measurable goal

Identify what is working, what is not, and bring data-informed observations to Keenya proactively



Content Creation

Write captions, scripts, and hooks for all platforms — formatted, platform-specific, and ready to use with no reformatting needed



Write short-form video scripts and hooks that Keenya can film — with awareness versus conversion content clearly distinguished in your approach



Write promotional content for webinars, offers, challenges, and launches that is built to convert, not just inform



Write in Keenya's voice — direct, warm, faith-forward, and conversational. Not in your voice. Not in a marketing template. Hers.



Adapt content intelligently across platforms — what you write for
 is not what you write for YouTube, and you know why



Platform Management



Manage the content calendar and keep it one full week ahead at all times



Schedule and publish content on all managed platforms on time, every time



Promote the newsletter, both podcasts, and YouTube content every single week without being reminded — this is a standing, non-negotiable responsibility



Engage with comments and community interactions on managed platforms



Monitor platform performance and bring strategic observations to Keenya weekly



Weekly Planning & Communication

Submit a complete weekly content plan every Monday — a real strategic plan, not a list of post topics



Bring at least one proactive strategic insight or content idea each week that Keenya did not ask for



Communicate proactively and clearly — no going quiet, no missing deadlines without early notice



Study the business before building the strategy — you cannot build a strategy for a business you have not taken the time to understand



Who You Are

You have years of real social media strategy experience — not just posting experience, but strategic experience where you have been responsible for account growth and conversion results



You understand the psychology of content deeply. You know why certain content stops the scroll, why certain hooks work on cold audiences and others do not, and why awareness content and conversion content require completely different approaches



You can look at a business and immediately start thinking about how to translate what that business does into a content strategy that grows and sells — without needing everything handed to you



You are the person in the room who knows things others do not. You bring ideas, frameworks, and strategic perspective that add real value



You write well. Captions, scripts, hooks, promotional copy — you do all of it at a high level and you do it in someone else's voice without it sounding like you



You are proactive by default. You do not wait to be told. You bring the plan, you flag the opportunities, you ask the questions that need asking before problems happen



You thrive in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment where priorities shift and speed matters



What We Mean By Awareness vs. Conversion Content

This distinction matters to us and we want anyone applying for this role to understand it clearly before they apply.



Platforms

You will be building strategy for and managing content across multiple platforms. The exact scope will be confirmed during the interview based on your experience and strengths.



Platform

Notes


64,000+ followers. Relationship and conversion platform. Your primary execution platform.

YouTube

9,600+ subscribers. Authority and education platform. Strategy and promotion.

LinkedIn

5,400+ followers. Thought leadership platform. Consistent posting and repurposing.

Threads

Active account. Conversational, insight-driven content.

Instagram 33,800 & TikTok 514,000

You will write scripts and hooks for these platforms. Keenya manages all filming and posting on both herself.





Tools We Use

Tool

Purpose

ManyChat

DM automation and comment keyword triggers on Instagram and

Canva

Graphics, carousels, and visual content creation

Metricool

Scheduling and analytics

Notion

Content calendar and project management

Meta Business Suite

 and Instagram management

YouTube Studio

YouTube content management

Google Drive

File storage and team collaboration



How to Apply

To be considered, please submit all of the following. Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed.



A brief introduction — who you are, your background in social media strategy, and why this role fits where you are in your career

Two or three examples of your strategic work — content calendars, strategy documents, campaign plans, or written content you have produced for a client or employer

title: Amazon PPC Manager – Results-Focused, Ownership Required
description:
**Job Description:**



We’re looking for a **high-ownership Amazon PPC Manager** to manage and scale Sponsored Products campaigns for a growing e-commerce brand (6FT CLUB).



This is NOT a passive VA role.



You will be responsible for:



* optimizing campaigns

* identifying profitable opportunities

* cutting wasted spend

* and helping scale revenue



You will be working with a **clear system + SOP**, but we expect you to **think, execute, and improve performance—not just follow instructions blindly**.



---



**Responsibilities:**



* Manage Amazon Sponsored Products campaigns (manual + product targeting)

* Optimize bids, budgets, and targeting based on performance

* Identify and scale winning keywords and ASIN targets

* Pause or fix underperforming targets (based on defined rules)

* Build new campaigns (Exact, Phrase, Product Targeting)

* Maintain clean campaign structure (no clutter, no duplication)

* Provide short, clear daily/weekly updates (no fluff)



---



**What We’re Looking For:**



* Experience with Amazon PPC (Sponsored Products REQUIRED)

* Strong understanding of:



  * ACOS / ROAS

  * Keyword targeting vs Product targeting

  * Campaign structure

* Ability to **take ownership and solve problems**

* Not afraid to test, adjust, and make decisions

* Clear communicator (short, direct updates)



---



**What We DO NOT want:**



* “Let it run and gather data” mindset

* People who stop at the first problem

* Generic reports with no action

* Someone who needs constant hand-holding



---



**Performance Expectations:**



* Improve efficiency (lower ACOS over time)

* Identify and scale profitable campaigns

* Take action based on data (not guesswork)



---



## ???? REQUIRED TEST TASK (MANDATORY)



To apply, answer this:



**Scenario:**



1. You are running a Sponsored Products campaign.



* Spend: $50

* Clicks: 25

* Orders: 0



**Question:**

???? What exact action would you take and why?



2. How do you use automatic campaigns in Amazon PPC?



Explain:



1. What their purpose is

2. How long you run them

3. What you do with the data





---



**Bonus Question:**



If a product targeting campaign is performing well on a competitor ASIN, what would you do next to scale it?



---



## ???? Compensation:



* Based on experience

* Performance-based bonuses available



---



## ???? To Apply:



Start your application with:



???? “I take ownership”



Then answer the test questions.



Applications without this will be ignored.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Virtual Assistant / Appointment Setter / Client Success Manager (CSM)



Remote | Base + Commission + Bonuses

Full-Time | U.S. Construction Industry



About Us



We are a fast-growing digital marketing agency that helps U.S.-based construction businesses (landscapers, contractors, hardscapers, concrete companies, and home service providers) generate consistent, high-quality leads and turn them into booked appointments. Our systems focus on performance, communication, and long-term client success.



We are currently looking for a high-level Appointment Setter / Client Success Manager (CSM) to join our remote team and play a key role in lead conversion and client satisfaction.



This position is ideal for someone who is articulate, organized, confident, and understands how to communicate professionally with American homeowners and business owners.



Role Overview



This is a dual-role position combining:



Appointment Setting for warm homeowner leads



Client Success Management for ongoing client communication and feedback



You will be responsible for ensuring leads are properly handled, appointments are booked, and clients feel supported, informed, and taken care of.



Key Responsibilities

Appointment Setting



Call warm homeowner leads provided by our marketing systems



Qualify leads and book appointments for our construction clients



Follow up with leads via phone, SMS, and CRM notes



Maintain high booking rates and professional communication



Client Success Management



Call clients regularly to gather feedback on lead quality and service performance



Identify issues, concerns, or improvement opportunities



Report feedback clearly to the internal team



Ensure client satisfaction and strengthen relationships



Communication & Coordination



Act as the main communication bridge between clients and internal departments



Ensure information is accurately transferred and followed up



Keep detailed notes and updates in the CRM and tracking systems



Requirements



English level: C2 (Fluent) with a neutral accent ONLY

(Absolutely no strong accents – this role requires regular Zoom calls with U.S. clients)



Comfortable speaking confidently on Zoom with American business owners



Working hours 8AM - 5PM PST



Professional home office setup with:



Clean, presentable background



Stable internet connection



Clear microphone and camera



Prior experience in:



Appointment setting



Client success



Customer service



Call center or outbound dialing (preferred)



Excellent:



Communication skills



Time management



Organization



Follow-up consistency



Attention to detail



What We Offer



Base salary + commission + performance bonuses



Long-term role with room for growth



Consistent workflow and stable leads



Remote work flexibility



Opportunity to grow into senior roles inside the company



Performance-based incentives and recognition



We are building a serious, structured company with long-term vision. If you are reliable, ambitious, and professional, this is a role where you can grow with us.



! IMPORTANT APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS !



Applications that do NOT follow these steps will NOT be reviewed.



Start your application message with EXACTLY the following sentence:

"I read the sentence and I don’t have an accent."



After that, send a 2–3 minute video introducing yourself covering:



Your experience in appointment setting / client success



Why you believe you're a great fit for this role



Your communication style and confidence working with U.S. clients



Who This Role Is For



Professionals who speak flawless English

People who enjoy talking to clients and building relationships

High-performers who want stable income + growth

Detail-oriented individuals who care about results and client satisfaction

title: Facebook Ads Specialist / Meta Media Buyer - Landscaping Agency
description:
We run
 and Instagram ads exclusively for landscaping, pool, and outdoor contractor companies across the US. Our clients spend $2,000–$3,000/month on ads and we manage everything for them — campaigns, creatives, reporting, and results.



We're growing and need a full-time Meta Ads Specialist to own the ad accounts for 15–20 of our landscaping clients. This is a stable, long-term role with a US company that's been operating for years. We pay monthly via Wise.



What you'll do



— Set up, launch, and optimize
 and Instagram campaigns for 
–20 landscaping clients

— Monitor daily performance and make adjustments before small issues become expensive ones

— Test ad copy, audiences, and creatives with our creative team

— Keep CPL (cost per lead) &  cost per appointment within target — this is your main KPIs

— Work with our account managers and video team on new angles and offers



What we're looking for



— 2+ years running
/Meta Ads in Ads Manager (not just boosting posts)

— Experience with lead generation campaigns for local or service businesses

— You can manage multiple accounts without losing track — organized and proactive

— You flag problems before being asked, not after

— Decent written English — you'll update our team on Slack daily

— Bonus: experience with home services, contractors, or local businesses

— Bonus: familiar with GoHighLevel (GHL)



How to apply — read this carefully



Start your message with: "GOAT ADS — [your answer]"



Fill in your answer to this question: If a campaign's cost per lead suddenly doubled in 3 days with no creative or budget changes — what's the first thing you check and why?



Any application that does not start with this exact format will not be read.



Also include a Loom video (5-10 minutes max) covering:



Walk us through how you would set up a campaign for this client:

Landscaping company in San Jose, CA. In business 10+ years. Services: landscaping, concrete, pools. Has a good in-house design team.

Cover: target audience, ad copy and creative ideas, campaign structure, and how you'd optimize it week 1.



If anything is unclear, message us your questions before recording. We'd rather you ask than guess.

title: Technical Content & Operations Assistant (IT/EA)
description:
Job Post 1: Technical Content & Operations Assistant (IT/EA)

Role Overview:

I am the Product Strategist for TheShmuz. We are a small, highly agile core team driving a well-established, 15+ year-old non-profit. Because we manage a massive library of audio and video content for a large audience, our technical infrastructure is complex, but our team culture remains tight-knit and fast-paced.



We are currently revamping our website, mobile app, and integrating Kajabi. I need a highly organized Technical EA to manage my daily workflow, consolidate documentation, ensure our content distribution is flawless, and ensure that we execute on our highest priorities.



Note : Strong IT management experience is an advantage.



Core Responsibilities:



Keep me focused on priority tasks, being eager to take over those tasks where you can handle most of them first time



Strong Organization skills - to get my files, folders and document content (technical and general management notes) consolidated and nicely organised.



Be happy to work with my ADD type personality/mind - ie help keep us focussed and making notes of all the itesm i need to get done, and often reminding me of most impoirtant prioritises to get back on track



Structure daily 10-20 minute pdaily and weekly planning sessions and prepare weekly accomplishment reports.



Audit content across Vimeo, YouTube, Spotify, and Instagram to ensure all content is on all platforms, then to load up missing/fix existing content and/or links  or work with person who does this for us to get it done.



Execute web ops or ensure tasks get done by hosting company (DNS updates, domain management,
 deliverability) and Kajabi/WordPress administrative tasks.



Interface with third-party online services to understand, troubleshoot, and implement improvements to our hosting and systems infrastructure.



Requirements:



Strong English to understand each other first time



Empathic and patient, but strong enough to suggest best way forward given priorities on documentation we will work on together.



Highly practical and collaborative.



Comfortable diving into third-party platforms to understand how they work and how to optimize our setup. Familiarity with Google Cloud / Firebase is preferable.



Proactive but strictly adheres to boundaries; must be comfortable asking questions.



Strong English communication for managing external business relationships.



WordPress/Kajabi experience is highly preferred.



Required Application Questions:



Start your reply with the word "Prioritize". Provide a simple 1-2-3 step example of how you would organize a busy IT Manager's scattered daily tasks.



Kajabi & WordPress Experience: Describe a specific instance where you managed a WordPress backend or worked within Kajabi. What were your responsibilities?



Infrastructure Problem Solving: Give an example of a time you had to log into a third-party service or hosting platform you weren't fully familiar with to fix or improve a system setup. How did you handle it?



Role Comprehension: In your own words, what is the primary goal of this position?



Proof of Execution: Provide 2-3 links or screenshots of previous projects.



Infrastructure (Personal): What city/region are you in? Detail your exact backup plan for power and internet (Hardware names + secondary ISP).



Working Hours: Ideally 2 to 4 hours aligned with South African Standard Time (SAST) for daily syncs?

title: Sentinel Power User - 3 Screens required
description:
We are migrating safety-critical worker profiles from the UK Rail Sentinel database to our private management system. This role requires extreme speed, multitasking, and absolute precision. We are looking for "Power Users" who maintain a high-efficiency workstation.



Hardware Requirements (Non-Negotiable):



 * Triple Screen Setup:* You must have at least three monitors (e.g., Laptop + 2 Monitors or a 3-Desktop Monitor setup). This is essential for managing the source database, destination system, and communication tools simultaneously.

 *High-Speed Internet:* Minimum 25 Mbps with a stable backup connection.

*Compensation (Output-Based):*

We pay for results and efficiency. Top performers in this role earn significantly above the local hourly average.

  *$0.40 USD* per Initial Profile Migration (Est. 5 mins).

 *$0.10 USD* per Monthly Maintenance Update (Est. 1 min).

 *Weekly Payouts* processed via Wise.



*Quality Control & Accuracy Policy:*

Because this data involves rail safety, there is zero room for error.



 * Accuracy Penalty:* To ensure high standards, a deduction of *$0.80* (2x the initial entry rate) will be applied for every inaccurate profile (e.g., wrong date, typo in name, or missed competency).



 *Training:* We provide a brief paid trial/training period where these penalties are waived while you learn the system.



*Requirements:*

 * Native or near-native English proficiency.

 * Proven experience in high-volume data migration/entry.

 * Exceptional multitasking skills (managing multiple databases across screens).

 * High reliability for ongoing, daily work.



### Why work with us?

We value high-performing professionals and provide steady, long-term work with fast weekly payouts. If you have the hardware and the speed, this is a highly lucrative position.

title: Full-Stack Developer (Next.js / Node.js, AI-Enhanced)
description:
Job Summary



We are looking for a skilled Full-Stack Developer (Next.js / Node.js, AI-Enhanced) who builds reliable, maintainable, and scalable web applications using modern TypeScript-based stacks. This is a hands-on engineering role focused on real software development, not low-effort tooling or “vibe coding.”



You will work across internal products and client projects, with a strong focus on Next.js, Node.js, Payload CMS, and WordPress. Experience with AI tools is relevant where it improves engineering workflows, automation, or product capabilities—not as a replacement for solid software engineering practices.



A strong advantage is experience with Payload CMS (used as a core system foundation) and at least one e-commerce platform such as Shopify or Shopware.



Responsibilities



* Build and maintain production-grade applications using Next.js and Node.js

* Work on systems built with Payload CMS, including extensions, custom features, and API integrations

* Develop and maintain WordPress solutions for client projects when required

* Design and implement backend services and APIs using TypeScript

* Integrate third-party APIs (e.g. Google APIs, payment providers, external services)

* Build clean, scalable architectures with performance and maintainability in mind

* Use AI tools to improve engineering efficiency (automation, refactoring support, workflow optimization) without compromising code quality

* Debug, test, and optimize applications across frontend and backend

* Collaborate with the team on system design and technical decisions

* Support both internal product development and external client work



Required Qualifications



* Strong experience with Next.js and Node.js

* Solid proficiency in TypeScript and modern JavaScript

* Practical experience with API development (REST and/or GraphQL)

* Experience working with Payload CMS (strong advantage)

* Understanding of full-stack application architecture (frontend + backend)

* Ability to write clean, maintainable, production-ready code

* Experience with Git and collaborative development workflows

* Strong problem-solving skills and structured engineering mindset



Preferred Qualifications



* Experience with WordPress development (themes, plugins, custom integrations)

* Experience with Shopify or Shopware (or similar e-commerce systems)

* Experience integrating AI APIs or tools in a structured engineering context

* Familiarity with cloud deployment workflows (e.g. Vercel, AWS, Docker)

* Experience working in product-driven or client project environments



Skills



* Strong full-stack engineering mindset

* Ability to design, extend, and refactor complex codebases

* Focus on performance, maintainability, and scalability

* Practical and disciplined approach to debugging and testing

* Comfortable working across multiple systems and integrations

* Structured use of AI tools as engineering assistance



Experience Requirements



* 2–4+ years of professional experience in web development

* Proven experience with Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript

* Experience with CMS-driven systems (especially Payload CMS or WordPress)

* Experience delivering production-level applications in real-world environments

title: Experienced Flutter App Developer
description:
Experienced Flutter Developer (Project Takeover & Cleanup)

Top 3 Skills Required:



Flutter Code Refactoring: Experience taking over and "tightening" existing codebases (specifically those built with AI/vibe coding tools).



Advanced 3rd-Party Integrations: Expert at implementing Vimeo, YouTube, Firebase Analytics, and WordPress REST APIs.



Clean Architecture & State Management: Moving logic out of the UI and into scalable, maintainable services (Singleton/Service patterns).



Role Overview:

I am the Product Strategist for an education organisation. We are a small, agile core team driving a well-established, 15+ year-old non-profit. I have been vibe coding our Flutter app using Cursor and Antigravity, but I am now stepping back as it took me way way too long and i'm falling behind in other areas of my job. I need a professional developer to take over the project, clean up the logic, and implement critical integrations, also to handle uploading to the stores, making up nicer previews etc.



You will work closely with our WordPress/Web Developer and Designer to ensure the app and website are perfectly synced.



Core Responsibilities:



Project Takeover: Audit, clean up, and refactor the existing Flutter code for stability and performance.



Integrations: Implement and optimize Vimeo and YouTube players, Firebase Analytics, and secure API connections to our WordPress/Kajabi backend.



Collaboration: Coordinate daily with our Web Designer to align endpoints and data structures.



Gamification (Advantage): Help us implement engagement features and gamified learning paths for our users.



Requirements:



Proven experience with flutter content apps, video, audio lessons - hundreds of episodes within series/categories etc - the app is working but new version has a few bugs and integrations that it needs before we can upload to stores. 



Strong background in media-focussed apps (vimeo api, youtibe api, audio on backend currenrly, audio/video persistence etc).



Gamification or game development experience is a major plus.



Proactive communicator who isn't afraid to ask questions to get things right the first time.



Required Application Questions:



Start your reply with "Audio". Explain in 3 simple steps how you ensure background audio persists cleanly when a user navigates between different screens.



Project Takeover: Have you ever taken over a project built by a non-coder or an AI-assisted "vibe coder"? What was your process for cleaning up the code?



Gamification: Do you have experience building gamified features or working with game logic? Please provide a brief example.



Role Comprehension: In your own words, what is the primary goal of this position?



Proof of Execution: Provide 2-3 links or screenshots of media-heavy apps you have built or managed.



Reliability: What city/region are you in? Name your specific backup hardware for power outages and your secondary ISP.



Working Hours: Can you align 2-4 hours of your workday with South African Standard Time (SAST) for our daily syncs?

- Bottom performer parts ways respectfully. No hard feelings, but the

  results d

- Top performer takes on team lead responsibilities by month 3 with

  elevated commission rates: 40% first-month and 15% recurring on their

  own sales (up from 30%/10%), and helps onboard future contractors.

  The promotion typically adds $1,000 to $3,000+ per month to their

  personal earnings at scale.



This structure is stated upfront. No surprises. The best contractors

rise. The hungry ones build a real career here.



The role:

Send personalized cold outreach to US small business owners and execute

follow-up sequences. You'll own 2-3 US metro areas and become the

expert in those markets.



You will not be cold calling, writing content, engaging in Reddit or

 groups, or closing sales. Those are different roles at Seen AI.

Your job is outbound. Doing it exceptionally well is how you earn the most.



The company provides:

- Warm prospect lists. You focus on outreach, not research

-
 templates that work

- Company sending infrastructure (dedicated
 accounts)

- Daily onboarding support during the first 14 days

- Direct collaboration with Jackson during onboarding



Compensation:



$100 USD/month guaranteed base (paid on the 1st of each month via Wise),

PLUS uncapped commission on every customer you sign:



- 30% of every customer's first-month payment to Seen AI

- 10% of every monthly payment for the next 12 months they stay subscribed



The base is a guaranteed minimum. You receive it regardless of

performance during the early months while you ramp. Your commissions

are uncapped on top.



What this looks like in real numbers:



For context: the average Manila SDR earns around $680 USD/month. The

top 10?rn around $1,100 USD/month. This contract structure is

designed to pay top performers 3 to 5 times that ceiling.



Realistic earnings progression:

- Month 1 (onboarding): $100 to $250 (base + early commissions while you learn)

- Month 2 (ramping): $400 to $800

- Month 3 (in rhythm): $800 to $1,500

- Month 6 at scale: $1,600 to $2,600

- Month 12 with full recurring stack: $2,600 to $3,600+



Top performers who consistently land enterprise/Pro tier accounts can

earn $4,000+ per month. There is no cap.



The structure is simple: every customer you sign pays you for the next

12 months. Sign 5 customers per month consistently and your recurring

stack alone will pay you more than the average Manila SDR salary,

before you've made a single new sale.



Commissions are paid 35 days after the customer's first successful

payment. If the customer disputes or refunds within that window, no

commission is paid. This protects both of us.



Recommended availability:

For maximum response rates, your outreach should hit US small business

owners during their morning hours (6am to 12pm EDT) when they actually

read
s. This corresponds to roughly 6pm to 12am Manila time, Monday

through Friday.



You manage your own schedule. Contractors who send outside this window

typically see lower reply rates, which directly impacts commission

earnings.



Jackson is typically available 6pm to 9pm Manila time for collaboration

and questions during the onboarding period.



Requirements:

- Native-level written English fluency

- Proven cold
 experience (B2B SaaS preferred)

- Reliable internet, dedicated quiet workspace

- Familiar with Gmail, Google Sheets, Calendar

- Self-directed, professional, coachable

- Available to start within 3 days of contract signing



This contract is for someone who wants to control their earnings. The

$100 base provides a guaranteed minimum during ramp, but the real money

is in commission. If you're someone who thrives on performance-based

income with unlimited upside, this is built for you.



Independent contractor engagement:



This is an independent contractor engagement, not employment:



- You are an independent contractor providing services to Seen AI

- You set your own schedule and work methods within agreed deliverable

  targets

- You provide your own workspace, internet, and personal equipment

- You are responsible for your own taxes, SSS, PhilHealth, and other

  contributions in the Philippines

- You may work with other clients provided there is no conflict of

  interest with Seen AI's business

- The engagement can be terminated by either party with reasonable notice

- This engagement does not constitute an employer-employee relationship

  under Philippine labor law



To apply, answer these 4 questions:



1. Write a 4-sentence cold
 pitching Seen AI to a hypothetical HVAC

   business owner. Use whatever you know about cold outreach. Be creative.

2. What was your most successful cold
 campaign in your previous

   role? What was the response rate, and how do you know?

3. If a prospect replies "not interested, take me off your list," what

   is your exact reply (verbatim)?

4. What is your biggest weakness as an SDR?



To stand out, also tell us:

- Why this specific contract (not a generic "I want to grow" answer)

- One thing about Seen AI's product that interests you (visit nowseen.ai

  before applying)



Applications missing any of the 4 questions won't be reviewed.



Selection timeline:

- Applications open immediately and close in 72 hours

- Top 10 candidates receive a trial task within 24 hours: send 5

  personalized cold
s to real prospects from a list we provide

  (around 30 minutes of work). We evaluate the actual
s, not your

  application essay.

- Top 6 from the trial task receive a 20-minute video call within

  48 hours

- Top 3 contracted within 7 days of posting

- Start date: within 3 days of contract signing



Total time from application to first day of work: under 10 days.



This trial task is unpaid. We're testing whether you can do the actual

work before we contract you. If you're not willing to write 5
s to

prove you can do the role, this isn't the contract for you.



Apply now. The first 30 days will tell us who's built for this.

title: Senior Full-Stack TypeScript Developer (CRM System)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Full-Stack TypeScript Developer to take ownership of a production-grade, custom-built CRM platform used in the mortgage industry.



This is a high-complexity system with multiple portals, deep backend architecture, and strict compliance/security requirements. The ideal candidate will manage, maintain, and improve the system, working alongside the current US-based developer for onboarding.



This is not a junior or mid-level role — seniority is critical due to the system’s complexity and risk exposure. 

 

System Overview

• 3 Core Portals: 

o Client Portal 

o Employee/Staff Portal 

o Referral/Partner Portal 

• Additional: Public lead funnel 

• Tech Stack: 

o Frontend: Next.js 15 / React 18 

o Backend: NestJS (TypeScript) 

o Database: PostgreSQL / Supabase (with RLS) 

o Queue System: BullMQ / Redis 

• Scale: 350K+ lines of code (enterprise-level system) 

• Integrations: SendGrid, Twilio, Gmail, Google Calendar, RingCentral, AWS Bedrock, etc. 

 

Key Responsibilities

• Maintain and manage the full CRM system across all portals 

• Take ownership of an existing large codebase (not greenfield) 

• Troubleshoot bugs and ensure system stability 

• Implement new features and enhancements 

• Manage and update third-party integrations 

• Handle database migrations and ensure data security 

• Monitor background jobs (BullMQ) and system performance 

• Work within existing architecture (no unnecessary rewrites) 

 

Non-Negotiable Requirements

• Senior-level experience (MUST) – no junior or mid-level candidates 

• Strong TypeScript (strict mode) experience 

• Proven experience with NestJS (not just Node/Express) 

• Experience with Next.js (App Router, SSR) 

• Strong PostgreSQL + Supabase (especially Row-Level Security / RLS) 

• Experience managing large, existing production codebases 

• Familiarity with BullMQ / Redis job queues 

• Experience with API integrations 
, SMS, CRM tools, etc.) 

• Strong understanding of system architecture and security best practices 

• Ability to communicate clearly and work autonomously 

 

Ideal Candidate Profile

• Has taken over and maintained a large, complex system built by others 

• Understands risk in modifying security layers (especially RLS) 

• Strong problem solver with production-level debugging experience 

• Comfortable working in async / remote environments 

• Uses AI tools effectively in development workflows (preferred) 



How to apply:

Please send your

1. Updated resume

2. Portfolio

3. Introduction video about your relevant work experiences

4. A short cover letter why you're the best fit for the role.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Position : Remote Job



We are an expanding U.S.-based luxury cleaning company focused on building efficient, long-term systems and structured processes. We’re seeking a versatile Virtual Assistant who is highly organized, detail-focused, proactive, and open to learning new tools and workflows over time.

This is a long-term opportunity for someone who enjoys working with structure, documentation, research, and continuously improving systems.

Key Responsibilities

1. Document Management & Administration

Maintain and organize internal documents such as employee forms, agreements, SOPs, and on boarding materials. Create clear and logical folder structures using platforms like Google Drive or Dropbox, ensuring all files are properly labeled, version-controlled, and easy to locate.

2. SOP & Process Creation

Review provided YouTube content related to professional and luxury cleaning. Identify key steps, tools, and techniques, then convert them into clear, well-structured written SOPs and checklists (including deep cleaning and specialized services). Continuously refine and improve these documents over time.

3. Platform & Systems Support (Training Provided)

Learn to work with Booking Koala and assist in setting up and optimizing the platform. Ensure services, pricing structures, and descriptions align with the company’s website. Document workflows to support future tea
mbers. (No prior experience required—willingness to learn is key.)

4. Market & Competitor Research

Conduct research on competitors within the cleaning and luxury service industry. Analyze and summarize their pricing, service offerings, and market positioning, providing clear written insights rather than just links.

5. Social Media Management

Set up and manage social media accounts (such as Instagram and TikTok). Re purpose ideas from existing content, create captions, hashtags, and posting schedules, and ensure consistent posting aligned with brand guidelines.

Required Skills & Qualities



Strong written English skills



Excellent attention to detail



Highly organized and process-oriented



Comfortable learning new tools and systems



Ability to follow instructions accurately



Proactive communication and thoughtful questioning



Dependable with consistent availability



Fluent in English.

title: Experienced VSL Video Editor — $1,000/Month + Bonuses
description:

BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Video Editor & Social Media Content CreatoR
description:

Our Goal:

We are looking for individuals who understand:

Platforms We Focus On:



1. Instagram

2.

 Subject Line:
