title: B2B Cold Caller — US Market (Decision-Maker Outreach)
description:
Nexum Automations is a fast-growing AI consulting company that audits and builds AI systems for businesses. We work directly with business owners and executives across the United States, helping them automate operations, capture more leads, and scale faster using artificial intelligence.



We are expanding our outbound sales operation and need a sharp, resilient cold caller to connect with decision-makers and book qualified appointments.





What You'll Do



Make high-volume outbound calls daily to business owners and executives in the USA — you will be speaking directly with decision-makers, not receptionists or gatekeepers

Follow a script to qualify prospects and book appointments with our sales team

You will be using auto dialer in order to be more efficient

Drop pre-recorded voi
s when prospects don't answer to maximize callback rates

Send a daily report with results and key notes from conversations





Requirements



Minimum 1 year of B2B cold calling experience, preferably in the US market

Clear, neutral English accent — confident and professional with American business owners

Experience reaching and handling decision-makers directly (not reception-level calls)

Self-motivated, target-driven, and comfortable with high call volume

Reliable internet and quiet working environment

Familiarity with CRM tools or call platforms is a plus





What We Offer



Competitive monthly salary based on experience

Performance bonuses for meetings booked above target

Full script and training provided from day one

Long-term opportunity — we are building a sales team and grow from within

Schedule aligned with US Eastern Time business hours





To Apply



Send a 60–90 second voice recording introducing yourself and describing your cold calling experience. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Ecommerce Team Lead -
description:
E-Commerce Manager (Multi-Platform: Product, Design, PPC & Team Leadership)

Part-Time to Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term



About the Company



HouseSensationsArt is a U.S.-based e-commerce and manufacturing brand specializing in custo
tal décor, signage, and personalized products.



We operate across multiple platforms including Shopify, Amazon, Etsy, eBay, and TikTok Shop. As we continue to scale, we are building a strong Philippines-based remote team to support product development, marketing, and operations.



About the Role



We are hiring a highly skilled E-Commerce Manager who understands the full product lifecycle—from concept and design to listing optimization, advertising, and scaling.



This is a leadership role where you will manage a team of 5–7 members across design, listings, and marketing while also executing key tasks when needed.



This is not a basic listing role. You are expected to take ownership of product performance from creation to scaling.



Key Responsibilities



Product Setup & Listing Management



Create and publish product listings on Etsy, Amazon, Shopify, eBay, and TikTok Shop

Build listings from scratch (no copy-paste templates)

Write SEO-optimized titles, descriptions, and tags

Ensure platform compliance and best practices



Graphic Design & Content Creation



Design product images, infographics, and mockups

Create A+ Content for Amazon listings

Develop lifestyle images and conversion-focused visuals

Maintain consistent branding across all platforms



PPC Advertising & Marketing



Manage and optimize advertising campaigns across:

Amazon PPC

Etsy Ads

Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

Google Ads (preferred)

Perform keyword research and competitor analysis

Monitor and optimize metrics such as CTR, CPC, and ROAS

Scale winning products and campaigns



Team Leadership & Management (5–7 Members)



Lead, manage, and mentor designers, listing specialists, and marketing assistants

Assign tasks and track progress using project management tools

Review work for quality, accuracy, and brand consistency

Ensure deadlines are met and workflows are followed

Provide feedback, training, and performance improvement guidance

Ensure daily EOD reports are submitted



Multi-Platform Strategy & Optimization



Manage and sync products across all platforms

Identify top-performing products and scale them

Improve conversion rates through testing and optimization

Analyze data and adjust strategies accordingly



Product Development Support



Assist in creating new product concepts

Understand materials, sizing, and customization options

Coordinate with design and production teams for accuracy

Requirements



Must-Have Skills



Proven experience managing multi-platform e-commerce stores

Experience leading a team (minimum 3+, ideally 5–7 members)

Strong knowledge of:

Etsy SEO

Amazon Seller Central and A+ Content

Shopify product setup

Experience with PPC advertising (Amazon, Etsy, Meta)

Advanced graphic design skills

Ability to create high-converting product listings



Technical Skills



Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator (or equivalent)

Experience with product mockups and image creation

Understanding of branding and conversion-focused design

Familiarity with tools such as:

Canva (optional)

Helium 10 or Jungle Scout (preferred)

Google Analytics



Bonus Skills



Experience with custom products or signage

Knowledge of vector files, laser cutting, or product design workflows

Video editing for short-form content (TikTok, Reels)

Experience with Shopify apps and integrations

Position Details



Hours: 20–30 hours per week (potential to increase to 30–40 hours)

Schedule: Overnight (Philippine Time, aligned with U.S. hours)

Work Setup: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

Pay: Starting at $4.00/hour (based on experience), paid weekly via Wise

Start Date: ASAP

Requirements: NDA, contract agreement, TimeProof tracking, and daily EOD reports



Work Requirements

Must use TimeProof (with screenshots and activity tracking)

Daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports required (for both personal work and team oversight)

Strong English communication (written and verbal)

Stable internet connection

Ability to manage both tasks and tea
mbers effectively

How to Apply



Submit the following:



Updated resume

Portfolio (required – include product listings and graphic design work)

Examples of teams you have managed

Use this subject line: “ECOM LEAD – [Your Name]”



Schedule your interview here:





Be ready to start immediately.



What We’re Looking For

Someone who can lead a team and execute at a high level

Strong understanding of what makes products sell

Ownership mindset from idea to scaling

Organized, fast, and detail-oriented

Ability to manage people, deadlines, and performance

Important



Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be considered.
